
1.1(1): byang chub sems kyi myu gu gab pa dgu 
1.2(1): skor bzhugs so/ /
1.3(1): ston pa kun tu bzang po gshen lha 'od dkar la phyag 'tshal lo/ /ston pa 
1.4(1): thugs rje che mnga' ba/ thams cad mkhyen pas de bzhin gsungs/ de las rig pa 
1.5(1): thabs kyis brgyud/ skal ldan snod bzang 'ga' tsam la/ sems kyi dkyil du phog 
1.6(1): par bya/ rus sbal rgya mtshor bskums pa bzhin/ phal gyis mthong bar mi 'gyur te/
1.7(1): 'di ni gsang ba'i gsang ba'o/ /bden pa'i thig le nyag gcig las/ mtshan gyi rnam 
1.8(1): grangs dgu ru gyes/ bskor nas de bzhin de las 'dus/
1.9(1): 7 bon nyid bde chen snod yangs su/ thams cad mkhyen pa'i rgyal po ni/ rnam 
1.10(1): rtog mi mnga' cir yang gsal/ de rtogs ma rtogs khyad par can/ de la ma rtogs 
1.11(1): sgrib pa ni/ rgyu lnga'i snying po phyin ci log /ma rtogs pa ni lcags bas dam/ rtogs 
1.12(1): na de ni dgongs pa'i mchog /dang po lcags btsal mkhan po bkug /de nas gyong 
1.13(1): 'dul mthar yang bya/ de nas sgo lcags gzhugs par bya/ kun bzang gsang mdzod 
1.14(1): sgo lcags lnga/ byang chub sems gsal me long lnga/ sku dang 'phrin las lngar yang 
1.15(1): rdzogs/ byang chub sems lnga de bzhin te/ ye shes lnga yang de nyid do/ /kun bzang 
1.16(1): bde chen lnga la chibs/ zhe sdang spangs nas byams pa lhag mi mthong / gti mug 
1.17(1): spangs nas ye shes lhag mi mthong / nga rgyal spangs nas zhi ba lhag mi mthong / 'dod 
2.1(1): chags spangs nas sbyin pa lhag mi mthong / phrag dog spangs nas yangs pa lhag mi 
2.2(1): mthong / de 'byed lde mig stor gyur na/ thabs med shes rab bral ba yin/ nyon 
2.3(1): mongs tha rams sngon po dam/ de 'byed 'phrul gyi lde mig stor/ zhe sdang tha rams 
2.4(1): sngon po dam/ de 'byed 'phrul gyi lde mig stor/ gti mug tha rams sngon po dam/ de 
2.5(1): 'byed 'phrul gyi lde mig stor/ nga rgyal tha rams sngon po dam/ de 'byed 'phrul gyi 
2.6(1): lde mig stor/ 'dod chags tha rams sngon po dam/ de 'byed 'phrul gyi lde mig stor/
2.7(1): phrag dog tha rams sngon po dam// de 'byed 'phrul gyi lde mig stor/ 'khrul pa'i tha 
2.8(1): rams sngon po dam/ de 'byed 'phrul gyi lde mig stor/ gtang snyoms tha rams sngon 
2.9(1): po dam/ de 'byed 'phrul gyi lde mig stor/ sdug bsngal tha rams sngon po dam/ de 
2.10(1): 'byed 'phrul gyi lde mig stor/ rtog 'dzin tha rams sngon po dam/ de 'byed 'phrul 
2.11(1): gyi lde mig stor/ shugs med tha rams sngon po dam/ de 'byed 'phrul gyi lde mig 
2.12(1): stor/ phrin las tha rams sngon po dam/ de 'byed 'phrul gyi lde mig stor/ spyod pa'i 
2.13(1): tha rams sngon po dam/ de 'byed 'phrul gyi lde mig stor/ dam tshig tha rams sngon 
2.14(1): po dam/ de 'byed 'phrul gyi lde mig stor/ dgra tshogs tha rams sngon po dam/ de 
2.15(1): 'byed 'phrul gyi lde mig stor/ mtshon pa'i tha rams sngon po dam/ de 'byed 'phrul gyi 
2.16(1): lde mig stor/ kun brtags tha rams sngon po dam/ de 'byed 'phrul gyi lde mig stor/
2.17(1): 'khor ba'i tha rams sngon po dam/ de 'byed 'phrul gyi lde mig stor/ rmongs pa'i tha 
2.18(1): rams sngon po dam/ de 'byed 'phrul gyi lde mig stor/ g.yo rtsol tha rams sngon po 
2.19(1): dam/ de 'byed 'phrul gyi lde mig stor/ 'gyur ldog tha rams sngon po dam/ de 'byed 
2.20(1): 'phrul gyi lde mig stor/ bsgribs pa'i tha rams sngon po dam/ de 'byed 'phrul gyi lde 
2.21(1): mig stor/ nyes skyon tha rams sngon po dam/ de 'byed 'phrul gyi lde mig stor/ mun 
3.1(1): nag tha rams sngon po dam/ de 'byed 'phrul gyi lde mig stor/ 'khrig chags tha rams 
3.2(1): sngon po dam/ de 'byed 'phrul gyi lde mig stor/ log pa'i tha rams sngon po dam/ de 
3.3(1): 'byed 'phrul gyi lde mig stor/ shes bya'i tha rams sngon po dam/ de 'byed 'phrul gyi 
3.4(1): lde mig stor/ gzhan dbang tha rams sngon po dam/ de 'byed 'phrul gyi lde mig stor/
3.5(1): bcings tshad tha rams sngon po dam/ de 'byed 'phrul gyi lde mig stor/ 'chi 'phos 
3.6(1): tha rams sngon po dam/ de 'byed 'phrul gyi lde mig stor/ 'dzin chags tha rams 
3.7(1): sngon po dam/ de 'byed 'phrul gyi lde mig stor/ stor bral tha rams sngon po dam/ de 
3.8(1): 'byed 'phrul gyi lde mig stor/ spongs pa'i tha rams sngon po dam/ de 'byed 'phrul 
3.9(1): gyi lde mig stor/ mngon mthong tha rams sngon po dam/ de 'byed 'phrul gyi lde mig 
3.10(1): stor/ thabs med tha rams sngon po dam/ de 'byed 'phrul gyi lde mig stor/ gol sa 
3.11(1): tha rams sngon po dam/ de 'byed 'phrul gyi lde mig stor/ nges med tha rams sngon po 
3.12(1): dam/ de 'byed 'phrul gyi lde mig stor/ bya brtsal tha rams sngon po dam/ de 'byed 
3.13(1): 'phrul gyi lde mig stor/ bag chags tha rams sngon po dam/ de 'byed 'phrul gyi lde 
3.14(1): mig stor/ re smon tha rams sngon po dam/ de 'byed 'phrul gyi lde mig stor/ mngon 
3.15(1): shes tha rams sngon po dam/ de 'byed 'phrul gyi lde mig stor/ stong zad tha rams 
3.16(1): sngon po dam/ de'abyed 'phrul gyi lde mig stor/ sgro skur tha rams sngon po dam/
3.17(1): 'byed 'phrul gyi lde mig stor/ spongs len tha rams sngon po dam/ de 'byed 'phrul gyi 
3.18(1): lde mig stor/ so so tha rams sngon po dam/ de 'byed 'phrul gyi lde mig stor/ gzugs 
3.19(1): brnyan tha rams sngon po dam/ de 'byed 'phrul gyi lde mig stor/ sred len tha rams 
3.20(1): sngon po dam/ de 'byed 'phrul gyi lde mig stor/ dpyod pa'i tha rams sngon po dam/
3.21(1): de 'byed 'phrul gyi lde mig stor/ra/ 'du byed tha rams sngon po dam/ de 'byed 'phrul 
4.1(1): gyi lde mig stor/ mtshan ma'i tha rams sngon po dam/ de 'byed 'phrul gyi lde mig stor/
4.2(1): dngos po tha rams sngon po dam/ de 'byed 'phrul gyi lde mig stor/ kun 'byung tha 
4.3(1): rams sngon po dam/ de 'byed 'phrul gyi lde mig stor/ 'bad rtsol tha rams sngon po 
4.4(1): dam/ de 'byed 'phrul gyi lde mig stor/ ji bzhin tha rams sngon po dam/ de 'byed 
4.5(1): 'phrul gyi lde mig stor/ 'byung 'jug tha rams sngon po dam/ de 'byed 'phrul gyi lde 
4.6(1): mig stor/ dus kyi tha rams sngon po dam/ de 'byed 'phrul gyi lde mig stor/ mngon 
4.7(1): sprul tha rams sngon po dam/ de 'byed 'phrul gyi lde mig stor/ rnam rtog tha rams 
4.8(1): sngon po dam/ de 'byed 'phrul gyi lde mig stor/ de btsal la ni de dbye'o/ /
4.9(1): 7 thugs rje 'phrul kyi lde mig gis/ nyon mongs tha rams sngon po dbye/ byams 
4.10(1): pa 'phrul gyi lde mig gis/ zhe sdang tha rams sngon po dbye/ ye shes 'phrul gyi lde mig 
4.11(1): gis/ gti mug tha rams sngon po dbye/ zhi ba 'phrul gyi lde mig gis/ nga rgyal tha 
4.12(1): rams sngon po dbye/ sbyin pa 'phrul gyi lde mig gis/ 'dod chags tha rams sngon po 
4.13(1): dbye/ yangs pa 'phrul gyi lde mig gis/ phrag dog tha rams sngon po dbye/ shes rab 
4.14(1): 'phrul gyi lde mig gis/ 'khrul pa'i tha rams sngon po dbye/ brtson 'grus 'phrul gyi 
4.15(1): lde mig gis/ btang snyoms tha rams sngon po dbye/ bde ba 'phrul gyi lde mig gis/
4.16(1): sdug bsngal tha rams sngon po dbye/ lta ba 'phrul gyi lde mig gis/ rtog 'dzin tha 
4.17(1): rams sngon po dbye/ stobs chen 'phrul gyi lde mig gis/ shugs med tha rams sngon 
4.18(1): po dbye/ lhun grub 'phrul gyi lde mig gis/ phrin las tha rams sngon po dbye/ rnam 
4.19(1): dag 'phrul gyi lde mig gis/ spyod pa'i tha rams sngon po dbye/ ye bsrungs 'phrul 
4.20(1): gyi lde mig gis/ dam tshig tha rams sngon po dbye/ bzod pa 'phrul gyi lde mig gis/
4.21(1): dgra tshogs tha rams sngon po dbye/ dmigs med 'phrul gyi lde mig gis/ mtshon pa'i 
5.1(1): tha rams sngon po dbye/ thig le 'phrul gyi lde mig gis/ kun brtags tha rams sngon 
5.2(1): po dbye/ ma chags 'phrul gyi lde mig gis/ 'khor ba'i tha rams sngon po dbye/ gsal 
5.3(1): ba 'phrul gyi lde mig gis/ rmongs pa'i tha rams sngon po dbye/ dgongs pa 'phrul 
5.4(1): gyi lde mig gis/ g.yo rtsol tha rams sngon po dbye/ bsam gtan 'phrul gyi lde mig 
5.5(1): gis/ 'gyur ldog tha rams sngon po dbye/ rig pa 'phrul gyi lde mig gis/ sgrib pa'i 
5.6(1): tha rams sngon po dbye/ yon tan 'phrul gyi lde mig gis/ nyes skyon tha rams sngon po 
5.7(1): dbye/ 'od gsal 'phrul gyi lde mig gis/ mun nag tha rams sngon po dbye/ thabs 
5.8(1): chen 'phrul gyi lde mig gis/ 'khrig chags tha rams sngon po dbye/ bden pa 'phrul 
5.9(1): gyi lde mig gis/ log pa'i tha rams sngon po dbye/ ngang nyid 'phrul gyi lde mig gis/
5.10(1): shes bya'i tha rams sngon po dbye/ bdag nyid 'phrul gyi lde mig gis/ gzhan dbang 
5.11(1): tha rams sngon po dbye/ byang chub 'phrul gyi lde mig gis/ bcings tshad tha rams 
5.12(1): sngon po dbye/ g.yung drung 'phrul gyi lde mig gis/ 'chi 'phos tha rams sngon po dbye/
5.13(1): tshad med 'phrul gyi lde mig gis/ 'dzin chags tha rams sngon po dbye/ ting 'dzin 
5.14(1): 'phrul gyi lde mig gis/ stor bral tha rams sngon po dbye/ grub pa 'phrul gyi lde mig 
5.15(1): gis/ spongs pa'i tha rams sngon po dbye/ khyab pa 'phrul gyi lde mig gis/ mngon 
5.16(1): mthong tha rams sngon po dbye/ rdzu 'phrul 'phrul gyi lde mig gis/ thabs med tha 
5.17(1): rams sngon po dbye/ man ngag 'phrul gyi lde mig gis/ gol ba'i tha rams sngon po 
5.18(1): dbye/ gdengs chen 'phrul gyi lde mig gis/ nges med tha rams sngon po dbye/ rtsol 
5.19(1): med 'phrul gyi lde mig gis/ bya brtsal tha rams sngon po dbye/ rang snang 'phrul gyi 
5.20(1): lde mig gis/ bag chags tha rams sngon po dbye/ ye nyid 'phrul gyi lde mig gis/ re 
5.21(1): smon tha rams sngon po dbye/ che ba 'phrul gyi lde mig gis/ mngon shes tha rams sngon 
6.1(1): po dbye/ shes rig 'phrul gyi lde mig gis/ stong zad tha rams sngon po dbye/ yang 
6.2(1): dag 'phrul gyi lde mig gis/ sgro skur tha rams sngon po dbye/ chibs pa 'phrul gyi lde 
6.3(1): mig gis/ spangs len tha rams sngon po dbye/ gnyis med 'phrul gyi lde mig gis/
6.4(1): so so'i tha rams sngon po dbye/ sku nyid 'phrul gyi lde mig gis/ gzugs brnyan tha 
6.5(1): rams sngon po dbye/ skye med 'phrul gyi lde mig gis/ sred len tha rams sngon po 
6.6(1): dbye/ dpe med 'phrul gyi lde mig gis/ dpyod pa'i tha rams sngon po dbye/ 'das 
6.7(1): pa 'phrul gyi lde mig gis/ 'du byed tha rams sngon po dbye/ med pa 'phrul gyi lde mig 
6.8(1): gis/ mtshan ma'i tha rams sngon po dbye/ phyal ba 'phrul gyi lde mig gis/ dngos po'i 
6.9(1): tha rams sngon po dbye/ gcig pu 'phrul gyi lde mig gis/ kun 'byung tha rams sngon 
6.10(1): po dbye/ lhun rdzogs 'phrul gyi lde mig gis/ 'bad rtsol tha rams sngon po dbye/ de 
6.11(1): bzhin 'phrul gyi lde mig gis/ ji bzhin tha rams sngon po dbye/ ye gnas 'phrul gyi 
6.12(1): lde mig gis/ 'byung 'jug tha rams sngon po dbye/ ye yod 'phrul gyi lde mig gis/
6.13(1): dus kyi tha rams sngon po dbye/ ma bcos 'phrul gyi lde mig gis/ mngon sprul tha 
6.14(1): rams sngon po dbye/ ma yin 'phrul gyi lde mig gis/ rnam rtog tha rams sngon po dbye/
6.15(1): 7 nyon mongs blo ni bdud 'dra la/ thugs rje'i sems ni rtsi 'dra gtong / bdud 
6.16(1): rtsi zhes kyang de la bya/ bon nyid nam mkha' ye dag la/ sems nyid thugs rje'i 'od 
6.17(1): byung bas/ rgyu 'bras mnyam pa'i zil par chags/ mkha' klong ye nas snod yangs 
6.18(1): su/ bdud rtsi'i chu bo zil pa 'thigs/ zil thig ces kyang de la bya/ zhe sdang blo ni 
6.19(1): bdud 'dra la/ byams pa'i sems ni rtsi 'dra gtong / bdud rtsi zhes kyang de la bya/
6.20(1): byams sdang gnyis med mnyam pa la/ byang chub sems kyi zil par thigs/ zil thig 
6.21(1): ces kyang de la bya/ gti mug blo ni bdud 'dra la/ ye shes sems ni rtsi 'dra gtong /
7.1(1): bdud rtsi zhes kyang de la bya/ mun snang gnyis med mnyam pa las/ byang chub sems 
7.2(1): kyi zil par thigs/ zil thig ces kyang de la bya/ nga rgyal blo ni bdud 'dra la/
7.3(1): ba'i sems ni rtsi 'dra gtong / bdud rtsi zhes kyang de la bya/ zhi gnas lhag mthong 
7.4(1): mnyam pa las/ byang chub sems ni zil par thigs/ zil thig ces kyang de la bya/
7.5(1): 'dod chags blo ni bdud 'dra la/ sbyin pa'i sems ni rtsi 'dra gtong / bdud rtsi 
7.6(1): zhes kyang de la bya/ sbyin chags gnyis med mnyam pa las/ byang chub sems kyi zil 
7.7(1): par thigs/ zil thig ces kyang de la bya/ phrag dog blo ni bdud 'dra la/ yangs 
7.8(1): pa'i sems ni rtsi 'dra gtong / bdud rtsi zhes kyang de la bya/ yangs dog gnyis med 
7.9(1): mnyam pa las/ byang chub sems kyi zil par thigs/ zil thig ces kyang de la bya/
7.10(1): 'khrul pa'i blo ni bdud 'dra la/ shes rab sems ni rtsi 'dra gtong / bdud rtsi zhes 
7.11(1): kyang de la bya/ 'khrul shes gnyis med mnyam pa las/ byang chub sems kyi zil par 
7.12(1): thigs/ zil thig ces kyang de la bya/ btang snyoms blo ni bdud 'dra la/ brtson 
7.13(1): 'grus sems ni rtsi 'dra gtong / bdud rtsi zhes kyang de la bya/ brtson dal gnyis 
7.14(1): med mnyam pa la/ byang chub sems kyi zil par thigs/ zil thig ces kyang de la bya/
7.15(1): sdug bsngal blo ni bdud 'dra la// bde ba'i sems ni rtsi 'dra gtong / bdud rtsi zhes 
7.16(1): kyang de la bya/ bde sdug gnyis med mnyam pa las/ byang chub sems kyi zil par 
7.17(1): thigs/ zil thig ces kyang de la bya/ rtog 'dzin blo ni bdud 'dra la/ lta ba'i 
7.18(1): sems ni rtsi 'dra gtong / bdud rtsi zhes kyang de la bya/ lta rtog gnyis med mnyam pa 
7.19(1): las/ byang chub sems kyi zil par thigs/ zil thig ces kyang de la bya/ shugs med 
7.20(1): blo ni bdud 'dra la/ stobs chen sems ni rtsi 'dra gtong / bdud rtsi zhes kyang de la 
7.21(1): bya/ stobs shugs gnyis med mnyam pa las/ byang chub sems kyi zil par thigs/
8.1(1): zil thig ces kyang de la bya/ phrin las blo ni bdud 'dra la/ lhun grub sems ni rtsi 
8.2(1): 'dra gtong / bdud rtsi zhes kyang de la bya/ las grub gnyis med mnyam pa las/
8.3(1): byang chub sems kyi zil par thigs/ zil thig ces kyang de la bya/ dpyod pa'i blo ni 
8.4(1): bdud 'dra la/ rnam dag sems ni rtsi 'dra gtong / bdud rtsi zhes kyang de la bya/
8.5(1): dag dpyod gnyis med mnyam pa las/ byang chub sems kyi zil par thigs/ zil 
8.6(1): thig ces kyang de la bya/ dam tshig blo ni bdud 'dra la/ ye srung sems ni rtsi 'dra 
8.7(1): gtong / bdud rtsi zhes kyang de la bya/ ye dam gnyis med mnyam pa las/ byang chub 
8.8(1): sems kyi zil par thigs/ zil thig ces kyang de la bya/ dgra tshogs blo ni bdud 
8.9(1): 'dra la/ bzod pa'i sems ni rtsi 'dra gtong / bdud rtsi zhes kyang de la bya/ dgra 
8.10(1): bzod gnyis med mnyam pa las/ byang chub sems kyi zil par thigs/ zil thig 
8.11(1): ces kyang de la bya/ mtshon pa'i blo ni bdud 'dra la/ dmigs med sems ni rtsi 'dra 
8.12(1): gtong / bdud rtsi ces kyang de la bya/ dmigs mtshon gnyis med mnyam pa las/
8.13(1): byang chub sems kyi zil par thigs/ zil thig ces kyang de la bya/ kun brtags blo 
8.14(1): ni bdud 'dra la/ thig le sems ni rtsi 'dra gtong / bdud rtsi zhes kyang de la bya/
8.15(1): thig brtags gnyis med mnyam pa las/ byang chub sems kyi zil par thigs/ zil 
8.16(1): thig ces kyang de la bya/ 'khor ba'i blo ni bdud 'dra la/ ma chags sems ni rtsi 'dra 
8.17(1): gtong / bdud rtsi zhes kyang de la bya/ ma 'khor gnyis med mnyam pa las/ byang 
8.18(1): chub sems kyi zil par thigs/ zil thig ces kyang de la bya/ rmongs pa'i blo ni 
8.19(1): bdud 'dra la/ gsal ba'i sems ni rtsi 'dra gtong / bdud rtsi zhes kyang de la bya/
8.20(1): gsal rmongs gnyis med mnyam pa las/ byang chub sems kyi zil par thigs/ zil 
8.21(1): thig ces kyang de la bya/ g.yo rtsol blo ni bdud 'dra la/ dgongs pa'i sems ni rtsi 
9.1(1): 'dra gtong / bdud rtsi zhes kyang de la bya/ g.yo dgongs gnyis med mnyam pa las/
9.2(1): byang chub sems kyi zil par thigs/ zil thig ces kyang de la bya/ 'gyur ldog blo ni 
9.3(1): bdud 'dra la/ bsam gtan sems ni rtsi 'dra gtong / bdud rtsi zhes kyang de la bya/
9.4(1): bsam 'gyur gnyis med mnyam pa las/ byang chub sems kyi zil par thigs/ zil 
9.5(1): thig ces kyang de la bya/ sgrib pa'i blo ni bdud 'dra la/ rig pa'i sems ni rtsi 'dra 
9.6(1): gtong / bdud rtsi zhes kyang de la bya/ rig sgrib gnyis med mnyam pa las/ byang 
9.7(1): chub sems kyi zil par thigs/ zil thig ces kyang de la bya/ nyes skyon blo ni bdud 
9.8(1): 'dra la/ yon tan sems ni rtsi 'dra gtong / bdud rtsi zhes kyang de la bya/ yon skyon 
9.9(1): gnyis med mnyam pa las/ byang chub sems kyi zil par thigs/ zil thig ces kyang 
9.10(1): de la bya/ mun nag blo ni bdud 'dra la/ 'od zer sems ni rtsi 'dra gtong / bdud 
9.11(1): rtsi zhes kyang de la bya/ 'od mun gnyis med mnyam pa las/ byang chub sems kyi zil 
9.12(1): par thigs/ zil thig ces kyang de la bya/ 'khrigs chags blo ni bdud 'dra la/
9.13(1): thabs chen sems ni rtsi 'dra gtong / bdud rtsi zhes kyang de la bya/ thabs 'khrig 
9.14(1): gnyis med mnyam pa las/ byang chub sems kyi zil par thigs/ zil thig ces kyang 
9.15(1): de la bya/ log pa'i blo ni bdud 'dra la/ bden pa'i sems ni rtsi 'dra gtong /
9.16(1): bdud rtsi zhes kyang de la bya/ bden log gnyis med mnyam pa las/ byang chub 
9.17(1): sems kyi zil par thigs/ zil thig ces kyang de la bya/ shes bya'i blo ni bdud 'dra 
9.18(1): la/ ngang nyid sems ni rtsi 'dra gtong / bdud rtsi zhes kyang de la bya/ ngang shes 
9.19(1): gnyis med mnyam pa las/ byang chub sems kyi zil par thigs/ zil thig ces kyang 
9.20(1): de la bya/ gzhan dbang blo ni bdud 'dra la/ bdag nyid sems ni rtsi 'dra gtong /
9.21(1): bdud rtsi zhes kyang de la bya/ bdag gzhan gnyis med mnyam pa las/ byang chub 
10.1(1): sems kyi zil par thigs/ zil thig ces kyang de la bya/ bcings tshad blo ni bdud 
10.2(1): 'dra la/ byang chub sems ni rtsi 'dra gtong / bdud rtsi zhes kyang de la bya/ byang 
10.3(1): bcings gnyis med mnyam pa las/ byang chub sems kyi zil par thigs/ zil thig

21.7(1): 7 mi nub pa'i rgyal mtshan ye shes nam mkha'i dpe/ ston pa'i thugs la rig pa'i 
21.8(1): bcud shar bas/ thams cad mkhyen pas lung gi rgyal por gsungs/ mnyam la ma 
21.9(1): 'dres yi ge gtsigs dgu pa/ dpe don rtags dang gsum du mnyam pa 'di/ skal 
21.10(1): ldan sems la gnyis med don du sgoms/ mi 'gyur nam mkha' ye shes g.yung drung 
21.11(1): don/ skye med nam mkha' ye shes gdod nas dag /'chi med nam mkha' ye shes 
21.12(1): skyes nas btsan/ snang med nam mkha' ye shes dpe las 'das/ tshad med nam 
21.13(1): mkha' ye shes lhun la rdzogs/ rdzu 'phrul nam mkha' ye shes cir yang snang / thig 
21.14(1): le nam mkha' ye shes dbyings na rdzogs/ bden pa'i nam mkha' ye shes thig chen 
21.15(1): 'debs/ dgongs pa'i nam mkha' ye shes g.yo ba med/ man ngag nam mkha' ye 
21.16(1): shes gdengs dang chas/ lta ba'i nam mkha' ye shes rtogs pa che/ spyod pa'i nam

21.18(1): tshig nam mkha' ye shes bsrung du med/ ting 'dzin nam mkha' ye shes mi 'gyur 
21.19(1): gsal/ thugs rje'i nam mkha' ye shes dpag tu med/ thabs chen nam mkha' 
21.20(1): ye shes dbyings la rol/ shes rab nam mkha' ye shes gsal ba'i mchog /yon 
21.21(1): tan nam mkha' ye shes kun la snyoms/ thar lam nam mkha' ye shes 'khor ba 
22.1(1): med/ dkyil 'khor nam mkha' ye shes gzhal med khang / sku gsum nam mkha' ye

22.10(1): spyod las 'das/

22.20(1): kun la snyoms/ rdzu 'phrul thig le ye shes cir yang gsal/ 'byung ba'i thig le ye

29.19(1): bya'o/ /de ni lus rje sa la 'dug kyang / sems bran sa nas 'khol zhes bya'o/ /des 
29.20(1): sgom du mi 'dod do/ /sems nyid thams cad mkhyen pa'i ye shes las/ 'di zhes bya 
29.21(1): ba'i gtad mi 'cha' ba'i lta bas ma zin te bcings zer na/ kun tu bzang po bon 
30.1(1): gyi lta ba'i don ma rtogs te/ chags pas bcings zhes bya'o/ /de ni lus 'phur 
30.2(1): stabs dang chas nas kyang / sems gting rdo dang brag ces bya'o/ /des sgom du mi 
30.3(1): 'dod do/ /sems nyid thugs rje chen po spyi khyab las mnyam pa'i lta bas ma zin te 
30.4(1): bcings zer na/ kun tu bzang po bon gyi lta ba'i don ma rtogs te/ gdung sems 
30.5(1): kyis bcings zhes bya'o/ /de ni lus yang dben na 'dug kyang / sems gnyen bshes 
30.6(1): dang 'grogs ces bya'o/ /des sgom du mi 'dod do/ /sems nyid 'du shes mi 'jug 
30.7(1): pa las/ ma bcos pa'i lta bas ma zin te bcings zer na/ kun tu bzang po bon gyi 
30.8(1): lta ba'i don ma rtogs te/ bslad pa dang 'khrul pas bcings zhes bya'o/ /de ni lus 
30.9(1): kyis sgor phyin kyang / sems kyis phug ma brdol zhes bya'o/ /des sgom du mi 'dod 
30.10(1): do/ 7 /'di nas mar ni khrol tshad nyi shu rtsa gnyis gang gis khrol ba ston te/ kun tu 
30.11(1): bzang po bon gyi lta ba 'di thos pas/ dge ba rnams ni dang du blangs/ sdig pa 
30.12(1): rnams ni rgyab tu bskyur nas sgom du song na/ las dge sdig gnyis kyi 'bras bu ji 
30.13(1): ltar smin pa'i don rtogs pas khrol ba'o/ /spyi kun tu bzang po bon gyi lta ba 'di 
30.14(1): thos nas/ 'khrul pa rnams kyi bar mtshams dang / nye drung gi ched bor nas sgom du 
30.15(1): song na gnyen rnams sgyu mar shes pas/ gnyen la ma chags pa'i don rtogs nas 
30.16(1): don gyis khrol ba'o/ /spyi kun tu bzang po bon gyi lta ba 'di thos nas/ sems can gyi 
30.17(1): srog gcod pa spongs nas bsgom du song na/ byams pa chen po byang chub sems kyi 
30.18(1): don khrol ba'o/ /spyi kun tu bzang po bon gyi lta ba 'di thos nas/ pha log la the tshom 
30.19(1): g.yung zhing nga rgyal bskyungs nas/ sgom du song na bdag dang gzhan du mi 'dzin 
30.20(1): pa'i zhi ba chen po byang chub sems kyi don khrol ba'o/ /spyi kun tu bzang po bon gyi lta 
30.21(1): ba 'di thos nas/ khe spogs dang tshong sprul bor nas bsgom du song na/ rin chen sgyu 
31.1(1): mar shes pa'i byang chub sems kyi don khrol ba'o/ /spyi kun tu bzang po bon gyi lta ba 
31.2(1): 'di thos nas/ ma brjed de gzungs su bzungs nas bsgom du song na/ mi bsnyel 
31.3(1): ba'i gzungs thob pa'i byang chub sems kyi don khrol ba'o/ /spyi kun tu bzang po bon 
31.4(1): gyi lta ba 'di thos nas/ che chung dang ru nga med par bsgom du songs na/ yangs pa 
31.5(1): chen po byang chub sems kyi don khrol ba'o/ /spyi kun tu bzang po bon gyi lta ba 'di 
31.6(1): thos nas/ gzhan las ma yengs par bsgom du song ba na/ brtson 'grus chen po 
31.7(1): byang chub sems kyi don khrol ba'o/ /spyi kun tu bzang po bon gyi lta ba 'di thos nas/
31.8(1): 'du 'dzi thams cad spangs nas sgom du song na/ chags pa med pa'i byang chub 
31.9(1): sems kyi don khrol ba'o/ /spyi kun tu bzang po bon gyi lta ba 'di thos nas/ gtogs 
31.10(1): 'dod dang spyod ngan bor nas sgom du song na/ rnam par dag pa'i byang chub sems 
31.11(1): kyi don khrol ba'o/ /spyir kun tu bzang po bon gyi lta ba 'di thos nas/ dge ba la 
31.12(1): brtson zhing dka' ba bsdam nas sgom du song na/ bla na med pa grub pa chen po'i 
31.13(1): byang chub sems kyi don khrol ba'o/ /lta ba 'di thos ma thag tu/ gshen rab bla ma'i 
31.14(1): spyan sngar g.yar gyis khas blangs nas bsgom du song na/ blangs dor med pa'i byang 
31.15(1): chub sems kyi don khrol ba'o/ /spyir kun tu bzang po bon gyi lta ba 'di thos nas/
31.16(1): 'dod pa log par g.yem pa spangs nas/ bsgom du song na/ thabs chen dbyings 
31.17(1): la rol pa'i byang chub sems kyi don khrol ba'o/ /spyir kun tu bzang po bon gyi lta ba 
31.18(1): 'di thos nas/ mtha' ru phyin par bsgrubs nas/ khrol ba'i rang bzhin yin zer 
31.19(1): nas/ btsal ba med pa byang chub sems kyi don khrol ba'o/ 7 /'di nas mar la 
31.20(1): sgom du song ba la/ klong du gyur pa'i khrol tshad brgyad ston te/ cho 'phrul dang rtog 
31.21(1): 'dzin las g.yos pa med par bsgom du song na/ rnam par mi rtog pa'i byang chub 
32.1(1): sems klong du gyur pas don khrol ba'o/ /gzhan la ma yengs par yid gzhung nas 
32.2(1): sgom du song na/ don dam pa la ma yengs pa'i byang chub sems kyi don khrol ba'o/ /
32.3(1): 'byung 'jug nyung zhing khong dal bar bsgom na mnyam pa chen po stor bral med pa'i 
32.4(1): byang chub sems kyi don khrol ba'o/ /bden pa'i don la ma rtogs par/ gzhan gyi 
32.5(1): chog shes che bar bsgom du song na/ bden pa don gyi mchog las spyod pa'i byang chub 
32.6(1): sems kyi don khrol ba'o/ /mgron rnam pa bzhi las med par dmigs med mchod pa 
32.7(1): sbyin rgya chen por gtong na/ thugs rje chen po byang chub sems kyi don khrol ba'o/ /
32.8(1): dgos pa phyir lus pa la 'phreng thogs med par bsgoms na/ thogs pa med par 
32.9(1): byang chub kyi sems klong du gyur pas don khrol ba'o/ /gces pa'i gnyen mi rtag pa la 
32.10(1): gdung sems med par bsgoms na/ thugs rje chen po byang chub sems kyi mnyam 
32.11(1): snyoms kyi klong du gyur pas don khrol ba'o/ /bden pa'i don la ma bslad cing 'khrul 
32.12(1): pa med par bsgoms na/ sems nyid 'du shes mi 'jug pa las klong du gyur pas 
32.13(1): don khrol ba'o/ /
32.14(1): 7 'di nas mar ni sgrib pa nyi shu ston te/ khyad par chen po'i theg pa chen po ma 
32.15(1): rtogs pa'i skyon dbang gis/ theg pa 'og ma brgyad la sgrib pa nyi shu byung ste/ de gang 
32.16(1): zhe na/ shes bya'i sgrib pa bcu/ nyon mongs pa'i sgrib pa bcu ste nyi shu'o/ /de la shes 
32.17(1): bya'i sgrib pa bcu ni/ 'bras bu'i bon bzhi la gnas/ nyon mongs pa'i sgrib pa bcu 
32.18(1): ni/ rgyu yi bon bzhi la gnas/ rgyu 'bras gnyis las la bzlas pa'i theg pa chen po la 
32.19(1): ni/ sgrib pa ye nas mi mnga' ba'o/ /de las nyon mongs pa'i sgrib pa bcu gang zhe na/
32.20(1): byang chub sems bde ba chen po ma rtogs te/ gti mug gi rang bzhin gyis/ dper na 
32.21(1): dbyar gyi she'u mun ltar gyur te/ theg pa gong ma'i bon las/ sgra tsam thos na yang /
33.1(1): dug tu che ba ltar 'gyur ba de ni/ sems bying rmugs kyi sgrib pa'o/ /byang chub kyi 
33.2(1): sems ma rtogs pa'i dbang gis/ 'khrul pa ji bzhin ma las bag chags phyin ci 
33.3(1): log ji bzhin ma zhen pas/ 'khor ba'i gnas su gtan 'khyams pa'i sgrib pa'o/ /
33.4(1): byang chub kyi sems ma rtogs pa'i dbang gis/ 'dzin chags kyi dbang du gyur te/
33.5(1): bag chags phyi nang du rgyu ba la/ gdon dang bgegs su 'dzin pa de ni/ phyin ci log 
33.6(1): gi byung tshor gyis/ 'khor ba'i gnas su gtan 'khyams pa'i sgrib pa'o/ /byang chub 
33.7(1): sems ma rtogs pa'i dbang gis/ khra dang spyang khu ltar gyur te/ dper na khra dang 
33.8(1): spyang kus kyang / gzhan gyi bu bsad nas rang gi bu gso ba'i 'du shes dang ldan pa 
33.9(1): bzhin/ sems can la la bsad nas la la gso ba ni/ snying rje rang phyogs can gyis 
33.10(1): bya ste/ 'khor ba'i gnas su gtan 'khyams pa'i sgrib pa'o/ /byang chub kyi sems ma 
33.11(1): rtogs pa'i dbang gis/ sgyu ma'i nus mthu la bag chags mthu brtas nas nyes pa 
33.12(1): med pa'i sems can/ srog la dman pa'i ldam po byed pa ni/ 'khor ba'i gnas su 
33.13(1): gtan 'khyams pa'o/ /byang chub sems ma rtogs pa'i dbang gis dge ba la bskur 
33.14(1): pa btab/ sdig pa la smon pa 'bul te/ dge sdig 'chol bar spyad pa'i skyon gyis 
33.15(1): 'khor ba'i gnas su gtan 'khyams pa'o/ /byang chub kyi sems ma rtogs pa'i dbang 
33.16(1): gis 'jig rten 'di na gnas pa la sems yod do bar sgros brtags pas/ 'di 
33.17(1): nas mi rtag phan chod nas/ sems med do bar bskur pa btab/ yod med gnyis 
33.18(1): su brtags pas/ 'khor ba'i gnas su gtan 'khyams pa'i sgrib pa'o/ /sems ma 
33.19(1): rtogs pa'i dbang gis/ bden pa'i don la mi spyod cing 'khrul pa'i blo ru rtog cing 
33.20(1): bdag dang gzhan du bzung nas/ sems gdug pa chen pos rang lus srin po'i cha 
33.21(1): lugs su byas pas/ 'khor ba'i gnas su gtan 'khyams pa'i sgrib pa'o/ /sems ma 
34.1(1): rtogs pa'i dbang gis blo phyin ci log ste/ lus sems 'bral ba'i dus na/ sems 
34.2(1): dum bu gsum du chad nas/ lam gsum du mi gsum zhugs nas/ kha so sor bltas 
34.3(1): te song ba dang 'dra bar rtog pas/ 'khor bar ltung ba'i sgrib pa'o/ /sems ma 
34.4(1): rtogs pa'i dbang gis mi bde ba'i sems g.yos pas ma yin pa'i blo las rnam par 
34.5(1): rtog pa byung nas/ 'khrul pa'i rjes su 'khrul pa zhugs nas/ sprin gyi rjes su rlung 
34.6(1): zhugs pa dang 'dra ste/ g.yo ba'i 'khrugs par byed pas/ 'khor ba'i gnas su 
34.7(1): gtan 'khyams pa'i sgrib pa'o/ /shes bya'i sgrib pa bcu ni/ byang chub kyi sems rgyu 
34.8(1): 'bras gnyis su med pas/ rgyu sngon la btangs pas 'bras bu grub par rtog pa la/
34.9(1): rgyu btang ngo snyam pa'i shes bya dang / 'bras bu thob bo snyam pa'i shes bya yis/ sems 
34.10(1): las 'grib pa dang / sems de las dran pa byung / dran pa'i 'khor ba la longs 
34.11(1): btags/ 'khor ba mi bde bar shes/ 'bras bu bde ba btsal bar 'dod pa las/
34.12(1): bde ba'i don de rang las yod par mi shes shing / gzhan nas btsal bar shes pa 
34.13(1): las/ shes so snyam pa'i shes bya yis/ sems la 'grib par 'gyur ba dang / lus 
34.14(1): sbyangs pa dang / sems la 'byongs par shes pa la/ shes so snyam pa'i shes bya byung 
34.15(1): bas/ byang chub sems la 'grib pa dang / sems las ma byung ba'i 'dren ston 
34.16(1): gcig gzhan nas 'ong du re ba dang / 'ongs nas 'bras bu rnyed par 'dod pa'i 
34.17(1): shes bya yis/ sems la 'grib pa dang / sems ye shes kyi rgyan tshogs bsam gyis mi 
34.18(1): khyab pa'i don cha med par/ 'khrul pa'i blo yis spongs pa rnam gsum gyis sems 
34.19(1): rnyed du re ba bcas nas/ rnyed do snyam pa'i shes bya byung bas/ sems la 'grib pa 
34.20(1): dang / yul sna tshogs la shes bya sna tshogs pa bcug nas/ sems de yin par 'dod 
34.21(1): pas/ yul la shes pa 'khrul pas/ sems la 'grib pa dang / yul dang shes pa'i 
35.1(1): nus mthu las/ gnyis su 'brel pa'i nus mthu yis/ lha dang lha mor grangs med pa 
35.2(1): byung ba des/ bdag khrid nas gong ma'i gnas su phyin par shes pa'i shes bya yis/
35.3(1): sems la 'grib pa dang / bon gyi dbyings ma 'gags gsal nas/ lha yab yum 
35.4(1): gnyis kyi sprul pa las/ lhag pa'i sems bskyed nas/ de bdag dang gnyis su med 
35.5(1): par rtogs pa las/ rtogs so snyam pa'i rtog 'dzin gyis/ sems las 'grib pa 
35.6(1): dang / 'di ltar snang ba thams cad ting nge 'dzin rnam par dag pa'i dkyil 'khor 
35.7(1): du shes pas/ ting nge 'dzin gyi dkyil 'khor de na/ rig pa'i ye shes 'od kyi 'khor 
35.8(1): lo ltar gsal bar shes pa las/ shes so snyam pa'i shes bya byung bas/ sems la 
35.9(1): 'grib pa dang / sems ji ltar yin pa'i don gsal bar shes pa las/ sems las 
35.10(1): che ba byung ste/ gzhan las dpags so snyam pa'i che ba yis/ byang chub sems 
35.11(1): 'gribs pa'o/ /sgrib pa nyi shu'i dgrol thabs la/ nyon mongs pa'i sgrib pa'i rgyu gang 
35.12(1): las bskyed pa dang gcig /gang la 'grib pa dang gnyis/ sbyangs pa'i thabs dang 
35.13(1): gsum/ 'byong nas ci ltar 'gyur ba dang bzhi/ de las rgyu ni ma rig pa las byung 
35.14(1): ba'o/ /'grib pa de ni mi dang lha yi go 'phangs thob tu mi ster ba la 'grib pa'o/ /
35.15(1): sbyangs pa'i thabs ni gcig char du sbyangs pa dang / khad kyis sbyangs pa dang gnyis 
35.16(1): so/ /de las nyon mongs pa'i sgrib pa ni/ khad kyis sbyangs pa'i rgyu yin te/ gong ma 
35.17(1): ltar sems ma rtogs pa'i dbang gis/ 'khor bar ltung ba rnams la g.yang sa 
35.18(1): bskur zhing bon gyis dge sdig bshad de/ bkrid drang gi sgo nas sbyangs nas 'byongs 
35.19(1): te 'ong na/ theg pa 'og ma ba'i nang na zhib/ dper na lcags kyi sdong po la/ bya yi 
35.20(1): gshog pas rgyun du bsrings nas byug na/ chod nas 'ong ba dang 'dra'o zhes 'byung 
35.21(1): ste/ theg pa chen po 'di yis bzhed kyis ni/ khad kyis sbyong pa'i tshi chad pa'i nad du 
36.1(1): 'gyur te/ gcig char sbyang bar bya ste/ dper na mun pa'i klong du nam mkha' la nyi 
36.2(1): ma shar ba'i dus na/ ri lung dus gcig tu sa le 'ong ba dang 'dra bar na/ theg pa 
36.3(1): 'og ma ba rnams/ blo yi sgrib pa 'thugs po mun pa 'dra ba des non pa de la/ theg 
36.4(1): pa chen po'i don nyi ma shar ba dang 'dra ba'i 'od kyis/ sgrib pa thams cad dus 
36.5(1): gcig tu 'byong bar bya zhes 'byung ste/ dang por blo yi sgrib pa 'thug pos non pa de 
36.6(1): la/ dper na lug rid kyi rna bar khu byug thos pa dang 'dra ste/ ye gshen gtsug phud 
36.7(1): kyis g.yu lo 'bar ba'i sdong po'i steng nas/ 'dab chags khu byug tu sprul nas/
36.8(1): gsung lhang lhang snyan par bsgrags pa'i don/ byang chub sems kyi rig pa khu byug 
36.9(1): ces bya ba bshad las spro ba skye ru gzhugs/ de nas ye gshen gtsug phud kyis/ g.yu 
36.10(1): lung shel gyi brag phug tu/ gshen gsang ba 'dus pa la/ dgongs pa'i nyams phog 
36.11(1): pa/ byang chub kyi sems gser gyi lung non zhes bya ba/ zhag gsum dros dang bzhir 
36.12(1): bsgoms pa'i lung mnos shing 'bog /dgongs pa rnam pa lnga yis nyams bsdur/ de 
36.13(1): nas byang chub sems gsang ba gab pa dgu skor gyi/ lta ba chen pos khog dbubs/
36.14(1): man ngag gis gtan la dbabs/ gsal ba ye shes kyis thig btabs/ skye 'gags 
36.15(1): med pa'i rtsad bcad/ de yi don de la ma yengs na/ nyon mongs pa'i sgrib pa thams 
36.16(1): cad/ mun pa la sgron me btegs pa bzhin sal gyis 'gyur bar bzhed do/ /nyon 
36.17(1): mongs pa'i sgrib pa 'byong pa'i dus na/ byang chub kyi sems gsal ba'i ro myongs nas 
36.18(1): yod par yid ches pa las/ gsal lo ba'i rtog pa byung ba shes bya'i sgrib par ming 
36.19(1): btags te/ shes bya'i sgrib pa'i rgyu ci las byung ba dang gcig /shes bya'i sgrib pa 
36.20(1): gang las 'grib pa dang gnyis/ sbyangs pa'i thabs dang gsum/ shes bya'i sgrib pa 
36.21(1): 'byang ba ji ltar 'gyur ba dang bzhi'o/ /de las shes bya'i sgrib pa'i rgyu ni/ bdag 
37.1(1): dang gzhan du 'dzin pa las 'byung / sgrib pa ni bla na med pa'i 'bras bu la sgrib/
37.2(1): sbyangs pa'i thabs ni mi dmigs pa'i shes rab kyis rtsal sbyangs/ dus gcig tu 
37.3(1): sbyangs par gcad/ shes bya'i sgrib pa sbyangs pa ni/ byang chub kyi sems bde ba chen 
37.4(1): po ma g.yos pa'i ngang la gnas pa'o/ 7 /'di nas mar la ni gol sa bcu gnyis kyi 
37.5(1): skabs ston te/ spyi gcod kyi lta ba dbyings las thal te gol/ lung don gyis ma khrol 
37.6(1): te gol/ man ngag gdengs kyis ma chod de gol/ dam tshig bdag phyogs can du 
37.7(1): bsrungs te gol/ 'phrin las gza' gtad can du bcas te gol/ lam 'gro sa can 
37.8(1): du stegs te gol/ gnas snang ba'i yul la dmigs pa dang bcas te gol/
37.9(1): dgongs rgyud dregs pa can 'gyur ba med par bsgom ste gol/ ting nge 'dzin dbang 
37.10(1): po rnams kyi yul la 'phyos te gol/ nyams kyi man ngag bag chags kyi rjes su phyir 
37.11(1): nur te gol/ yid yod med gnyis la ten thog khyer te gol/ rtogs pa'i lta ba yod 
37.12(1): cing brtags pa las/ rtogs so snyam pa'i rtog 'dzin 'byung ste gol/ 7 'di nas 
37.13(1): mar ni gol sa bcu gnyis gang las gol ba ston te/ spyi gcod kyi lta ba dbyings 
37.14(1): las thal na/ sems nyid rtogs pa chen po'i don la gol/ lung don gyis ma khrol na/
37.15(1): sems nyid bde ba chen po'i don las gol/ man ngag gdengs kyis ma chod na/
37.16(1): sems nyid kho na nyid kyi thog tu ma phebs pa'i don la gol/ dam tshig bdag phyogs 
37.17(1): can du bsrungs na/ sems nyid bde ba chen po srung du med pa'i don las gol/
37.18(1): 'phrin las gza' gtad can du bcas na/ sems nyid btsal ba med par lhun 
37.19(1): gyis grub pa'i don las gol/ lam 'gro sa can du stegs na/ sems nyid bde ba 
37.20(1): chen po bgrod du med pa'i don las gol/ gnas snang ba'i yul la dmigs pa 
37.21(1): bcas na/ sems nyid ye nas btsal ba med pa'i don las gol/ dgongs rgyud 
38.1(1): dregs pa can 'gyur ba med par bsgom na/ sems nyid bde ba chen po ma g.yos 
38.2(1): pa'i don las gol/ ting nge 'dzin dbang po rnams kyi yul la 'phyos na/ sems 
38.3(1): nyid ma bcos pa de bzhin nyid kyi ting nge 'dzin las gol/ nyams kyi man ngag bag 
38.4(1): chags kyi rjes su phyir nur na// sems nyid rang rig gsal ba'i don las gol/
38.5(1): yid yod med gnyis las ten ('then )thog khyer na/ sems nyid gsal la rang 
38.6(1): bzhin med pa'i don las gol/ rtogs pa'i lta ba yod cing brtags pa las/ rtogs 
38.7(1): so snyam pa'i rtog 'dzin byung na/ sems nyid spros pa'i mtshan ma dang bral ba'i don 
38.8(1): las gol/ 7 'di nas mar la ni gol sa bcu gnyis gar gol ba ston te spyi gcod 
38.9(1): kyi lta ba dbyings las thal na/ stong pa zad pa'i mthar gol/ lung don gyis ma khrol 
38.10(1): na brtags pa'i blo can/ dpe snang don ma rig pa'i sar gol/ man ngag gdengs 
38.11(1): kyis ma chod na/ 'khrul pa'i blo can yin pas bslu ba'i sar gol/ dam tshig bdag 
38.12(1): phyogs can du bsrung na/ bdag dang gzhan du 'dzin pa'i nyon mongs pa'i sar gol/
38.13(1): 'phrin las gza' gtad can du byas na/ mtshan mar 'dzin pa byis pa'i stobs can 
38.14(1): du gol/ lam 'gro sa can du byas na/ khams gsum 'khor ba'i gnas su gol/
38.15(1): gnas snang ba'i yul la dmigs pa byas na/ ltung ba dang sdug bsngal gyi sar gol/
38.16(1): dgongs rgyud dregs pa can 'gyur ba med par bsgoms na/ gdug can srin po'i cha 
38.17(1): lugs su gol/ ting nge 'dzin dbang po rnams kyi yul la 'phyos nas dbang po ma 
38.18(1): tshang pas spyod du mi khoms par gol/ nyams kyi man ngag bag chags kyi rjes su phyir 
38.19(1): nur na/ mngal rgyud 'khor ba'i gnas su gol/ yid yod med gnyis las ten 
38.20(1): thogs khyer na/ nyi tshe ba yid kyi gzugs can du gol/ rtogs pa'i lta ba yod cing 
38.21(1): brtags pa las/ rtogs so snyam pa'i rtog 'dzin byung na/ lha tshe ring por gol/ 7 
39.1(1): 'di nas mar ni mi gol par bya ba'i thabs ston te/ byang chub kyi sems spyi rgya 
39.2(1): brlabs kyis chod pa yis/ lta ba chen po gdengs du gyur nas/ rtogs pa chen po 
39.3(1): byung pa'i dus na/ bon nyid ma g.yos pa las sems nyid ma bcos par bzhags 
39.4(1): pas/ stong dang mi stong gnyis kyi mtha' las 'das pas/ gol dang ma gol gnyis 
39.5(1): med do/ /yang na lta ba thams cad dbyings su gtugs shing / dbyings nyid ma 
39.6(1): g.yos pa las ye shes gsal bar byung ba'i don de/ rtogs pa chen po'i klong du gyur 
39.7(1): pa'i dus na/ snang stong gnyis kyi mtha' las ye nas 'das pas/ gol dang ma gol 
39.8(1): ba gnyis med do/ /byang chub kyi sems las bon gyi lung thams cad 'byung ste/ lung 
39.9(1): de dag thams cad dang dgrol ba'i thabs nyid las nyid la gsal zhing / ji ltar 
39.10(1): yin pa'i don la/ lo rgyus kyis grol ba'i thabs yin (bkrol ba'i dus na )na/ byang chub 
39.11(1): sems kyis ma khrol ba gcig kyang mi mnga' ste/ ye nas bde ba chen po'i don gtan 
39.12(1): la phebs pas/ bcings grol med par byang nas/ 'chi 'phos med par byang chub 
39.13(1): pas/ gol dang ma gol gnyis med do/ /yang na don thams cad bon nyid la 'dus 
39.14(1): par shes nas/ sems nyid ma bcos pa las de bzhin nyid kyi don gyi/ tshig gis 
39.15(1): mtshon pa'i lung thams cad/ bden pa'i don gyis khrol na/ gol dang ma gol gnyis 
39.16(1): med do/ /byang chub sems las man ngag thams cad byung ste/ sems mi nor ba'i 
39.17(1): don gdengs su chub pa'i dus na 'khrul pa ye nas mi mnga' ste/ gol dang ma gol 
39.18(1): gnyis med do/ /yang na byang chub kyi sems las bden pa'i bcud phyung nas/ tshig 
39.19(1): gis mtshon pa byas/ don gyis gtan la phabs/ man ngag gis thog tu bzhag pa'i 
39.20(1): dus na/ bden pa thams cad ye nas gtan la phebs pas/ gol dang ma gol 
39.21(1): gnyis med do/ /byang chub kyi sems la 'gal zhing 'khrul pa ye nas mi mnga' bas/
40.1(1): bsrung du med pa'i don 'byung ba'i dus na/ gdon zhing gnod pa ye nas mi mnga' 
40.2(1): ste/ ye bsrung chen por gyur pas/ gol dang ma gol ba gnyis med do/ /yang na 
40.3(1): byang chub kyi sems las blang dor mi mnga' bas/ bdag dang gzhan du 'dzin pa'i 
40.4(1): mtha' las ye nas 'das te/ bsrung du med pa'i spyi dam la gnas pas/ gol dang 
40.5(1): ma gol gnyis med do/ /byang chub kyi sems don thams cad brtsal ba med par lhun 
40.6(1): gyis grub pa'i dus na/ phrin las la gza' gtad mi mnga' ste/ 'di zhes bya ba'i 
40.7(1): mtha' las ye nas 'das pas/ gol dang ma gol ba gnyis med do/ /yang na byang 
40.8(1): chub kyi sems ye nas lhun grub chen por gyur pas/ mtshan mar 'dzin pa thams 
40.9(1): cad dang ye nas bral te/ 'di lta bu zhig gis med pa'i phyir/ gol dang ma gol 
40.10(1): gnyis med do/ /byang chub kyi sems ye nas bgrod du med pa'i don gyis/ 'gro dang 
40.11(1): mi 'gro gnyis med pa'i dus na/ ye nas gnas pa'i don rtogs pas/ gol dang ma 
40.12(1): gol gnyis med do/ /yang na byang chub kyi sems ye nas 'khor ba thams cad kyi 
40.13(1): mtha' las ye nas 'das te/ gsal ba chen po'i ngang la/ yo gal med pa'i don 
40.14(1): gyis gol dang ma gol gnyis med do/ /byang chub sems kyis bon gyi dbyings ye nas 
40.15(1): dmigs su med pa'i don rtogs pa'i dus na/ sems kyi gnas la mtho dman med 
40.16(1): pas/ gol dang ma gol gnyis med do/ /yang na bon nyid ye nas mi 'gyur ba'i 
40.17(1): gnas su/ sems nyid ma bcos pa de bzhin nyid du bzhags pas/ ltung ba'i sdug 
40.18(1): bsngal thams cad dang ye nas bral te/ gol dang ma gol gnyis med do/ /byang chub 
40.19(1): kyi sems dgongs pa zab mo yis bsam pa mya ngan las 'das pas/ g.yo zhing rtsol 
40.20(1): ba ye nas med pa'i dus na/ zhi ba chen po'i rang bzhin du gnas pas/ gol dang ma 
40.21(1): gol gnyis med do/ /yang na byang chub kyi sems zhi ba chen po'i ngang las/ gsal 
41.1(1): mi dmigs pa'i tshul gyi mnyam pa nyid kyi don ba'i ye shes rang la rang 'char te/
41.2(1): rtogs pa'i dus na/ gol dang ma gol gnyis med do/ /byang chub sems ma g.yos 
41.3(1): pa'i ngang las/ ma yengs pa'i ngang nyid byung te/ mi 'gyur ba la gsal bar rtogs 
41.4(1): pa'i dus na/ yul dang shes pa gnyis su med par rtogs pas/ gol dang ma gol 
41.5(1): gnyis med do/ /yang na bon nyid ma g.yos pa'i dbyings nas/ byang chub kyi sems 
41.6(1): de bzhin nyid du gsal ba la/ gol dang ma gol ba gnyis med do/ /byang chub kyi 
41.7(1): sems dgongs pa zab mo yi bsam pa rnam par dag ste/ nyid las nyid gsal ba'i 
41.8(1): sku nyams su dbyings kyi thig le las rig pa 'od shar nas/ gsal bar rtogs pa 
41.9(1): las/ gsal lo ba'i rtog pa med pas/ gol dang ma gol gnyis med do//yang na 
41.10(1): byang chub kyi sems nyid la nyid las nyid gsal ba'i nyams kyi man ngag gis/ skye 
41.11(1): 'gags med par yid ches/ 'du 'bral med par rtsad chod pa'i dus na/ phyin ci 
41.12(1): log la rgyu ba (nyams)mi mnga' bas/ gol dang ma gol gnyis med do/ /byang chub kyi 
41.13(1): sems gsal ba la rang bzhin med pa'i don rtogs pa'i dus na/ ye shes chen po mi 
41.14(1): 'gyur ba'i g.yung drung thob te/ gol dang ma gol gnyis med do/ /yang na mi 
41.15(1): dmigs pa la gdengs su gyur nas/ yod med gnyis kyi mtha' las 'das par 
41.16(1): gyur pas/ gol dang ma gol gnyis med do/ /byang chub kyi sems spros pa'i mtshan ma 
41.17(1): thams cad dang ye nas bral bas/ sems kyi rang bzhin nyid kyis nyid gsal bar 
41.18(1): rtogs pa las/ gsal lo ba'i rtog pa las kyang 'das te/ gsal la rtog pa rdul 
41.19(1): kyang med par gnas pas gol dang ma gol gnyis med do/ /yang na byang chub 
41.20(1): sems kyi rang bzhin dus gsum du 'dus ma byas te/ bden pa'i don la snyoms 
41.21(1): par 'jug cing / yang dag pa'i don la ma bcos par gnas pas/ gol dang ma 
42.1(1): gol gnyis med do/ /
42.2(1): 7 'di nas mar na gzigs tshad kyi skabs ston te/ ye shes spyan gyis gang 
42.3(1): la gzigs/ rig pa'i spyan gyis gang la gzigs/ thugs rje'i spyan gyis gang la 
42.4(1): gzigs/ sprul pa'i spyan gyis gang la gzigs/ shes rab spyan gyis gang la gzigs/
42.5(1): sems nyid spyan gyis gang la gzigs pa dang drug /de gang zhe na/ ye shes kyi spyan 
42.6(1): gyis yul la gzigs so/ /rig pa'i spyan gyis lam la gzigs so/ /thugs rje'i 
42.7(1): spyan gyis 'gro drug sems can la gzigs so/ /sprul pa'i spyan gyis 'phrin las 
42.8(1): thams cad la gzigs so/ /shes rab kyi spyan gyis kha dog thams cad la gzigs 
42.9(1): so/ /sems nyid kyi spyan gyis/ bon nyid kyi sku bde ba chen po la gzigs so/ /de 
42.10(1): las ye shes kyi spyan gyis yul la ji ltar gzigs she na/ khams gsum sa dgu bon 
42.11(1): nyid dbyings su gzigs pas/ bzhugs yul dam pa'i phul zhes bya/ yang na nam 
42.12(1): mkha'i dbyings dang / rgya mtsho'i tshul bzhin du/ bon nyid klong du ye shes shar bar 
42.13(1): gzigs shes bya'o/ /rig pa'i spyan gyis lam la ji ltar gzigs she na/ ma brtsal 
42.14(1): gnas na bde ba'i bzhugs yul dam pa der/ rang rig mngon du shar ba'i rig 
42.15(1): pa'i rgyal po des/ 'khor ba med par bzhugs nas bgrod pa med par gnas su 
42.16(1): phyin par gzigs pas/ gshegs shul dam pa'i phul zhes bya/ yang na 'gyur ldog 
42.17(1): med pa'i dbyings su 'then thogs med pa'i ye shes kyis/ yo gal med pa'i lam 
42.18(1): du zhugs nas/ 'gro 'dug med pa'i lam gnas na bde zhes bya'o/ /thugs rje'i 
42.19(1): spyan gyis 'gro drug ji ltar gzigs she na/ 'gro drug sems can thams cad thugs 
42.20(1): rjes bzung ba'i gnas dang / zhing du gzigs pas/ snying rje dam pa'i phul zhes bya/
42.21(1): yang na thugs rje dpag tu med pa'i spyan mig rnam par dag pa yis/ rang bzhin 
43.1(1): rgyu las bskyed pa'i sems can thams cad ni/ thugs rjes bzung nas rnam par 
43.2(1): dag ces bya/ sprul pa'i spyan gyis phrin las la ji ltar gzigs she na/ 'gyur ba med 
43.3(1): pa'i dbyings nas/ thogs pa med pa'i ye shes byung nas/ brtsal ba med par lhun 
43.4(1): gyis grub pas/ phrin las dam pa'i phul zhes bya'o/ /yang na ye nas brtsol ba med 
43.5(1): pa'i sems nyid kyis ma brtsal bde chen lhun grub rtogs pas/ thogs med ye shes 
43.6(1): mngon du gyur ces bya'o/ /shes rab kyi spyan gyis kha dog la ji ltar gzigs zhe na/
43.7(1): snang ba med pa'i bon nyid la 'byed pa med pa sems nyid kyis/ dmigs pa med 
43.8(1): par mdog bltas pas/ nam mkha'i ngog ltar mnyam par gzigs pas/ kha dog 
43.9(1): dam pa'i phul zhes bya/ yang na sems kyis sems nyid mthong tsam na/ dmigs 
43.10(1): med mkha' las mdog bltas pas/ gsal 'tsher 'od du shar zhes bya'o/ /sems 
43.11(1): nyid kyi spyan gyis bon gyi sku la ji ltar gzigs she na/ bde ba chen po sgro bskur med 
43.12(1): pa'i bon nyid la/ rnam par dag pa spangs len med pa'i sems nyid kyis/ yengs 
43.13(1): pa med pa'i spyan gyis 'gyur ba med par gzigs pas/ rtogs pa chen po'i phul 
43.14(1): zhes bya'o/ /yang na ma g.yos bon nyid sku la mi yengs sems bltas pas/ mi 'gyur 
43.15(1): thig le gcig tu gsal zhes bya'o/ /
43.16(1): 7 'di nas mar la ni dems chen po bco brgyad kyi skabs ston te/ snang srid 
43.17(1): thams cad kyi dems gang la bca'/ bon gyi sgo mo brgyad khri bzhi stong gi dems gang 
43.18(1): la bca'/ skye 'gro thams cad kyi dems gang la bca'/ ye shes thams cad kyi dems 
43.19(1): gang la bca'/ ting nge 'dzin thams cad kyi dems gang la bca'/ lam gyi dems 
43.20(1): gang la bca'/ gnas kyi dems gang la bca'/ dam tshig thams cad kyi dems 
43.21(1): gang la bca'/ sku thams cad kyi dems gang la bca'/ gsung gi dems gang la 
44.1(1): bca'/ thugs kyi dems gang la bca'/ yon tan thams cad kyi dems gang la 
44.2(1): bca'/ phrin las kyi dems gang la bca'/ lta ba'i dems gang la bca'/ spyod pa'i 
44.3(1): dems gang la bca'/ smon lam gyi dems gang la bca'/ dgongs pa'i dems gang 
44.4(1): la bca'/ 'bras bu'i dems gang la bca'/ de las snang srid thams cad kyi dems 
44.5(1): ni nam mkha' la bca'/ de ci'i phyir zhe na/ snang zhing srid pas bsdus pa thams 
44.6(1): cad byung yang nam mkha'i ngang las byung / gnas kyang nam mkha'i ngang la gnas/
44.7(1): thim yang nam mkha'i ngang la thim/ nam mkha'i rang bzhin las dus gsum du nub 
44.8(1): pa med pas/ snang srid kyi dems nam mkha' la bca' ba'o/ /bon gyi sgo mo brgyad 
44.9(1): khri bzhi stong gi dems ni/ bon nyid bde ba chen po la bca'/ de ci'i phyir zhe na/
44.10(1): bon gyi sgo mo brgyad khri bzhi stong ni/ byung yang bon nyid bde ba chen po las byung /
44.11(1): gnas kyang bon nyid bde ba chen po'i ngang la gnas/ thim yang bon nyid ngang la 
44.12(1): thim/ bon nyid bde ba chen po dus gsum du 'gyur ba med pas/ mtshan ma'i bon 
44.13(1): thams cad bon nyid bde ba chen po la bca'/ skye 'gro thams cad kyi dems byang 
44.14(1): chub kyi sems la bca'/ de ci'i phyir zhe na/ skye 'gro srog gis bsdus pa thams cad/
44.15(1): byung yang byang chub kyi sems bde ba chen po las byung / gnas kyang sems kyi ngang 
44.16(1): la gnas/ sangs kyang sems kyi ngang la rgyas/ byang chub kyi sems bde ba chen po ni/
44.17(1): dus gsum du skye 'gag med pas/ sems can thams cad kyi dems su bca' ba'o/ /
44.18(1): ye shes thams cad kyi dems/ me long lta bu'i ye shes la bca'/ de yi ci yi phyir zhe 
44.19(1): na me long lta bu'i ye shes kyis/ mi mkhyen pa mi mnga' ba/ mkhyen pa'i ye shes yin 
44.20(1): pa'i phyir na/ ye shes thams cad kyi dems me long lta bu'i ye shes la bca' ba'o/ /
44.21(1): me long lta bu'i ye shes kyis/ ma gzigs pa med pas gzigs pa chen po'i ye shes 
45.1(1): yin pa'i phyir yang dems su bca'/ me long lta bu'i ye shes kyis ma rtogs pa med 
45.2(1): pas/ rtogs pa chen po'i ye shes yin pas kyang dems su bca'/ me long lta bu'i ye 
45.3(1): shes kyis skyon thams cad ma bcom pa med pas/ 'joms pa chen po'i ye shes yin 
45.4(1): pas kyang dems su bca'/ me long lta bu'i ye shes kyi rang bzhin ni gar gsal bar 
45.5(1): gnas pa las brtag tu med pa'i phyir dems su bca'/ ye shes kyi tshogs bsam 
45.6(1): gyis mi khyab pa ngang de las ma 'gags par byung bas kyang dems su bca'/ ting nge 
45.7(1): 'dzin thams cad kyi dems ni/ de bzhin nyid kyi ting nge 'dzin la bca'/ de ci'i 
45.8(1): phyir zhe na/ de bzhin nyid kyi ting nge 'dzin las mi gsal ba med pas/ kun du snang 
45.9(1): ba'i ting nge 'dzin kyang de las 'dus pas dems su bca'/ de bzhin nyid kyi ting 
45.10(1): nge 'dzin gyi sgo 'bum 'byung bas rgyu yi ting nge 'dzin kyang de la 'dus pas dems su 
45.11(1): bca'/ de bzhin nyid kyi ting nge 'dzin la dngos po dang mtshan ma'i rdul kyang med 
45.12(1): pas/ ci yang ma yin pa'i ting nge 'dzin kyang de la 'dus pas dems su bca'/ de 
45.13(1): bzhin nyid kyi ting nge 'dzin la/ thams cad lhun gyis rdzogs pas/ yongs su rdzogs 
45.14(1): pa'i ting nge 'dzin kyang de la 'dus pas dems su bca'/ de bzhin nyid kyi ting nge 
45.15(1): 'dzin la chags pa ye nas mi mnga' bas ma chags thabs kyi ting nge 'dzin kyang de 
45.16(1): la 'dus pas dems su bca' ba'o/ /de las sogs pa'i ting nge 'dzin gyi yan lag 
45.17(1): bcu drug /de bzhin nyid kyi ting nge 'dzin la 'dus pas/ ting nge 'dzin gyi dems 
45.18(1): su bca' ba'o/ /lam thams cad kyi dems ni bgrod du med pa la bca'/ de ci'i 
45.19(1): phyir zhe na/ byang chub sems kyi lam la ye nas brtsal du med pa'i don sal gyis 
45.20(1): rtogs na/ lam zhes bya ba la 'jug cing bgrod du med do/ /'gro 'dug thams cad 
45.21(1): kyi mtha' las 'das pas/ bgrod du med pa'i lam de la dems su bca'/ gnas 
46.1(1): thams cad kyi dems ni/ mi 'gyur ba'i dbyings dmigs su med pa la bca'/ de 
46.2(1): ci'i phyir zhe na/ byang chub kyi sems 'gyur ba med pa'i dbyings su/ mi dmigs pa'i 
46.3(1): tshul gyis/ bde ba chen po'i ngang la bzhugs pas/ gnas kyi dems su bca'/ dam 
46.4(1): tshig sa ma ya 'bum sde'i dems ni/ ye bsrungs chen po la bca'/ de ci'i phyir zhe na/
46.5(1): byang chub kyi sems la 'gag zhing dogs pa ye nas med do/ /blangs dor mi mnga' 
46.6(1): ba'i phyir/ ye bsrungs chen po bsrung du med pa'i spyi dam la bca'/ sku thams cad 
46.7(1): kyi dems 'gyur ba med pa la g.yung drung gi sku la bca'/ de ci'i phyir zhe na/ sems 
46.8(1): can thams cad kyi gzugs la 'chi 'phos yod kyang / byang chub kyi sems la 'gyur 
46.9(1): ba med pa g.yung drung gi sku thob pa la/ skye 'gags dang 'chi 'phos med pa'i phyir 
46.10(1): dems su bca'/ gsung thams cad kyi dems/ rang bzhin med pa la bca'/ de 
46.11(1): ci'i phyir zhe na/ sems can thams cad kyi skad sgra ru grags pa la 'gags pa yod 
46.12(1): do/ /byang chub kyi sems bde ba chen po rang bzhin med pa'i gsung ni/ dus gsum 
46.13(1): du mi 'gags pas gsung gi dems su bca'o/ /thugs thams cad kyi dems/ mnyam 
46.14(1): nyid 'khrul pa med pa la bca'/ de ci'i phyir zhe na/ ma rtogs pa thams cad bdag 
46.15(1): dang gzhan du 'dzin pa dang / phyin ci log la 'khrul pa ste/ byang chub kyi sems 
46.16(1): thugs nyid rnam par dag pa ni/ mnyam nyid 'khrul pa med pa'i gdengs su gyur 
46.17(1): pas thugs kyi dems su bca'/ yon tan thams cad kyi dems/ legs pa kun 
46.18(1): nas 'byung ba'i tshogs ma 'gags par kun la snyoms pa la bca'/ de ci'i phyir zhe 
46.19(1): na/ ma rtogs pa 'khor ba la gnas pa rnams kyi/ yon tan phra mos kun las snyoms 
46.20(1): par mi 'grub cing / phun sum tshogs pa ma yin no/ /byang chub sems bde ba chen 
46.21(1): po'i yon tan ni/ legs pa thams cad 'byung ba'i tshogs ye nas ma 'gags pas/
47.1(1): snang srid yongs la snyoms pa'i phyir yon tan gyi dems su bca' ba'o/ /phrin las 
47.2(1): thams cad kyi dems brtsal ba med par lhun gyis grub pa la bca'/de ci'i phyir 
47.3(1): na/ sems can gyi las brtsal ba dang ma bral bas/ grub cing zin pa med la/ byang 
47.4(1): chub kyi sems bde ba chen po rtogs pa'i dus nas/ phrin las thams cad rtsol ba 
47.5(1): med par lhun gyis grub nas/ zin dang ma zin pa gnyis su med pas 'phrin las 
47.6(1): kyi dems su bca'/ lta ba thams cad kyi dems rtogs pa chen po la bca'/ de ci'i 
47.7(1): phyir zhe na/ sems can 'khrul pa'i blo dang ldan pa rnams sha yi mig dang ma bral 
47.8(1): bas/ sangs rgyas pa'i 'bras bu ni mi mthong mi rtogs te/ byang chub kyi sems spyi 
47.9(1): rgya rlabs kyis gcod pa'i byin rlabs kyis/ rtogs pa chen po'i gdengs su gyur 
47.10(1): pa'i dus na/ sangs rgyas pa'i 'bras bu gsal bar rtogs te/ mthong ba dang ma 
47.11(1): mthong ba gnyis su med pa'i phyir/ lta ba'i dems su bca'o/ /spyod pa thams cad kyi 
47.12(1): dems rnam par dag pa la bca'/ ci'i phyir na/ sems can 'khor ba la gnas pa 
47.13(1): rnams/ spyod pa rnam par ma dag pas/ bag chags kyi rjes su zhugs nas/ 'khor 
47.14(1): ba la longs spyod 'dogs te// byang chub kyi sems la spyod pa thams cad ye nas 
47.15(1): rnam par dag go /spyod dang mi spyod gnyis su med pas spyod pa'i dems su bca' 
47.16(1): 'o/ /smon lam thams cad kyi dems ni/ re dogs med pa la bca'/ ci'i phyir na/
47.17(1): sems can rnams ni/ ga shed nas ston pa zhig byon nas/ des khrid nas bde ba'i 
47.18(1): gnas gcig tu 'gro ba 'am/ de ma 'ongs na mi phyin gyi dogs pa las sogs te/ re 
47.19(1): dogs gnyis su bcas pas/ yang dag pa'i 'bras bu thob par mi 'gyur te/ byang 
47.20(1): chub kyi sems bde ba chen po re smon thams cad dang bral bas/ brtsal du med 
47.21(1): pa'i dbyings su re dogs med par sangs rgyas pas dems su bca'o/ /dgongs pa 
48.1(1): thams cad kyi dems ni/ ma g.yos pa'i ngang la ma yengs pa la bca'/ de ci'i phyir 
48.2(1): na/ ma rtogs pa dgongs pa dang mi ldan pa rnams ni/ yid g.yo zhing 'khrul par 
48.3(1): byed de/ sems can gyi las la g.yengs nas yang dag pa'i 'bras bu la 'gribs te/
48.4(1): sems bde ba chen po rtogs pa'i dus na/ dgongs pa zab mo ma g.yos pa'i ngang 
48.5(1): las/ gsal la ma yengs par bzhugs pas/ sangs rgyas pa'i 'bras bu lag 'chang 
48.6(1): thob ste/ de yi phyir na dgongs pa'i dems su bca'/ 'bras bu thams cad kyi dems 
48.7(1): ni/ yang dag par rdzogs pa'i sangs rgyas la bca' ste/ de ci'i phyir na/ bla na med 
48.8(1): pa yang dag par sangs rgyas pa la/ skye 'gags med pa'i phyir na yang dems su 
48.9(1): bca'/ mtha' las 'das pa'i phyir yang dems su bca'/ dus gsum du 'gyur ba 
48.10(1): med pa'i phyir yang dems su bca'/ 'bras bu thams cad lhun gyis rdzogs pa'i phyir 
48.11(1): yang dems su bca' ba'o/ /
48.12(1): 7 'di nas mar la ni gzer bu nyi shu rtsa gcig gi skabs ston te/ 'chor ba med 
48.13(1): pa g.yung drung gi gzer chen po bdun dang / 'du 'bral med pa ye shes kyi gzer 
48.14(1): bu chen po bdun dang / nyams nga med pa don gyi gzer chen po bdun dang / nyi shu 
48.15(1): rtsa gcig go /'chor ba med pa g.yung drung gi gzer chen po bdun gang zhe na/ byang 
48.16(1): chub kyi sems stong zhing bdag med par rtogs pa'i dus na/ snang srid thams cad 
48.17(1): nam mkha'i dbyings nas 'chor ba med pa g.yung drung gi gzer chen btab ste/ snod 
48.18(1): de las 'chor ba'i dogs pa med/ byang chub kyi sems khyab bdal chen po'i ye shes 
48.19(1): dang ldan par rtogs nas/ bon gyi sgo mo brgyad khri bzhi stong dang / bon gyi dbyings 
48.20(1): nas 'chor ba med par/ g.yung drung gi gzer btab ste/ dbyings de las 'chor 
48.21(1): ba'i dogs pa med/ byang chub kyi sems skye ba med par gdod nas dag pas/ skye 
49.1(1): 'gro thams cad sems kyi dbyings nas 'chor ba med pa g.yung drung gi gzer chen 
49.2(1): po btab ste/ ngang de las 'chor ba ru dogs pa med/ byang chub kyi sems ye nas 
49.3(1): bde ba chen po dang ldan pas/ don dam pa'i 'bras bu 'chor ba med de/ g.yung 
49.4(1): drung gi gzer chen btab/ byang chub kyi sems ye nas de bzhin nyid kyi ting nge 
49.5(1): 'dzin dang ldan pas/ yon tan gyi tshogs thams cad 'chor ba med pas/ g.yung 
49.6(1): drung gi gzer chen po btabs pas 'chor du dogs pa med/ byang chub kyi sems ye 
49.7(1): nas dgongs pa zab mo dang ldan pas/ lhun gyis grub pa'i 'phrin las la 'chor ba 
49.8(1): med pas/ g.yung drung gi gzer chen btab pas/ 'chor du dogs pa med/ byang 
49.9(1): chub kyi sems la rmad du byung ba'i gtsug mi 'gyur bas/ phyogs bcu thams cad kyi 
49.10(1): 'od 'chor ba med pas/ g.yung drung gi gzer chen btab pas 'chor du dogs pa 
49.11(1): med/ 7 'du 'bral med pa ye shes kyi gzer bdun ni/ byang chub kyi sems ye shes 
49.12(1): rig pa'i spyan dang ldan pas/ lam thams cad dang 'du 'bral med pa ye shes kyi 
49.13(1): gzer ro/ /byang chub sems mnyam pa nyid kyi don dang ldan pas/ bon nyid dang 
49.14(1): sems nyid la 'du 'bral med de/ ye shes kyi gzer ro/ /byang chub kyi sems kun 
49.15(1): gzhi ma g.yos pa'i klong nas/ gsal ba ye shes kyi 'od nyid las nyid shar bas/
49.16(1): kun gzhi dang rig pa 'du 'bral med pas/ ye shes chen po'i gzer ro/ /byang chub 
49.17(1): kyi sems dbyings dang ye shes gnyis su med par sal gyis rtogs pas/ thabs 
49.18(1): dang shes rab la 'du 'bral med de ye shes kyi gzer ro/ /byang chub kyi sems ngang 
49.19(1): las ma g.yos pa la/ ngang nyid ma bcos par gnas pas/ ngang dang rang bzhin 
49.20(1): 'du 'bral med de ye shes chen po'i gzer ro/ /byang chub kyi sems ye nas gsal 
49.21(1): ba'i ye shes kyi tshogs ma 'gags par nyid la nyid shar bas/ mi g.yo ba dang ma 
50.1(1): yengs pa la 'du 'bral med de/ ye shes chen po'i gzer ro/ /byang chub kyi sems 
50.2(1): mtshon pa mya ngan las ye nas 'das pas/ yang dag pa dang bden pa chen po la 
50.3(1): 'du 'bral med pas/ ye shes chen po'i gzer ro/ /nyam nga ba med pa don gyi gzer 
50.4(1): bu bdun ni/ 'gyur ba med pa'i dbyings nas/ thogs pa med pa'i ye shes rtsal sbyong 
50.5(1): ba la/ nyam nga ba med de/ dbye yi mi phyed pa'i phyir na/ don gyi gzer chen no/ /stong 
50.6(1): pa chen po'i dbyings nas/ gsal ba chen po'i ye shes rtsal sbyong ba la/ nyam nga med 
50.7(1): pa de/ dbye yis mi phyed pa'i phyir don gyi gzer chen no/ /skye ba med pa'i dbyings 
50.8(1): nas/ ma 'gags pa'i ye shes la rtsal sbyong ba la/ nyam nga ba med de/ dbye yis mi 
50.9(1): phyed pa'i phyir na/ don gyi gzer chen no/ /mi dmigs pa'i dbyings nas/ cir yang 
50.10(1): gsal ba'i ye shes la rtsal sbyong ba la/ nyam nga ba med de/ dbye yis mi phyed pa'i 
50.11(1): phyir na/ don gyi gzer chen no/ /rang bzhin med pa'i dbyings nas lhun gyis rdzogs 
50.12(1): pa'i ye shes rtsal sbyong ba la/ nyam nga ba med de/ dbye yis mi phyed pa'i phyir na/ don 
50.13(1): gyi gzer chen no/ /mtshan ma med pa'i dbyings nas/ gsal ba'i 'od dang ldan pa'i 
50.14(1): ye shes rtsal sbyong ba la/ nyam nga ba med de/ dbye yis mi phyed pa'i phyir na/ don gyi 
50.15(1): gzer chen no/ /yongs su rgya ma chad pa'i dbyings nas/ gtsug mi 'gyur ba'i ye 
50.16(1): shes rtsal sbyong ba la/ nyam nga ba med de dbye yis mi phyed pa'i phyir na/ don gyi gzer 
50.17(1): chen no/ /'on tang na g.yo ba med pa'i dbyings nas/ ma bcos pa'i ye shes nyid 
50.18(1): las nyid shar gsal zhes bya'o/ /
50.19(1): 7 'di nas mar ni tha snyad med pa'i skabs ston te/ yongs sems kyi dbyings 
50.20(1): nas/ rig pa'i bcud shar ba las/ thams cad ma lus pa kun las rang bzhin 
50.21(1): yongs kyis gsal/ thams cad gsal ba med pa'i mtha' las 'das/ rang bzhin 
51.1(1): med pas yod pa'i mtha' las 'das/ gnyis su med pas so so'i mtha' las 'das/
51.2(1): 'das pa'i bon las ye nas bshad du med/ dngos po mtshan ma yongs dang bral 
51.3(1): ba yis/ rtag ces bya ba'i tha snyad ye nas sems la med/ 'gyur med g.yung drung 
51.4(1): bon gyi sku thob pas/ chad ces bya ba'i tha snyad ye nas sems la med/ gzugs 
51.5(1): 'dzin yul las ye nas 'das pa yis/ snang zhes bya ba'i tha snyad ye nas sems la 
51.6(1): med/ thig le dbyings nas ye nas rdzogs pa yis/ stong zhes bya ba'i tha snyad ye nas 
51.7(1): sems la med/ snang med dpe las ye nas 'das pa yis/ yod ces bya ba'i tha snyad 
51.8(1): ye nas sems la med/ ye shes 'od du ye nas gsal ba la/ med du dogs pa'i 
51.9(1): tha snyad ye nas sems la med/ skye med gdod nas ye nas dag pa yis/ skye ba'i tha 
51.10(1): snyad ye nas sems la med/ 'chi med skyes snang brtsan du gyur pa yis/ 'gags 
51.11(1): ces bya ba'i tha snyad ye nas sems la med/ ye shes ngang la ye nas gnas pa yis/
51.12(1): sgom zhes bya ba'i tha snyad ye nas sems la med/ ma brtsal lhun gyis ye nas grub 
51.13(1): pa yis/ sgrub ces bya ba'i tha snyad sems la ye nas med/ rtogs pa chen po'i phul 
51.14(1): du phyin pa yis/ lta ba'i tha snyad sems la ye nas med/ 'gal du dogs pa ye nas 
51.15(1): med pa yis/ bsrungs zhes bya ba'i tha snyad sems la ye nas med/ bcing bgrol 
51.16(1): gnyis kyi mtha' las ye nas 'das pa yis/ snang zhes bya ba'i tha snyad ye nas sems 
51.17(1): la med/ man ngag gdengs dang ye nas chas pa yis/ gol zhes bya ba'i tha snyad 
51.18(1): ye nas sems la med/ yang dag bden pa'i don la ye nas gnas pa yis/ sgro 
51.19(1): bskur bya ba'i tha snyad sems la ye nas med/ thig le nyag gcig ma ru gyur pa 
51.20(1): yis/ gzhan dbang bya ba'i tha snyad ye nas sems la med/ ye shes 'od du ye nas 
51.21(1): gsal ba yis/ sgrib ces bya ba'i tha snyad sems la ye nas med/ stobs chen shugs 
52.1(1): kyis ye nas byung ba yis/ ma grub bya ba'i tha snyad sems la ye nas med/ shes rab 
52.2(1): gsal ba'i sa la gnas pa yis/ 'khrul zhes bya ba'i tha snyad sems la ye nas med/
52.3(1): bzod thob bde chen mchog tu gyur pa yis/gdon zhes bya ba'i tha snyad sems la 
52.4(1): ye nas med/ yod med rtag chad mtha' las ye nas 'das pa yis/ 'di zhes bya 
52.5(1): bar gdags pa'i tha snyad ye nas sems la med/ nam mkha'i ngogs bzhin ye nas 
52.6(1): gnas pa yis/ kha dog dbye ba'i tha snyad sems la ye nas med/ khyab bdal ye shes 
52.7(1): 'od du rdzogs pa yis/ phyogs mtshams bya ba'i tha snyad sems la ye nas med/ thig 
52.8(1): le'i ngang las ye nas mnyams pa yis/ so sor gdags pa'i tha snyad sems la ye 
52.9(1): nas med/ 'das pa chen por ye nas gyur pa la/ mtshon cing brjod du de las ga 
52.10(1): la yod/
52.11(1): 7 'di nas mar ni rtsol ba dang bral ba'i skabs ston ste/ snang zhing srid pa 
52.12(1): thams cad nam mkha'i dbyings su rtsol ba dang bral bas/ bon can mtshan mar 
52.13(1): snang ba thams cad/ bon nyid kyi dbyings su rtsol ba dang bral/ skye 'gro thams cad 
52.14(1): byang chub kyi sems kyi dbyings su rtsol ba dang bral/ phung po lnga rnam par shes pa 
52.15(1): dbyings su rtsol ba dang bral/ rnam par shes pa'i tshogs brgyad kun gzhi rnam par 
52.16(1): shes pa'i klong du rtsol ba dang bral/ ye shes lnga stong pa nyid kyi ye shes kyi dbyings su 
52.17(1): rtsol ba dang bral/ sku lnga g.yung drung mi 'gyur ba'i dbyings su rtsol ba dang bral/ skye 
52.18(1): mched bcu gnyis skye ba med pa'i dbyings su rtsol ba dang bral/ khams bco brgyad 
52.19(1): yid kyi rnam par shes pa'i khams su rtsol ba dang bral nas/ thams cad nas thams 
52.20(1): cad du dbyings dag pas ma g.yos par rtsol ba dang bral/ 'ong ting na 'gags 
52.21(1): pa med pa'i dbyings su gsal ba ye shes kyi thig btabs pa las g.yo rtsol med de/
53.1(1): lung las kyang yangs zhing rgya che nam mkha'i rang bzhin can/ gting dpag brtags 
53.2(1): dka' rgya mtsho'i phra rab rdul/ yon tan kun 'byung rin chen phung po 'dra/ bon nyid 
53.3(1): mtshan ma med pa'i dbyings su/ sems nyid shes rab gsal ba'i thig btab/ ye 
53.4(1): shes g.yo zhing rtsol ba med/ thig le'i dbyings na rang 'byung mngon sangs rgyas/
53.5(1): zhes bya ste/ ma g.yos pa'i dbyings nas ma bcos pa ma nor ba'i thig 'debs pa 
53.6(1): las/ g.yo zhing rtsol ba med pas gsal ba'i thig 'di gdab par bya'o/ /ye nas mi

53.18(1): 'byams pa'i dbyings su/ ma chags thabs kyi thig btab pa la/ ye nas g.yo zhing

53.21(1): grub pa'i thig btab pa la/ ye nas g.yo zhing rtsol ba med de/ mtshan ma dang bral 
54.1(1): ba'i dbyings su/ mngon par byang chub pa'i thig btab pa la/ ye nas g.yo zhing

54.4(1): ba'i thig btab pa la/ ye nas g.yo zhing rtsol ba med/ bde ba chen po'i dbyings su/
54.5(1): de bzhin nyid kyi thig btab pa la/ ye nas g.yo zhing rtsol ba med de/ de yi phyir na 
54.6(1): snang srid g.yo rtsol dang bral ba ni/ dbus dang mtha' la mi gnas pas/ bon can

54.9(1): nas/ ye shes chen po nyid la nyid gsal ba la/ g.yo zhing rtsol ba med ces bya'o/ /
54.10(1): 7 'di nas mar na bcos su med pa'i skabs ston te/ kun gzhi nam mkha' ltar 
54.11(1): yongs su rgya ma chad pas/ gsal ba'i ye shes khyab bdal du shar ba la/ ye nas

54.14(1): ye shes spongs len med pa nyid las nyid gsal ba la/ ye nas bcos su med/ kun

102.10(1): dmigs su med pa'i sgrar 'bru tig ste ngos bzung ngo / /phrag dog spangs nas yangs 
102.11(1): pa lhag mi mthong zhes bya ba/ 'bru las bcar ste bshad na/ phrag dog ni gnyis par 
102.12(1): 'dzin zhing mi shong ba'i sgrar/ spangs nas ni dog pa med par bya ba las/ bor du 
102.13(1): med pa'i sgra/ yangs ni kun dang 'byor zhing mthun pas/ dga' bar spyod pa'i sgra/
102.14(1): lhag mi mthong ni sems kyis sgo yangs par bsgoms pa'i sgra/ ji ltar kyang sems su 
102.15(1): gsal ba'i sgra 'bru tig ste ngos bzung ngo / /de rtogs mi rtogs khyad par can zhes 
102.16(1): bya ba/ 'bru la bcar te bshad na/ de ni gong ma nyid kyi sgra/ rtogs ni bon ma nor 
102.17(1): pa la gsal btab pa'i sgra/ mi rtogs phyin ci log tu lta ba'i sgra/ khyad par che ba ni/
102.18(1): mi mnyam pa'i sgrar 'bru tig ste ngos gzung ngo / /de la mi rtogs 'grib ni zhes bya 
102.19(1): ba/ 'bru la gcar te bshad na/ de na sems de ka nyid kyi sgra'o/ /la ni don de las 
102.20(1): gnas pa'i sgra/ mi rtogs pa ni/ don la mi nye ba'i sgra/ sgrib pa ni/ sems mthong du 
102.21(1): mi ster ba'i sgrar 'bru tig ste ngos gzung ngo / /rgyu lnga'i snying po phyin ci log ces bya ba/
103.1(1): 'bru la bcar te bshad na/ rgyu ni 'byung bar byed pa'i sgra/ lnga ni rgyu lnga'i nus pa mthu 
103.2(1): bsdom pa'i sgra/ snying po ni dug lnga smin cing rgyas pa'i sgra/ phyin ci log ni/ ngan song 
103.3(1): gsum du kha phyir stong pa'i sgrar 'bru tig ste ngos bzung ngo / /ma rtogs pa ni lcags 
103.4(1): bas dam zhes bya ba/ 'bru la bcar te bshad na/ ma rtogs pa ni/ don ma shes pa'i 
103.5(1): sgra/ lcags ni sra la mkhregs pa'i sgra/ dam pa ni lcags 'jug pa ltar/ dbye yis mi 
103.6(1): phyed pa'i sgrar 'bru tig ste ngos bzung ngo / /rtogs na de ni dgos pa'i mchog ces 
103.7(1): bya ba/ 'bru la bcar te bshad na/ rtogs pa ni don gsal ba'i sgra/ dgos pa ni/
103.8(1): dgos ched yod pas med du mi 'dod pa'i sgra/ mchog ni gong na med par ces pas 
103.9(1): 'bru tig ste ngos gzung ngo / /
103.10(1): dang por lcags btsal mkhan po 'gug ces bya ba/ 'bru las bcar te bshad na/
103.11(1): dang por nas/ yon tan dang don la 'jug par snga ma'i sgra/ lcags ni dpe'i sgra/
103.12(1): btsal ba ni gzhan na yod sgra/ mkhan po ni ston par byed pa'i sgra/ 'gugs pa ni 
103.13(1): spyan drangs pa'i sgrar 'bru tig ste ngos gzung ngo / /de nas gyong 'dul mthar yang bya 
103.14(1): zhes bya ba/ de ni phyir 'ong pa'i sgra/ gyong pa ni rang kha ma'i sgra/ gdul ba ni gnyen po 
103.15(1): byung ba'i sgra/ mthar ni legs par bcos pa'i sgra/ bya ni gyis bsgrubs pa'i sgra 'bru 
103.16(1): tig ste ngos gzung ngo / /de nas sgo lcags gzhug par bya zhes bya ba/ 'bru la bcar 
103.17(1): te bshad na/ de nas ni rjes su 'jug pa'i sgra/ sgo lcags ni/ rdzu 'phrul gyis byed 
103.18(1): pa'i sgra 'bru tig ste ngos bzung ngo / /kun bzang gsang mdzod sgo lcags lnga zhes bya 
103.19(1): ba/ 'bru la bcar te bshad na/ kun bzang ni yongs dang mthun zhing dgos pa'i 
103.20(1): sgra/ gsang mdzod ni dgongs pa phyal bar mi gtong ste sbas pa'i sgra/ sgo lcags sba ni/
103.21(1): rig lnga ru gyur pa'i sgra/ byang chub sems gsal me long lnga zhes bya ba/ 'bru las 
104.1(1): bcar te bshad na/ byang ba ni ston pas dris pas bcos su med pa'i sgra/ chub pa ni 
104.2(1): don yongs su 'dus pas 'pho 'jugs med pa'i sgra/ sems ni de yi ngang las gnas 
104.3(1): pa'i sgra/ gsal ba la ni ma bsgribs pas mthong pa'i sgra/ me long ni bdag zhal 
104.4(1): bdag gis lta ba'i sgra/ lnga pa ni lta stang lnga yis sgrar 'bru tig te ngos gzung ngo / /sku 
104.5(1): dang 'phrin las lngar yongs rdzogs ces bya bar 'bru la bcar te bshad na/ sku ni 
104.6(1): 'gyur ba med pa'i sgra/ dang ni gzhan yod pa'i sgra/ phrin las ni mdzad du yod pa 
104.7(1): la zin pa med pa'i sgra/ lngar kyang ni/ don so sor rtogs la gsal ba'i sgra/ rdzogs 
104.8(1): pa ni don yongs su shes pa'i sgrar 'bru tig ste ngos gzung ngo / /byang chub sems lnga 
104.9(1): de bzhin ces bya bar/ 'bru la bcar te bshad na/ byang ba ni bcings grol med 
104.10(1): pa'i sgra/ chub pa ni 'chi 'phos med pa'i sgra/ sems ni phyal bar ma songs pa'i sgra/
104.11(1): lnga ni don lngas bstan pa'i sgra/ de bzhin gsal la ma g.yos pa'i sgrar 'bru tig ste 
104.12(1): ngos gzung ngo / /ye shes lnga yang de nyid do ces bya ba/ 'bru las ye ni ye nas yod 
104.13(1): pa'i sgra/ shes ni don de gsal ba'i sgra/ lnga ni don lnga ma nor ba'i gsal ba'i sgra/
104.14(1): yangs ni 'og ma min pa'i sgra/ de nyid do ni dug lnga ye shes su gsal ba'i sgrar 'bru 
104.15(1): tig ste ngos gzung ngo / /ye shes lnga kun bzang bde chen lnga la chibs ces pas bya ba/
104.16(1): 'bru la bcar te bshad na/ kun bzang ni thams cad la khyab par mkhyen pa'i sgra/
104.17(1): bde chen ni mi bde ba'i dgra med pas las/ yongs su khyab pa'i bdal pa'i sgra/ lnga 
104.18(1): las chibs pa ni/ kun tu bzang po cig las/ rigs pas kyis kun tu bzang po bya 
104.19(1): ba de las/ gzhan nas btsal la mi dmigs su med pa'i sgrar 'bru tig ste ngos 
104.20(1): gzung ngo / /de 'byed lde mig stor gyur na ni/ chags kyis sgrib srid pa'i gnas sgrar 
104.21(1): 'bru tig ste ngos gzung ngo / /thabs shes rab bral ba yin zhes bya ba/ 'bru las 
105.1(1): bcar te bshad na thabs med pa'i ngan song gsum nas thar par dka' ba'i sgra/
105.2(1): shes rab ni 'khrul pa med par shes pa'i sgra/ bral ba ni 'khrul pa med pa'i don 
105.3(1): btsal gyis mi rnyed sgra/ yin ni de ltar nges pa'i sgrar 'bru tig ste ngos gzung ngo / /
105.4(1): nyon mongs pa tha rams sngon po dam zhes pa/ 'bru la bcar te bshad na/ nyon 
105.5(1): mongs pa ni bdag dang gzhan du 'dzin pas/ sdug bsngal gyi la gzhi skyed pa'i sgra/
105.6(1): tha rams ni bcing pa de bkrol dka' ba'i dpe/ sngon po ni nyon mongs pa'i dpe/
105.7(1): lcags las blangs pa'i sgra/ dam pa ni nyon mongs pa'i dbang du gyur nas don gyi mi 
105.8(1): khrol ba'i sgrar 'bru tig ste ngos bzung ngo / /de 'byed 'phrul gyi lde mig stor zhes bya 
105.9(1): ba/ 'bru la gcar te bshad na/ de thugs rje rdzu 'phrul ye nas med cing ma phrad pa'i 
105.10(1): sgra 'bru tig ste ngos bzung ngo / /de nas man chad ni nyon mongs pa lnga la 'khrul pa 
105.11(1): dang drug ni/ gong du 'bru las bcar te bshad nas/ bshad du ma mchis so/ /tha 
105.12(1): rams dang lde mig kyang gong du bshad de ma mchis so/ /btang snyoms ces bya ba/
105.13(1): 'bru la bcar te bshad na/ btang na sems kyis don rgyud phyal bar btang pa'i sgra/
105.14(1): snyoms pa ni don las snyoms pa la zhugs nas/ phyi shol du gtong ba'i sgrar 'bru tig 
105.15(1): ste ngos bzung ngo / /sdug bsngal zhes bya ba/ 'bru las bcar te bshad na/ sdug pa 
105.16(1): ni mi bde bas bzod pa'i glags med pa'i sgra/ bsngal la ni sbyangs pa'i la yun ring 
105.17(1): pa'i sgrar 'bru tig ste ngos bzung ngo / /rtog 'dzin zhes bya ba/ 'bru las bcar te 
105.18(1): bshad na/ rtog pa ni yul tha dad med pa las 'du shes las 'jugs pa'i sgra/
105.19(1): 'dzin pa de ni las phan gnod du bzungs ba'i sgrar 'bru tig ste ngos bzung ngo / /
105.20(1): shugs med ces pas bya ba/ 'bru las bcar te bshad na/ shugs chen ni bskyod pa 
105.21(1): 'grub par byed pa'i sgra/ med pa ni rtsal zhan pa dang shugs chung ba'i sgrar 'bru tig 
106.1(1): ste ngos bzung ngo / /spyod pas ces bya ba/ 'bru la bcar te bshad na 'phrin ni bya 
106.2(1): bar 'dod pas sgra/ las ni zin pa med pa'i cing lhun gyis grub pa'i sgra 'bru tig ste 
106.3(1): ngos bzung ngo / spyod pa ces bya ba/ 'bru las bcar te bshad na/ don ma yin pa 
106.4(1): dang phyin ci log gi las la 'jug sgrar 'bru tig ste ngos bzung ngo / dam tshig ces bya 
106.5(1): bas/ 'bru la bcar te bshad nas/ dam pa ni ston pa'i bka' dam du nos pa'i sgra/

106.8(1): bdag las rnam par 'tshe zhing rgol ba po yis sgra/ tshogs ni de lta bu mang du 'byung

106.13(1): tig ste ngos bzung ngo / /'khor ba ni zhes bya ba/ 'bru las bcar te bshad na/

106.15(1): ngos bzung ngo / /g.yo rtsol zhes bya ba/ 'bru la bcar te bshad na/ g.yo ba ni nyon

106.21(1): kyang zhes bya ba/ 'bru la bcar te bshad na nyes pa ni sems log par ma rtogs

110.1(1): mngon sprul pa zhes pas/ 'bru las bcar te bshad na/ mngon pa ni sha yi mig gis 
110.2(1): mthong ba'i sgra/ sprul pa ni mi mthun pa las mang po la bya ba ni byed pa'i sgrar 'bru 
110.3(1): tig ste ngos bzung ngo / /rnam rtog ces bya ba/ 'bru la bcar te bshad na/ rnam 
110.4(1): rtog ni sems nyon mongs pa rnams kyis sel longs pas/ mi bden pa'i yid 
110.5(1): g.yos pa'i sgrar 'bru tig ste ngos bzung ngo / /de yan chad ni/ nyon mongs pa rnams 
110.6(1): la/ 'bru las bcar te ngos bzungs ba bstan pa'o/ /'di nas mar ni byang chub 
110.7(1): kyis sems gab pa dgu skor gyi nang nas/ gnyen po'i ye shes pa rnams 'bru la 
110.8(1): bcar te bshad pa ston te/ de btsal las ni 'di zhes bya ba/ de ni sems de bzhin 
110.9(1): nyid las/ gnyen po'i ye shes las 'byung ba'i sgra/ btsal ba ni ma rtogs par bya 
110.10(1): ba'i sgra/ 'di ni nyon mongs pas mngon par bsdams pa'i sgra/ dbye ba ni nyon 
110.11(1): mongs pa de dag don gyis bkrol bar bya ba'i sgra/ 'bru tig ste ngos bzung ngo / /
110.12(1): thugs rje zhes bya ba las/ 'bru la bcar te bshad nas/ thugs rjes ni thugs ma 
110.13(1): g.yos pa'i ting nge 'dzin la 'gro ba sems can gyi rjer gyur nas/ kun las skyobs 
110.14(1): pa'i sgrar 'bru tig te ngos bzung ngo / byams pa las sogs te lnga ni/ gong du 'bru 
110.15(1): las bcar te bshad par zad pa/ shes rab ces pa dang / 'bru la bcar te bshad 
110.16(1): na/ shes rab ni 'khrul pa med par rab ces pa shes pa'i sgrar 'bru tig ste ngos

110.18(1): las ni don myur du sgrub pa'i sgra// 'grus pa ni yengs pa med pa la sgra 'bru tig ste 
110.19(1): ngos bzung ngo / /bde ba zhes bya ba/ 'bru las bcar te bshad na/ bde ba ni skyid 
110.20(1): pa chen po g.yung drung gi lhun la gnas pa'i sgrar 'bru tig ste ngos bzung ngo / bde 
110.21(1): ba zhes bya ba/ 'bru las bcar te bshad na/ bde ba ni skyid pa chen po lta ba ni 
111.1(1): sems kyis sems mthong bas rtogs pa rang bzhin gyis rta zhi ba'i sgra 'bru tig ste 
111.2(1): ngos bzung ngo / /stobs chen zhes bya ba la/ 'bru la bcar te bshad na/ stobs chen 
111.3(1): ni sems kyis mthu stobs nyon mongs pa zil gyis mnan nas/ g.yung drung gi sa 
111.4(1): non pa'i sgra 'bru tig ste ngos bzung ngo / lhun grub ces bya ba/ 'bru la bcar te 
111.5(1): bshad na/ lhun grub ni sems kyi don la thams cad bya zhing brtsal du med pa'i sgrar 
111.6(1): 'bru tig ste ngos bzung ngo / /rnam dag ces bya ba/ 'bru la bcar te bshad na/
111.7(1): rnam dag ni rnam pa gang gi sgo nas kyang / sems las bag chags kyi ma gos pa'i 
111.8(1): sgrar 'bru tig ste ngos bzung ngo / /ye bsrung zhes pa/ 'bru la bcar ste bshad na/
111.9(1): ye bsrungs ni sems la ye nas 'gal zhing dog pa med pas/ gang yang bsrung du 
111.10(1): med pa'i sgrar 'bru tig ste ngos bzung ngo / /bzod pa ces bya ba/ 'bru las bcar te
