121.19(1): byin gyis brlabs kyis bshad cing bstan/ des kyang phal dang phal gyi thun mong ma 
121.20(1): yin pas/ 'ga' dang 'ga' la bstan cing / bshad pa'o/ /bar du nub ste ma 
121.21(1): grags pa gcig lags so/ /thun mong ma yin pa dgu ni spyi gzhung dang mthun 'di 
122.1(1): ni sgo gtsegs so/ /'di yi bzhed kyi ni thun mong ma yin pa lngas ston te/ de gang zhe 
122.2(1): na/ seng ge dkar mo'i 'o ma khams snod so ma btang gi thun mong ma yin/ yid 
122.3(1): bzhin nor bu ser sna can gyi thun mong ma yin/ gnyis med ngang la gnas pa'i 
122.4(1): dgongs pa bdag phyogs can gyi thun mong ma yin/ mi rtog brtag tu med de rtog pa 
122.5(1): can gyi thun mong ma yin/ thugs kyi brnags pa gser gyi lung mnan dad pa chung 
122.6(1): ba'i thun mong ma yin pa dang lnga'o/ /dbu yi 'chad byang che ba'o/ /byang chub sems 
122.7(1): gser gyi lung mnan gyi 'chad byang che ba bstan pa'o/ /
122.8(1): 7 ci nas kyang don ma bcos pa'i steng du bzhags pa'i tan tra las/ nam mkha' 
122.9(1): ni ye nas yod pa las/ de cis kyang don ma bcos pas ni/ dpe ma bcos bcos 
122.10(1): su med pa'i ces bya la/ de bzhin du bon nyid bde ba chen po yang / ye nas yod pa 
122.11(1): las ma bcos te/ de cis kyang bcos rgyu med pa la bcos su mi 'dod pas ni/ ma 
122.12(1): bcos bcos su med ces bya'o/ /de bzhin du bon nyid kun gzhi byang chub sems 
122.13(1): kyang / ye nas yod pa de las ma bcos te/ de cis kyang bcos rgyu med la bcos su 
122.14(1): mi 'dod pas ni/ ma bcos bcos pa med ces bya la/ de lta bu'i steng du bzhag pa 
122.15(1): dka' bas na/ ci nas kyang don ma bcos pa'i steng du bzhag par dka' zhes bya'o/ /
122.16(1): dka' ba rnam pa bcu gsum gyi sgo nas ces pa/ lung las kyang dka' ba ma spyad sla 
122.17(1): bar 'ong mi srid/ gyen cig ma 'dzegs thur cig yang mi srid/ zhes khan te ma byas 
122.18(1): mngar po 'ong mi srid/ sgo nas ma zhugs phug tu phyin mi srid/ ngang gis ma bsgoms 
122.19(1): 'bras bu thob mi srid/ zhes 'byung ste dka' ba rnam pa bcu gsum gyi sgo nas 'jug 
122.20(1): cing bsgom par bstan pa'o/ /don gyi 'bras bu ces pa/ don gyi 'bras bu la yang 
122.21(1): gsum ste/ de gang zhe na/ sku mi 'gyur ba g.yung drung dbyings kyi 'bras bu dang /
123.1(1): gsung rang bzhin med pa'i 'bras bu dang / thugs mnyam nyid 'khrul pa med pa'i 
123.2(1): 'bras bu dang gsum mo/ /de btsal ba'i thabs ni/ cir yang ma bcos pa'i ngang la/
123.3(1): mi dmigs pa'i tshul gyis rig pa rgyun chags su gsal btab ste de las mi 'da' 
123.4(1): ba ni/ btsal ba'i thabs yin no/ /ma ngag gi yang ma ngag chen po ces pa/ ma ngag 
123.5(1): la mang na/ gong ma'i don de ka nyid mnyam (mnyan )nam spyad na/ ma ngag ka na de 
123.6(1): yin te/ de na dpag gis mi dpogs par che ba'i yon tan yod pas ni/ ma ngag 
123.7(1): gi yang ma ngag chen po zhes bya'o/ /dgongs pa'i yang dgongs pa zab mo ces pa/
123.8(1): dgongs pa la yang mang na/ gnyis su 'dzin pa med pa'i don la dgongs/ spros pa'i 
123.9(1): mtshan ma dang bral ba'i thig le nyag gcig gi don la dgongs pas dgongs pa'o/ /
123.10(1): zab pa ni de lta bu'i don nam mkha' dang 'dra ste gting dpag mi chod pas zab 
123.11(1): mo'o/ /chu srin ces pas dper na sems can chu srin gyi rgyal ba zhes bya ba zhig /rgya 
123.12(1): mtsho chen po'i gting na gnas te/ mi rnams kyis rgya mtsho chen po de la/ go sna tshogs 
123.13(1): ni gon/ gru dang gzings ni bcas/ un zhes bya ba dung pho mo ni rol du khrid nas/
123.14(1): yid bzhin gyi nor bu las sogs te/ rin po che sna mang du drangs nas 'gro ba de/
123.15(1): dus (dung )dang bral 'am (ba'am )chu srin gyis mthong nas/ dus gcig tu myid nas 
123.16(1): gtong bas slar mi 'ongs pa'o// /rgya mtsho ces pa/ rgya mtsho'i gting du gser gyi pha 
123.17(1): bong sra brtan slum zhes bya ba de shor ram 'dril nas/ slar kha ru 'thon nas 'ong mi 
123.18(1): srid pa dang 'dra bar na/ gong ma'i dgongs pa zab mo de rtogs sam rigs na/ bon 
123.19(1): nyid kyi klong du sems nyid thim nas/ slar 'khor ba la ldog mi srid pa la bya'o/ /su 
123.20(1): la mi smra ces pa/ gong ma'i dgongs pa zab mo de ni/ dig pa'i tshul 'am/ chu mkhur 
123.21(1): bar blugs pa ltar las/ bdag gyer zhing 'di bsgom mo zhes smrar mi btub pa la 
124.1(1): bya'o/ /bsgom pa ni bon nyid ma g.yos pa la/ sems nyid ma bcos par bzhag pa 
124.2(1): la bya'o/ /de bzhin ma byas ces pa/ ma rtogs pa rnams 'di ltar bsam mo/ /'di 
124.3(1): ltar bsgom mo zhes smra ba de ni/ dgongs pa zhal thon byed/ phyag rgya bca' las yal/
124.4(1): snying po brjod nas digs zhes bya ste/ shel tshwa rlan shor ga pur rdzi phyar ltar yal bar 
124.5(1): 'gyur zhes bya'o/ /yid la bag chags nas bsgom nas 'bras bu chud mi za ces pa/
124.6(1): yid la ci ltar bag chags la bsgoms zhe na/ tshig tu mi brjod don la bsdus/ ji 
124.7(1): ltar bsdus zhe na/ ngang ring bar lung brnan/ ting nge 'dzin la btang snyoms mi bya/
124.8(1): las rnam pa gsum gyi sgo nas 'jug /bslu ba po'i bag chags yid la brnags la 
124.9(1): bsgom/ de yi don la yengs ba med na/ 'bras bu g.yung drung gi snying po thob par 
124.10(1): 'gyur te/ 'bras bu chud mi za'o/ /ltad mo ces pa/ ci ltar lta zhe na/ mi 'gyur sku la 
124.11(1): ma bsgribs ye shes lta/ bltas pas bdag sems bdag gis mthong / mthong bas mi 
124.12(1): gsal ci yang med/ kun ka gsal bas rtogs pa chen po'i phul zhes bya'o/ /rol mo 
124.13(1): ni ces pa/ don dam par rang shes rig gi rgyal po/ byang chub kyi sems bde ba chen 
124.14(1): po nyid las/ rol mo bsam gyis mi khyab pa cig 'byung pa bas/ de nyid la rol na 
124.15(1): dga' la/ longs spyod ni bon nyid zad pa med pa'i don de rtogs na/ longs spyod 
124.16(1): kyang dga' bder btar (ster )ba la bya'o/ /bdag zhal ces pa/ don dam par 
124.17(1): byang chub kyi sems gsal zhing rtogs pa'i dus na/ 'di ltar snang ba thams cad/
124.18(1): sgyu ma'i rang bzhin du gsal te/ de ltar gsal tsam nyid na/ sgyu ma de la bdag 
124.19(1): chags shing zhen par mi 'gyur ba bya'o/ /don dam ces pa/ don dam par sems la 
124.20(1): tshig gi yan lag mang du drangs nas bshad pas/ don thams cad ni sems nyid 
124.21(1): bde ba chen po la 'dus so/ /'dus pa'i don de ma nor bar sal gyis gsal ba 
125.1(1): gsal lo ba'i rtog pa las kyang bde bar rtogs pa de ni/ mi bde ba med de 
125.2(1): ni bde ba/ sdug bsngal med de ni skyid pa/ ma tshang pa med de ni phun sum 'tshogs 
125.3(1): pa'o/ /thig le ces pa/ thig ni dgongs pa gsal la mi nor ba yin/ le ni bdal 
125.4(1): pa chen por gnas pa yin/ gcig ni bgrang du med pa yin/ bzhag pa ni mi 'gyur 
125.5(1): ba yin/ mtshan ma yongs dang bral ba ni/ gong ma'i don rtogs tsam nyid na/ spros 
125.6(1): pa'i mtshan ma yongs dang bral ba/ chags pa ni rdul phra rab kyang med pas ni/ thig 
125.7(1): le gcig la bzhag na mtshan ma yongs dang bral zhes bya'o/ /gshen lha 'od dkar gyi 
125.8(1): brnags pa ces pa/ man ngag 'di ni kun gyi thun mong ma yin pa'i phyir na/ thugs 
125.9(1): las brnags pa yin pas kyang brnag pa'o/ /rtogs shing sgom pa nyung nas ma bstan/
125.10(1): thugs la brnags pa'i phyir yang brnag pa'o/ /dkon la dmar bar bya ba'i phyir 
125.11(1): thugs la brnags pas kyang brnag pa'o/ /'di'i don la brnags nas bsgoms 
125.12(1): na 'bras bu gdengs thob pa yin pa'i phyir na yang / thugs kyi brnags pa zhes 
125.13(1): bya'o/ /byang chub sems gser gyi lung brnan rdzogs so/ /'di nas lung brnan gyi 
125.14(1): nang nas/ dbu ston pa la dbyings nas bzhugs pa nas/ tha ma brnags pa gnyis 
125.15(1): kyi sna bzhugs bstan pa lags te/ lung log pa/ don gcus pa/ man ngag gab pa 
125.16(1): lags so/ /sgo gud du sbas/ su la yang ma bstan pa yin/ thang gcig khrims sde la 
125.17(1): yang gsang ngo / /lung ma brnan par btang na dam tshig nyams pa yin/ 'ga' la 
125.18(1): ston 'chad byang chung ngus rdzogs so/ /zhu sgom gshen rgyal la/ me sgom gnam grags 
125.19(1): kyis zhus so/ /bkra shis so/ /
125.20(1): 7 ston pa dbyings na bzhugs pa'i gshen lha 'od dkar la/ bdag gi ting 
125.21(1): 'dzin yid kyis phyag 'tshal bstod/ u ya kha tham/ man ngag 'di ni phal gyi thun 
126.1(1): mong ma yin pa/ ri rab lhun po bas ni byin che la bkur lci/ rgya mtsho'i mching rnam 
126.2(1): pas ni gting ring la brtags dka'/ rtsi tog gi snying po mar khu bas ni btung 
126.3(1): dka' la khong snying / dreg pa can gyi chu rdo bas ni 'dred la 'byil/ yid bzhin gyi 
126.4(1): nor bu rin po che bas ni dkon la btsal dka'/ lha gnyen gyi shel sgong bas ni 
126.5(1): gces la btsal dka'/ u dum wa ra'i me tog bas ni 'byung bar dkon/ gser 
126.6(1): gyi rus sbal bas ni mthong bar dka'/ bar snang gi mkha' la 'dug pa bas kyang 
126.7(1): g.yang sa che/ lha yi bu mo yid 'phrog bas kyang bslu ba po'i kha 'dren mang / nyi zer 
126.8(1): gyi rdul che bas kyang mtshan ma'i 'byung 'jug mang / nam mkha'i mtshan nyid bas 
126.9(1): kyang nyams su blangs pa'i drod tshad bzung par dka'/ ci nas kyang don ma bcos 
126.10(1): pa'i steng du bzhag par dka' ba zhig lags te/ dka' ba rnam pa bcu gsum gyi sgo 
126.11(1): nas don gyi 'bras bu btsal ba'i thabs 'di ni/ man ngag gi yang man ngag chen po/
126.12(1): dgongs pa'i yang dgongs pa zab mo yang dag pa yin te/ 'di ni chu srin rgyal ba'i 
126.13(1): gre bar nor bu rin po che chud pa'am/ rgya mtsho'i gting du gser gyi rdo ba bor ba 
126.14(1): ltar su la mi smra kha tham rang gis sgom/ de bzhin ma byas pa 'phyar la g.yeng na 
126.15(1): dngos grub yal bar 'gyur/ yid la brnags nas bsgom na 'bras bu chud mi za/
126.16(1): ltad mo sems la bltas na kun mthong rtogs pa'i phul/ rol mo dbyings su rol na 
126.17(1): longs spyod dga' bder btang / bdag zhal bdag gis mthong na gzhan mthong sgyu 
126.18(1): mar gsal/ don dam sems la bsdus na bde skyid phun sum 'tshogs/ thig le 
126.19(1): gcig la bzhag na mtshan ma yongs dang bral zhes 'byung ste/ gshen lha 'od dkar 
126.20(1): gyi brnags pa man ngag gser gyi lung non nang nas/ klad rgyang don tshig bka' 
126.21(1): stsal pa'o/ /'di nas mar ni gshen lha 'od dkar gyi thugs yang dag pa'i brnags 
127.1(1): pa/ 'bras bu chud mi za bar bya ba'i nges don 'di ni/ phyi rabs gshen po las dag 
127.2(1): pa rnams la ston te/ e ma ho/ gang skyes bu dag las 'phro dang skal par ldan pa 
127.3(1): zhig/sems mi 'gyur ba g.yung drung gi 'bras bu 'di bsgom par 'dod na/ dka' 
127.4(1): ba rnam pa bcu gsum po 'di spyod cing bsgom par bya ste/ de la dka' ba spyod pa'i 
127.5(1): dang po ni/ ri rab lhun po bas ni byin che la bkur dka' ba'i tan tra las/ dang 
127.6(1): po gshen lha 'od dkar gyi thugs rjes byin gyis brlabs kyis bshad cing bstan nas/
127.7(1): gshen tshad med 'od ldan gyis nam mkha'i dbyings 'od gsal gyi gnas su dka' 
127.8(1): ba spyad cing bsgoms/ de nas 'phrul gshen snang ldan gyis ri rab kyi zom la dka' 
127.9(1): ba spyad cing bsgoms/ de nas ye gshen gtsug phud kyis/ g.yu lung shel gyi brag 
127.10(1): phug tu dka' ba spyad cing bsgoms te/ de yan chod ni ting nge 'dzin la ting nge 
127.11(1): 'dzin gyis bstan cing bsgoms pas lung ma mnan no/ /lung mnan nas sgom pa 
127.12(1): slob pa'i dbong (dang )po ni/ 'chi med gtsug phud kyis/ gsang ba 'dus pa la 
127.13(1): zhag gsum dros bzhi ru dgongs pa nyams gyi man ngag byin nas/ lung phog cing 
127.14(1): mnan te/ dgongs pa la 'jug pa'i las dka' ba rnam pa gsum bslab ste/ theg 
127.15(1): pa rim pa dgu gang gi sgo nas 'jugs kyang rung ste/ lus kyi las su phyag rgya dka' 
127.16(1): ba bslab pa dang gcig /ngag gi las su snying po dka' ba spyad pa bslab pa dang 
127.17(1): gnyis/ yid kyi las su ting nge 'dzin dka' ba la bslab pa dang gsum mo/ /de 
127.18(1): nas ri rab lhun po bas kyang byin che la bkur lci ba dgu bstan cing dbog ste/ yi 
127.19(1): dam gyi lha gshen lha 'od dkar ye shes ston pa zhes bya ba/ mi mngon pa'i dbyings 
127.20(1): nas spyan drangs nas/ mdun gyi bar snang la bzhag ste de ni byin che la bkur lci 
127.21(1): ba'o/ /dam tshig gi lha rang shes rig gi rgyal po byang chub kyi sems/ she thun mang 
128.1(1): wer gyi dbus su 'od kyi sku nas tsam shel kang ka ri'i mdog 'dra ba bstan cing 
128.2(1): dbogs te/ byin che la bkur lci ba'o/ /las kyi lha gang byed pa'i gtso bo gnyis med 
128.3(1): lhag pa'i khyad par las bskyed nas/ las kyi bdag por gzhag pa de ni/ byin che la 
128.4(1): bkur lci ba'o/ /yang na 'dren par byed pa'i slob dpon yi dam lha dang 'dra ste/
128.5(1): byin che la bkur lji'o/ /dam tshig gser gyi gnya' shing la dam tshig gi lha dang 'dra 
128.6(1): ste/ byin che la bkur lci ba'o/ /dngos grub 'phrul gyi yi ge las kyi lha dang 'dra ste/
128.7(1): byin che la bkur lci'o/ /yang na phyag rgya lha yi sku yin te/ lha yi sku yi byin che la/
128.8(1): bkur lci'o/ /snying po lha yi gsungs yin te/ lha yi gsung ni byin che la bkur lci'o/
128.9(1): ting nge 'dzin lha yi thugs yin te/ lha yi thugs ni byin che la bkur lci'o/ /rgya mtsho'i 
128.10(1): mching rnam pas kyang gting ring la brtags dka' ba'i tan tra las/ bon nyid 
128.11(1): bde ba chen po'i klong rgya mtsho dang 'dra ba las/ bon gyi sgo mo brgyad khri bzhi stong chu 
128.12(1): bo dang 'dra ba 'byung ba de ni/ gting ring la brtags dka' ste/ de las yang rgyu yi 
128.13(1): bon bzhi 'bras bu'i bon bzhi ste brgyad ni/ chu bo bzhi chu bran bzhi ste brgyad dang 
128.14(1): 'dra ba la/ rgyu 'bras gnyis las la bzla ba'i theg pa chen po ni rgya mtsho chen po dang 
128.15(1): 'dra ba'o/ /de yang don du chu bo dang chu bran thams cad kyang / byung yang rgya mtsho 
128.16(1): chen po'i nang nas byung la/ slar la yang rgya mtshor thim pa dang 'dra ste rgyu 'bras kyi 
128.17(1): theg pa brgyad kyang byung yang khyad par chen po'i theg pa las byung / thim yang de nyid 
128.18(1): la thim ste/ rtogs nas de yang sems la 'dus pa'o/ /de las theg pa de dgu ka la 
128.19(1): bsgom pa gting ring la brtags dka' ba re re yod de/ gang zhe na/ ma tang phya 
128.20(1): gshen pa ni blo yi (mo bla'i )rgyal po dkyil phu wer las kyi lha ru spyan drangs nas 
128.21(1): mtshan ma la bsgom pa yang / gto sum brgya drug cu dang / dpyad brgyad khri bzhi 
129.1(1): stong rgya mtsho dang 'dra ste gting ring la brtag dka'o/ /snang gshen pa ni/ gar 
129.2(1): gsas btsan po las kyi lha ru spyan drangs nas/ mtshan ma la sgom pa yang / gyer sgo 
129.3(1): chen po bzhi nas 'jug cing skad cong dgus bsgyur nas/ snang srid kyi cho rabs 
129.4(1): bsam gyis mi khyab pa 'byung ba ni/ rgya mtsho dang 'dra ste gting ring la brtag dka' 
129.5(1): 'o/ /'phrul gshen pa ni dbal gsas rngam pa las kyi lha ru spyan drangs nas/ mtshan

129.7(1): mtsho dang 'dra ba ste gting ring la brtags dka' ba'o/ /srid gshen pa ni/ 'dul 
129.8(1): gsas rma bo las kyi lha ru spyan drangs nas/ mtshan ma la sgom pa yang shi thabs sum 
129.9(1): brgya drug cu dang 'dul bsgom ('dur sgo )chen po bzhi ni rgya mtsho dang 'dra ste/ gting 
129.10(1): ring la brtag dka'o/ /dge bsnyen pa ni/ lha kun shes 'phrul gyi rgyal po las kyi lha 
129.11(1): ru spyan drangs nas/ mtshan mas mtshan ma med pa'i don btsal nas sgom pa yang /
129.12(1): dka' ba bzhi dang dag pa gnyis dang / rnyed pa gsum ste dgu ni rgya mtsho dang 'dra 
129.13(1): ste gting ring la brtag dka'o/ /gshen gyi drang srong pa ni/ g.yung drung tshe yi rgyal po 
129.14(1): las kyi lha ru spyan drangs nas/ mtshan mas mtshan ma med pa'i don btsal nas sgom 
129.15(1): pa yang / spang pa bcu dang spyad pa bcu dang / mtshon pa gnyis dang / sbyangs pa

129.17(1): gshen gyi a dkar ba ni/ khro bo chen po mkha' 'gying kha las kyi lha ru spyan drangs 
129.18(1): nas/ mtshan mas mtshan ma med pa'i don btsal nas sgom pa yang / bsgrub pa'i 
129.19(1): yan lag bco brgyad dang / bsnyen pa sgo dgu ni rgya mtsho dang 'dra ste/ gting ring la 
129.20(1): brtag dka'o/ /ye gshen pa ni g.yung drung ye dbang gi rgyal po las kyi lha ru spyan 
129.21(1): drangs nas/ 'jug pa rnam bzhi dang / ting nge 'dzin gyi yan lag bcu drug dang /
130.1(1): rtags drug ni rgya mtsho dang 'dra ste/ gting ring la brtag dka'o/ /khyad par chen po 
130.2(1): ba ni/ yi dam gyi lha dang las kyi lha dang / dam tshig gi lha gsum ni/ don dam pa'i 
130.3(1): lha gcig las 'dus par mdzad nas/ mi dmigs pa nyid bsgom pa de ni/ ye nas 
130.4(1): yin pa'i don las ma bcos pa ste/ rgya mtsho chen po dang 'dra ste gting ring la 
130.5(1): yongs su brtag dka'o/ /rtsi tog gi snying po mar khu bas ni btung dka' ba la khong 
130.6(1): snying ba'i tan tra las/ theg pa bdun mar bor na/ ye gshen pa'i theg pa la zhugs 
130.7(1): la/ sems kyi 'bras bu btsal dgos pa de ni/ rtsi tog gi snying po mar khu bas kyang 
130.8(1): btung ba dka' la khong bsnying ste/ gang zhe na/ dang por chags pa med pa'i sems 
130.9(1): dang ldan par bya ba'i 'du shes 'jug pa dka' ste/ lung mnan la chags par byed 
130.10(1): pa'i yid 'dul/ de nas dben par nges pa'i gnas su sa bzung la 'dug par 
130.11(1): dka' ste/ lung mnan la 'gro bar ltogs (sdog )pa'i lus gdul/ de nas dgos 
130.12(1): par spyad par bya ba'i nor dang zas la chog shes skyed pa'i bsran dka' ste/ lung 
130.13(1): mnan la 'dod pa skye ba'i yid gdul/ de nas bag chags nges (ngan )pa la rjes su 
130.14(1): rgyu ba'i blo mi 'byung bar bya ba'i thabs dka' ste/ lung mnan la bag chags ngan 
130.15(1): pa'i blo gdul/ de nas rtse gcig tu dad pa la skyo nges med pa'i ngang bsring bar 
130.16(1): dka' ste/ lung mnan la skyo bar byed pa'i 'du byed gdul/ de nas nyams sod 
130.17(1): par byed pa'i bag chags (bgegs )la 'dzin rtog med par thag bcad par bya ba'i 
130.18(1): thabs dka' ste/ lung mnan la rnam rtog ldang ba'i yid gdul/ de nas las rnam 
130.19(1): pa gsum la yid gzhung zhing / g.yeng ba med par thang chod par dka' ste/ lung 
130.20(1): mnan la yengs par byed pa'i 'du byed gdul/ de nas zhi gnas dang lhag mthong 
130.21(1): gnyis kyis khad snyom zhing gcig gis dbang du mi btang ba'i tshad gzung ba dka' 
131.1(1): ste/ lung mnan la ldang dub kyi yid gdul/ de nas gzhan las dpags so snyam 
131.2(1): pa'i shes bya mi 'byung par bya ba'i don la gnas par dka' ste/ lung mnan la shes 
131.3(1): so snyam pa'i shes bya gdul lo/ 7 /'di nas mar ni/ dreg pa can gyi chu rdo bas 
131.4(1): ('gred la 'byil ba'i tan tra las/ sems kyi yid bzung la lung mnan te bsgoms pa ston te/ de la 
131.5(1): yid ni chu rdo bas/) kyang 'gred la 'byil bas gzung bar rab tu dka'o/ /de yang 
131.6(1): sems ma rtogs pa'i dus na ni/ sems kyis yid gzungs par dka' ste/ de dka' 
131.7(1): ba'i dpe ni ci 'dra zhe na/ sems ni nam mkha' 'dra la/ yid ni sprin 'dra/ nyon 
131.8(1): mongs pa can gyi yid ni rlung 'dra ste/ sprin la rlung gis bskyod pa'i tshe na/ g.yo zhing 
131.9(1): 'khrugs par byed (pa dang 'dra ba na/ yid la yang nyon mongs can gyi yid kyis bskyod pa'i tshe na 
131.10(1): yang / g.yo zhing 'khrug par byed )do/ /de la rlung ma zhi ba'i bar du sprin la 'dug yul 
131.11(1): med pas gzung gis ma zin no/ /dpe de bzhin du nyon mongs pa can gyi yid ma 
131.12(1): thul na/ yid kyi rnam par shes pa 'dug yul med pas/ chu rdo bas kyang 'gred la 
131.13(1): 'byil bas/ gzungs par rab tu dka'o/ /de bzung ba'i thabs ni/ 'di ltar snang 
131.14(1): ba thams cad sems thig le nyag gcig tu rtogs par bya'o/ /de ltar rtogs tsam 
131.15(1): nyid nas/ bdag dang gzhan du 'dzin pa med pas nyon mongs pa can gyi yid med 
131.16(1): cing mi snang ngo / nyon mongs pa can gyi yid med na ni/ yid kyi rnam par shes pa ni/
131.17(1): sems kyi rang bzhin du 'gyur ro/ /de bas na nyon mongs pa can gyi yid la lung 
131.18(1): yang nas yang du mnan te/ bdag dang gzhan du 'dzin pa med par byas la/ nyon 
131.19(1): mongs pa can gyi yid gdul lo/lo/ /sems rtogs pa'i dus na ni/ yid bzungs pa'i 
131.20(1): lung mnan par sla ste/ nyon mongs pa can gyi yid med pas/ yid kyi rnam par shes 
131.21(1): pa ni rta 'dra/ rang rig pa'i sems ni mi 'dra ste/ rta la mis zhon nas bskyod na 
132.1(1): gar yang phyin la/ bzhags na gnas na 'dug dang 'dra ste/ don dam par rang gi 
132.2(1): sems nyid rtogs na/ sems cir yang ma g.yos pa ni sems nyid yin la/ sems 
132.3(1): las rig pa shar nas cir yang gsal ba ni/ yid kyi rnam par shes pa'o/ /de bas 
132.4(1): na sgom pa gang la 'jug kyang rung ste/ dang por sems mnyam pa la bzhag dgos 
132.5(1): te/ mnyam pa la bzhag pa'i dus su/ mi mnyam pa'i rtog pa gang ldang yang rung ste/
132.6(1): sems thig le nyag gcig gi ngang las bsdus la lung mnan zhing bsgom mo/ /yang 
132.7(1): yid chu rdo bas 'gred cing 'byil te/ gzungs bar dka' na yang / sems nyid 
132.8(1): nam mkha' ltar ma g.yos par bzhag pas/ nam mkha'i klong du rlung zhi ba ltar ltem 
132.9(1): gyis 'gro'o/ /de ni rang 'byung rang zhi kho nar bzhag go /yang sems kyis yid 
132.10(1): bzung ste/ mnyam pa la bzhag nas lung mnan zhing bsgom pa'i dus na/ dbang po 
132.11(1): drug yul so so'i rjes su 'breng ba snyam du tshor na/ ji ltar snang ba thams cad las 
132.12(1): sems su snang bar mkhyen pa'i dgongs pas/ dbang po'i sngun chod pas/ nyi ma 
132.13(1): dang zer gyi tshul du slar sems la 'dus par lung mnan la bsgom mo/ 7 /'di 
132.14(1): nas mar ni yid bzhin gyi nor bu rin po che bas kyang dkon la btsal dka' ba'i 
132.15(1): tan tra las/ sems kyi btsal thabs kyi lung non ston te/ dper na yid bzhin gyi 
132.16(1): nor bu rin po che de yang / dkon pa btsal dka' ste/ 'jig rten gyi gnas bde ba 
132.17(1): can re re na/ yid bzhin gyi nor bu re re gnyis gnyis las med par dkon te/ de 
132.18(1): bzhin du sems nyid rin po che 'di rtogs pa yang / 'jig rten gyi gnas bde ba 
132.19(1): can re re nas/ 'ga' dang zung las mi 'byung ngo / btsal dka' ba ni yid bzhin 
132.20(1): gyi nor bu rin po che de yang / sbyin pa'i bdag po las dag pa 'ga' yis rnyed pa 
132.21(1): las kun gyis rnyed par mi 'gyur ro/ /de bzhin du sems 'di yang ma rtogs pa 
133.1(1): las rtogs par bya ba 'am/ ma rnyed pa las rnyed par bya ba ni/ sngon tshe gong nas 
133.2(1): sbyong sbyong ba/ las 'phro dang skal par ldan pa 'ga' tsam gyis btsal bas rnyed pa 
133.3(1): las/ blo yis sgrib pa 'thug po mun pa 'dra bas non pa rnams kyis ni btsal kyang 
133.4(1): rnyed par mi 'gyur ro/ /de la gang zhig las 'phro dang ldan pas btsal ba'i thabs 
133.5(1): ni/ sems nyid stong par brtag la btsal ba dang gcig /sems nyid snang bar 
133.6(1): brtag la btsal ba dang gnyis/ sems nyid snang la rang bzhin med par brtag la 
133.7(1): btsal ba dang gsum/ sems nyid snang stong mtha' las 'das par brtag la

133.9(1): med par brtag la btsal ba dang drug /sems nyid gnyis ka ma yin par brtag la 
133.10(1): btsal ba dang bdun/ sems nyid gzhi ma brtag pa nyid du bzhag la btsal ba dang

133.12(1): med par gzhag pa dang dgu'o/'o/ /de las sems nyid gzhi ma rtogs pa'i dus na ni/

133.14(1): byang chub kyi sems bde ba chen po ni/ ye nas dngos po dang mtshan ma rdul kyang 
133.15(1): med pas/ nam mkha' ltar stong zhing bdag med par bsgom pas/ bag chags kyi 
133.16(1): mthu brtas pa'i dbang gis/ mtshan ma thams cad la zhen pa'i bag chags thams 
133.17(1): cad mi snang par gyur te/ mtshan ma'i shas ni je chung je chung 'gro la/ mtshan ma med 
133.18(1): pa'i shas ni je che je che 'gro bar 'gyur ro/ /de ltar gyur tsam nyid na ni/ gzhi ma 
133.19(1): skyes pa skye ba med pa'i byang chub kyi sems rnyed pa'o/ /sems nyid snang bar brtag

134.1(1): bar gsal te/ byang chub kyi sems ye nas ma 'gags pas/ mi 'gyur ba'i sku la ma

134.14(1): man ngag gdengs dang chas pa rgyu 'bras mi bslu ba'i nges don dang ldan pa'i sems

134.18(1): chub kyi sems rnyed pa'o/ /sems nyid gnyis ka ma yin pa'i don brtag la btsal ba

134.21(1): mnyam pa nyid gnyis su med par bsgoms pas/ gnyis med ngang la mnyam pa'i

135.16(1): ni lha btsan po dang / sman gnyen mo gnyen gyis/ 'byung ba lnga yi drod snyams nas 
135.17(1): 'tshos/ btsa' bar dka' ste ni/ grang pa'i sems can rnams ni de las skyabs tshol 
135.18(1): du 'ong / dro ba'i sems can rnams ni de la bsil snyogs du 'ong / gzugs sdug pa

136.1(1): ru 'ong ba ni btsa' bar dka' 'o/ /de bzhin du sems 'di yang rnyed nas btsa'

140.17(1): las rang bzhin cha lugs kyi phyag rgya lnga dang mi 'bral bar bsgom mo/ /ngag rang 
140.18(1): bzhin med pa yin no ba'i lung phog pa'i dus su/ lung log par gol nas/ ngag 
140.19(1): sgom pa la ma g.yel na/ de ni sems bying rmugs kyi dbang du 'gyur te/ de ni lkugs 
140.20(1): pa kha med dang kha 'dar gling 'thom gyi gnas su ltung bar nges so/ /de ni lung las 
140.21(1): kyang / snying po brjod med don med mi tshig can/ kha med lkugs pa mun pa'i gling 
141.1(1): 'thom ni/ kha 'dar lcags kyi spu gris rang las gcod zhes 'byung ste/ de ni snying po 
141.2(1): ma brjod pa'i skyon gyis tshe gcig la kha med lkugs pa gcig tu skye zhing ltung ngo / tshe 
141.3(1): gcig la bsgom pa'i sar mi tshig la yengs pa'i skyon gyis/ bdud yas po kha 'dar 
141.4(1): bya ba/ kha nas lce phyung pa lcags kyis spu gri rnon po cig tu byas nas rang lus la rang 
141.5(1): bcad cing za ba zhig tu skye bar nges so/ /de bas na 'dzab dang snying po chu bo'i rgyun 
141.6(1): bzhin mi 'chad par bzlas so/ /sems ye rtogs chen po nyid yin no ba'i lung phog 
141.7(1): pa'i dus su/ lung log par go na/ yid sems bsgom pa la g.yel na/ de ni snying po 
141.8(1): sems 'phyar la g.yeng ba'i dbang du 'gyur te/ de ni dbang po ma tshang pas spyod pa 
141.9(1): mi khoms pa'i gnas su ltung bar nges te/ lung las kyang / ting 'dzin mi bsgoms 
141.10(1): mtshan ma gzhan la yengs/ dmu long dang ni 'on dig bsnyon las sogs/ zha grum 
141.11(1): glen pa lta bu'i sdug bsngal che zhing 'byung te/ de ni ting nge 'dzin mi gsal ba'i skyon 
141.12(1): gyis dmu long 'thoms pa dang gsang ba 'on chen dang / lce med ye lkugs/ sna 
141.13(1): 'gags 'dzes 'chen (mdzer can )dang / basmyo 'bogs dang / zha grum dang / glen 
141.14(1): pa lta bur ltung zhing skye nges so/ /de bas na ting nge 'dzin rnam pa gsum gzhu bdung 
141.15(1): ba bzhin du thang chod pa la sgoms shing / rang bzhin cha lugs kyi phyag rgya lnga dang ma 
141.16(1): bral bar bsgom na/ 'gyur ba med pa g.yung drung gi sku thob par nges so/ /'dzab 
141.17(1): dang snying po chu bo'i rgyun bzhin ma chad par bzlas na/ rang bzhin med pa'i gsung 
141.18(1): yang dag pa'i 'bras bu 'thob par 'gyur ro/ /ting nge 'dzin gzhu bdung ba bzhin 
141.19(1): du thang chod par bsgom na/ mnyam pa nyid 'khrul ba med pa'i thugs yang dag pa'i 
141.20(1): 'bras bu thob par 'gyur ro/ 7 /'di nas mar ni lha yi bu mo yid 'phrog ma bas 
141.21(1): kyang bslu ba po'i kha 'dren pa mang ba'i tan tra las/ bslu ba rnam pa gsum gyis ma 
142.1(1): tshugs par bya ba dang / nyams sod dbang du bsdu ba'i lung non ston te/ dper na 
142.2(1): lha yi bu mo gzhan gyi yid 'phrog ma zhes bya ba de ni/ bzang sdug la 'od chags pas/
142.3(1): lha ma srin sde brgyad kun 'dod chags spyod par 'dod nas/ sprul pa bsam gyis mi 
142.4(1): khyab pa byed cing / bslu ba po'i kha 'dren pa mang du 'ong ba dang 'dra ste/ gang skyes 
142.5(1): bu dag g.yung drung gi snying po la gshegs pa'am/ sangs rgyas pa'i 'bras bu thob 
142.6(1): par 'dod pa zhig /gnas dben par bzhugs nas bsgom na/ yid kyi bslu ba po 
142.7(1): dang bar du gcod pa'i nyams sod pa 'ong bas/ dgongs pa thag bcad pa la 
142.8(1): bsgoms dgos te/ de la bslu ba po la yang rnam pa gsum ste/ gang zhe na/ nyams 
142.9(1): sod kyi bslu ba po dang gcig /bag chags kyi bslu ba po dang gnyis/ nyon mongs

142.12(1): la nyams sod kyi bslu ba po bcu drug pa gang zhe na/ bdag lung mnan nas 
142.13(1): bsgoms pa'i dus su/ mi yis cha byad du 'dug pa lus che la yan lag rags pa 
142.14(1): brgyad byung nas/ bdag bshas nas nang grol chu la 'khru ba snyam byed na/ lha yi byad 
142.15(1): (gyad )chen po brgyad kyi sprul pa dang nyams sod yin pas/ bag chags bkru ba 
142.16(1): bzang ste/ lus tshan chu dang spos chus bkrus la/ ye shes chu bo'i ting nge 'dzin zhes 
142.17(1): bya ba/ kun gzhi ma g.yos pa'i klong nas/ ye shes kyi chu bo dkar la dwangs pa/ rdul 
142.18(1): dang snyogs ma dri ma gsum gyis ma gos pa cig byung nas snang srid thams cad dus 
142.19(1): gcig du dag par bsgom/ de las kyang lung mnan te/ byang chub kyi sems skye ba 
142.20(1): med par gdod nas dag pa sal gyi gsal ba las/ gsal lo ba'i rtog pa las 
142.21(1): kyang 'das/ gsal la rtog pa ye nas med par bsgom mo/ /de nas gcan gzan 
143.1(1): gdug pa can/ rngams pa'i nga ro dang khros pa'i sdang mig dang / 'jigs pa'i mche 
143.2(1): sder la sogs te/ ya nga ba bzhis bdag za ba snyam du byed na/ de ni khro bo chen po 
143.3(1): bzhi yi nyams sod yin pas/ sku ri rab lhun po dang mnyam pa/ dbu srid pa'i rtse 
143.4(1): mor slebs pa/ zhabs rgya mtsho'i gting du slebs pa/ sha ri rab tsam la bcad kyang 
143.5(1): mi tsha ba/ srid pa gsum gyis bsdus pa'i sems can thams cad 'drang ('dra ba )
143.6(1): kyang / da rung sha la nyams pa med par lung mnan la bsgom mo/ /de bas kyang lung 
143.7(1): mnan te/ bdag gi sems nyid khro bo chen po'i mchog yin pas/ gcan gzan 
143.8(1): gdug pa sprul pa'i khro bo kun kyang / bdag ye shes kyi khro bo nyid kyi pho nya yin par 
143.9(1): bsgom mo/ /don du sems nyid las med par bsgom mo/ /bdag gi gzhog g.yas pa 
143.10(1): nas khro chu'i bud med la/ mun pa'i gos gon pa ral pa 'dom dgu brgya dgu bcu 
143.11(1): sa la gnar ba/ ba spu nyag re las gcod pa'i mtshon cha re phyung nas/ bdag gi sha 
143.12(1): las gcod pa dgu byung ba dang snyam du byed na/ bdag gi g.yon phyogs nas/ lha mo 
143.13(1): shel dang dung gi tshul chags pas/ dbu la rin po che yi thod rdeng dang thor tshugs 
143.14(1): dang zhu shams gyis brgyan pa/ phyag g.yas na rin po che za ma tog re na tsan dan gyi

143.18(1): khyab pa phyung nas/ bdag gi lus la gcod pa dang 'bug pa dang / 'dral ba dang

150.7(1): nyag gcig tu gsal bar lung mnan la bsgom mo/ /sla ba'i bag chags kyi bslu ba

150.9(1): rmis su smras ba de ni/ sla ba'i bag chags kyi bslu ba yin te/ bdag gi byang chub

150.17(1): nas rnam par mi rtog pa/ ye shes spyod las 'das pa'i ting nge 'dzin la snyoms par 
150.18(1): 'jug cing / sems kyi rang bzhin brtag tu med pa'i lung mnan la bsgom mo/ /
150.19(1): dga' bde byung tshor bag chags kyi slu ba gang zhe na/ 'dod chags kyi yul tha dad

150.21(1): dga' bde byung tshor gyi bag chags kyi bslu ba yin te/ de la bdag gi byang chub kyi

151.2(1): yid la bya ba byed pa ci yang med cing / bzod pa chen po byung tshor med pa'i ting nge

151.4(1): bsgom mo/ /g.yo 'gul rtsol sems kyi bag chags kyi bslu ba gang zhe na/ dper na

151.16(1): chags kyi slu ba yin te/ de la bdag gi byang chub kyi sems ni/ yang dag pa'i don 
151.17(1): cir yang ma bcos pa nyid la bslan zhing / ye rtogs chen po'i ting nge 'dzin la 
151.18(1): snyoms par 'jug ste/ don las mi 'da' ba'i byang chub kyi sems su lung mnan la 
151.19(1): bsgom mo/ 7 /'di nas mar ni nyon mongs pa'i bslu ba po nyi shu rtsa lnga gang zhe na/
151.20(1): nyon mongs pa lnga yis phung po lnga la so sor brtags te phye bas/ nyi shu rtsa lnga ru bslu 
151.21(1): ba po 'byung ste gang zhe na/ bdag bsgom pa'i dus su/ zhe sdang las sogs pa 'byung

181.14(1): mya ngan 'das/ sprul pa'i khu byug 'du shes phrin las stobs/ mngon par byang chub ye

181.16(1): byug tshor bas yon tan 'byung / mi 'gyur sku la mnyam pa'i ye shes lta/ mi mnyam

182.1(1): 'das/ skye med khu byug 'gag med dbyings na 'phyo/ skye mtha' 'chi mtha' rang bzhin 
182.2(1): ye sangs rgyas/sprul pa'i khu byug mi dmigs cir mi sgrogs/ mi 'gag mtshan ma med 
182.3(1): pa'i thig le la/ ma skyes dngos po med pa'i khu byug babs/ ngang la ngang gis gnas 
182.4(1): te dmigs pa med/bya 'phur shing gi skas la mi 'dzeg ltar/ theg pa'i skas la 'dzeg 
182.5(1): par yang mi dmigs/ phywa gshen mo la sgrogs pa'i khu byug kyang / gto dpyad mtshan 
182.6(1): ma med de cir mi dmigs/snang gshen gyer la sgrogs pa'i khu byug kyang / gyer sgo

182.9(1): khu byug kyang / shi 'dur mtshan ma med de cir mi dmigs/ tshangs pa dge bar 
182.10(1): sgrogs pa'i khu byug kyang / dge sdig mtshan ma med de cir mi dmigs/ drang srong 
182.11(1): 'dul khrims sgrogs pa'i khu byug kyang / dka' sla'i mtshan ma med de cir mi dmigs/

182.13(1): dmigs/ ye gshen ting 'dzin sgrogs pa'i khu byug kyang / sku gsung mtshan ma med de 
182.14(1): cir mi dmigs/ khyad par sems nyid sgrogs pa'i khu byug kyang / sems la mtshan ma 
182.15(1): med de cir mi dmigs/ ma skyes mi skye skye ba'i mtshan ma med/ ma 'ong mi 'gro mtshan 
182.16(1): ma cir mi 'byung / thig le gcig la mtshan ma med par gnas/ mi 'gyur dbyings kyi 
182.17(1): thig le nyag gcig la/ ma bcos sku yi khu byug cir yang gsal/ gsal ba nyid la 
182.18(1): snang ba'i rang bzhin med/ mi 'gyur spros med thig le nyag gcig la/ dngos med 
182.19(1): gsung gi khu byug cir yang sgrogs/ grags pa nyid la tshig gi tha snyad med/ gnyis 
182.20(1): med mi 'gyur thig le nyag gcig la/ ma bcos thugs kyi khu byug cir yang mnyam/
182.21(1): mnyam pa nyid la mi mnyam ye nas med/ gsum mtha' gcig tu khyab bdal 'ub

220.17(1): cad spro zhing dngas pa skye ste/ dus gcig tu tshangs tshangs dir gyi zer ro/ /de yang

220.19(1): de'i khar gdugs dros kha la dar gcig drod blan pa yin pas/ chu shul du chu 'ong 
220.20(1): ba dang 'dra ste/ srid pa skye rgyud kyi dus mi nor ba'i tan tra'o/ /de bzhin du gshen 
220.21(1): 'chi med gtsug phud de yang / g.yu lung shel gyi brag phug tu bsgom shing bsgrubs 
221.1(1): pas/ phung po lhag ma ma bor bar g.yung drung gi snying po la gshegs te/ de yi chu 
221.2(1): shul du yang chu 'bab par nges pas/ g.yu lung shel gyi brag phug /lta bur sgoms 
221.3(1): shig sgrubs shig phung po lhag ma med par g.yung drung gi snying po thobs par nges 
221.4(1): pa'o/ /byang nas lho ru 'phur te ces pa/ dper na bya rje khu byug de yang byang ri mtho 
221.5(1): sa gtsang gi yul nas/ lho bal ris dgu'i yul du 'gro ba'i dus su ni/ snye ma 'bru 
221.6(1): snye la 'bru yi me tog cig khyer nas rgya dang mon gyi sa mtshams nas/ lho ri la song 
221.7(1): zhes bya ba'i ri la/ mon 'dre hed (gre he dang )zhes bya ba/ mu le drum shing gi sdong po 
221.8(1): 'dom bcu drug pa cig yod de/ de'i khar ston zla 'bring po'i tshes gsum gyi nyin 
221.9(1): nang par nam langs tsam na/ skad snyan pa thebs gsum bsgrags nas nam mkha' 
221.10(1): la 'phur te 'gro'o/ /dus de ru mi thams cad kyang spro ba skyes nas this this zer 
221.11(1): ro/ /de yang sngon ston pa 'chi med gtsug phud kyis/ bon gnam babs kyi bstan 
221.12(1): pa bzhags pa'i sa yin pas/ chu shul du chu 'babs te/ bstan pa ci ltar btsugs 
221.13(1): pa thams cad mtha' gnyan pa'i dus su mi nor ba'i tan tra yin no/ /de bzhin du 
221.14(1): da ltar yang sa gnas de lta bu kun du ni/ lho bal ris dgu'i mi gang gis phyin nas 
221.15(1): nyal lam log na/ bon gnam babs ni rgyu 'bras mi bslu bar 'ong nges pa'o/ /dus 
221.16(1): tshod 'dzin pa'i phyir yang ces pa/ dper na bya rje khu byug des ni nam zla dus bzhi'i 
221.17(1): tshod dang / tshes grangs kyi dus tshod dang / gza' skar gyi dus tshad ma nor bar 
221.18(1): thig btab pa bzhin 'ong ba'i rig pa yod pa dang 'dra ste/ rang shes rig gi rgyal 
221.19(1): po byang chub kyi sems bde ba chen po 'di rtogs pa'i dus na/ dus snga ma la ci byas 
221.20(1): pa dang / da ltar gyi dus 'di las ci byed pa dang / phyi ma la ci ltar 'gyur ba'i don 
221.21(1): mi nor te/ thig btab pa bzhin du 'ong bar 'gyur ro/ /de las kyang yang dag par 
222.1(1): rtogs pa'i dus cig na/ byang chub kyi sems dus gsum du 'dus ma byas te/ dus 
222.2(1): dang rtag la med par ye nas sangs rgyas pa'i don/ mi nor ba'i thig btab pas ni/
222.3(1): dus las mi nor pa thig 'deb pa rig pa che zhes bya'o/ /shi kha gcod pa'i phyir yang 
222.4(1): khu byug de ces pas dang / dper na bya rje khu byug de/ lho nas byang du 'phur te g.yu 
222.5(1): yi sdong po'i kha la chags nas/ skad snyan pa thebs gsum bsgrags pas/ lug rid 
222.6(1): rdzud nas 'chi ba snying gong chu ser gyis khengs pa kun kyang / lug rid kyi rna bar khu 
222.7(1): byug thos pa dang 'dra zhes pa 'byung ste/ rna ba sprugs shing langs nas rtsi mchog las 
222.8(1): zas btsal bas/ snying gong gi chu ser gram nas mi shi bar sos te 'gro ba de ni shi 
222.9(1): kha gcod kyis bya'o/ /dpe de dang 'dra bar na/ rang shes rig gi rgyal po kun gzhi 
222.10(1): byang chub kyi sems kyis/ sems can ma rtogs pa phyin ci log tu kha bltas pas/ skye 
222.11(1): 'chi mi rtag pa la sngas 'chas pa rnams la/ byang chub kyi sems kyi sprul pa/ bon 
222.12(1): rig pa'i khu byug 'di bshad cing bstan pas/ sems kyis sems spro ba skye ba skyes

222.14(1): thob par byed pas/ shi kha gcod ces bya bas/ skye shi med pa'i don de ma nor bar 
222.15(1): nges pa sa le gsal ba las/ ma bcos pa nyid kyi ngang las rig pa rgyun chags su 
222.16(1): btang snyoms chen por bzhags pas ni rig pa che zhes bya'o/ /'du 'dzi spangs pa'i

222.18(1): song ba'i dus su/ bstan pa dpe'i rgyud mi 'chad pa'i phyir/ thabs dang shes rab 
222.19(1): las sprul pa'i sgo nga gcig byung ba yang / bu las gdung ba'i 'du 'dzi spangs nas/

222.21(1): snyan par sgrogs pa de ni/ chags pa med pa'i dpe ma nor ba'i thig btab pa yin 
223.1(1): te/ rang shes rig gi rgyal po kun gzhi byang chub kyi sems kyis yang dag pa'i don 
223.2(1): rtogs pa'i dus na/ bu dang gnyen ni sgyu ma'i rang bzhin du shes pas/ 'du 'dzi

223.5(1): med pa'i thig 'debs rig pa che zhes bya'o/ /rje sa zin pa'i phyir yang khu byug ste ces

223.21(1): pa nyid kyis nyid yang dag pa'i don la mi nor ba'i thig btab nas/ btang snyoms 
224.1(1): chen po'i ngang du gnas pas rig pa chen zhes bya'o/ /srog la 'dzems pa'i phyir yang

229.18(1): ltar ston te/ de la bsgom pa'i rgyu ni/ tshor ba bde sdug btang snyoms dang / rig pa 
229.19(1): dang rgyu rkyen du bcas pa de dag ni/ byang chub kyi sems su bsdus de ni bsgom pa'i

229.21(1): 'di dag ni/ byang chub kyi sems su bsdus pa'i byin gyis rlabs kyis tshor ba'i phung

230.2(1): gnas 'gyur te/ skyon gyis ma gos pa'i ye shes rang snang du gnas pa de las/
230.3(1): bsgom pa'i thabs 'byung ste/ tshor ba'i phung po bde sdug dang rgyu rkyen la ji ltar

250.21(1): chub sems snang la rang bzhin med par gnas pa las/ yang na bon nyid mtshan ma

251.6(1): rig /yod med gnyis su med par shes pa'i don rig /rgyu 'bras gnyis su med 
251.7(1): par shes pa'i don rig pas ni rig la/ rgyun ni lung las kyang / nyi zla rgyun du phyin

251.13(1): bzhag par bya ste/ gang zhe na/ bon nyid nam mkha' ltar yongs su rgya ma chad pa 
251.14(1): las/ sems nyid gsal ba chen po khyab bdal par bzhag /bon nyid g.yo ba med 
251.15(1): pa'i ngang la/ sems nyid re dogs med pa'i ngang nyid bzhag /bon nyid skye ba med

251.18(1): med pa'i dbyings su/ sems nyid chags pa med par bzhag /bon nyid ma g.yos

251.20(1): nyid ma yengs par bzhag /bon nyid mtshan ma dang bral ba la/ sems nyid dpyod 
251.21(1): las 'das par bzhag /bon nyid mtshon du med pa la/ sems nyid dpag tu med

252.2(1): brtag /lo gsum nang gi bcud brtag ste/ gsang ba'i gnyer thub pa/ bsgom 
252.3(1): bsgrub dang du len pa/ srog lus la chags pa med pa/ 'khor rnam pa yongs su spong 
252.4(1): ba/ slob dpon la phud dud che ba/ gtad na bsgom nus pa/ bslabs na sgrogs 
252.5(1): shes pa/ dad pa che la ser sna chung ba/ snod dang ldan pa de lta bu 'ga' la spro'o/ /mi 
252.6(1): mang du bstan par yang ma gsungs ste/ snod med kun la mi bstan no/ /snod med

261.18(1): thams cad kyi yang rtse/ ye shes thig le lung gis brtol nas/ ston pa kun tu

261.20(1): ni sbas/ brtsal zhing bsgrub tu med pas ni mchog yin/ ye nas sangs rgyas pas ni 
261.21(1): man ngag /de las mngon du gyur cing rtogs pa med pas ni bshad ces bya'o/ /
262.1(1): gter ldan lung gi snying po 'di/ nyid las shar pa'i ye shes kyis/ ma nor ma bcos 
262.2(1): pa de bzhin ngang / thugs la brtol te drang por bshad ces pas/ de ltar bu mngon 
262.3(1): du gyur pa'i dus na/ yid bzhin gyi nor bu rin po che dang 'dra bas gter ldan pas/
262.4(1): ye nas sangs rgyas pa'i rgyu yin pas ni snying po'o/ /de nyid ma bsgribs pa'i ye shes 
262.5(1): rang las rang shar bas ye shes so/ /ma nor ba'i byang chub sems nyid las/ ye nyid 
262.6(1): rtogs pa'i rtogs pa dang por skye bar ma nor/ da ltar mtshan mar ma nor/ tha mar 
262.7(1): 'chi bar ma nor/ sems de bzhin pa las/ rig pa de bzhin pa shar ba ste/ sems 
262.8(1): bcos su med pas rig pa la 'gyur ba med/ gnyis su med pa'i byang chub sems/
262.9(1): ye nas bya brtsal dang bral te gnas so/ /de lta ba'i sems thugs la rtogs pa ni/
262.10(1): ston pa kun tu bzang po gshen lha 'od dkar gyi thugs las brtol ba ni drang por 
262.11(1): bshad pa'o/ /bon nyid ye nas bya brtsal dang bral te sangs rgyas pa ni drang po'o/
262.12(1): bon thams cad bon nyid kyi rang bzhin du rnam par dag cing sangs rgyas par 
262.13(1): bshad do/ /sems ye nas sangs rgyas pa'i drang po la/ rnam par rtog pa'i gzung 
262.14(1): 'dzin dang nyon mongs pa'i bye brag ye nas sems kyi rang bzhin du/ ye nas sangs 
262.15(1): rgyas par bshad do/ /yang na don de gsum ye nas sangs rgyas pa'i drang po/ de la 
262.16(1): mngon du gyur par bshad pa'o/ / gshen rab yongs kyi brda' tshig las/ bsgom 
262.17(1): dang mi bsgom gnyis brjod de/ bsgom zhes gshen rab gang gi bka'/ mi bsgom 
262.18(1): gti mug su yis brjod ces pas/ gang zag dpyad pa rnams kyis/ snang srid 
262.19(1): thams cad ye nas sangs rgyas pa la/ bsgom dang mi bsgom gnyis kyi tha snyad brjod 
262.20(1): de/ stong pa phyogs gcig par yid ches par des kyang mngon par mod/ gang zag 
262.21(1): la la na re bsgom du yod zer te/ re ba phyogs gcig par rten bcas par yengs 
263.1(1): de mngon mod/ 'o na bsgom zhes sus gsungs/ bon nyid ye nas sangs rgyas pa'i 
263.2(1): don la/ skad gcig ma tsam yang yengs ba med pas/ rang bzhin gyis gsungs/
263.3(1): mi bsgom ces su yis gsungs na/ bon nyid las bsgom pa'i rtog pa rdul tsam yang 
263.4(1): med cing mnyam pa chen po'i klong du gyur pas/ rang bzhin gyis gsungs/ g.yung 
263.5(1): drung gi sems 'khrul pa dang ma 'khrul pa'i mtshan nyid kyang de ltar rtogs shing rig 
263.6(1): par bya'o/ /yang dag sems kyi ltad mo ba/ ma nor lta ba su zhig lags/ mthong nas 
263.7(1): nges pa su zhig lags/ nges pa'i don la brjod du med ces pas/ nyid la ma sgrib 
263.8(1): pa'i rig pa shar ba'i dus na/ sems rgyu rkyen gang las kyang ma bsgribs par yid 
263.9(1): ches pas skye ba med par yang dag par/ sems la mtshan ma med pa yid ches pas/
263.10(1): mtshan ma med par yang dag pa/ sems la 'chi ba med par yid ches pas/ 'chi ba 
263.11(1): med par yang dag /de ltar yid ches pa la ni ltad mo lta zhes bya'o/ /de ltar rtogs 
263.12(1): pa ston pa kun tu bzang po gshen lha 'od dkar lags/ de lta ba'i don la rtog pa 
263.13(1): med na nges pa lags/ rtog pa med pa'i tshad ni/ tshig dang yi ges brjod du med/
263.14(1): ma bcos sems kyi dbyings nas ni/ thams cad mkhyen pa'i ye shes shar/ dbyings 
263.15(1): nas shar cing mkha' la nub ces pa/ kun gzhi byang chub sems de/ dang po rgyu rkyen 
263.16(1): gang las kyang ma skyed pas/ skye ba'i dngos por ma bcos/ mtshan ma'i dngos por 
263.17(1): ye nas med pas/ mtshan ma'i dngos por ma bcos/ 'chi ba'i rgyu rkyen med pas skye 
263.18(1): 'chi dang 'du 'bral ye nas ma bcos/ de lta bu'i dus na/ snang srid thams cad 
263.19(1): mkhyen pa'i ye shes shar te/ de ltar shar tsam na yang / brtag cing mtshon du med 
263.20(1): cing / nam mkha'i ngogs bzhin gnas pas nam mkha' la nub ces bya'o/ /sbas pa 
263.21(1): med pa'i dkyil 'khor du/ snang srid thams cad thabs kyis sbas/ mthong ba med 
264.1(1): pa'i ye shes la/ snang srid thams cad de la gsal ces pa/ byang chub sems la sbas 
264.2(1): pa med de/ khams gsum khyab bdal du gnas/ de lta'i mkha' klong yangs pa'i 
264.3(1): dkyil 'khor du/ snang zhing srid pa thams cad sems kyi rang bzhin du gsal/
264.4(1): gsal bas snang srid thabs kyis sbas zhes de la bya'o/ /mthong ba med pa'i don 
264.5(1): mngon du gyur ba ni ye shes bya/ snang srid thams cad sems nyid dam ye shes kyi

264.13(1): gnas/ sems ye nas 'chi bar ma bcos pas/ skye 'chi med par ye nas gnas/

264.15(1): kyi pho brang yin te/ sems la skye 'chi dang 'du 'bral med par yid ches pas/
264.16(1): gsas chen rnams kyi pho brang yin/ sems ye nas sangs rgyas pa ni/ kun tu bzang

264.21(1): yin/ de ltar sems nam mkha' ltar dag pa'i klong yangs pa de na ni/ ma bsgribs

272.3(1): ye shes spyod 'das 'bras bu thob/ sems nyid thig ler cir yang ma bcos pa'o/ /
272.4(1): bde ba'i thig le mtshon pa mya ngan 'das/ ma g.yos bde chen bon nyid rtogs tsam 
272.5(1): na/ sems kyi rang bzhin ye nas nam mkha' 'dra/ dgongs pa'i don yang spro bsdu 
272.6(1): gcig tu 'dus/ de nyid shes na thams cad sangs rgyas so/ /sems lung gi dkyus 
272.7(1): rdzogs so/ /
273.1(1): lung gi rgyun thag gi 'grel ba bzhugs/ /
273.2(1): @#//ston pa gshen lha 'od dkar gyi thugs kyi brnags pa 'di ni/ dang po 
273.3(1): gshen lha 'od dkar gyi thugs rjes byin gyis brlobs kyis/ mi mngon pa'i dbyings 
273.4(1): nas bshad/ gshen tshad med 'od ldan gyis nam mkha'i dbyings/ 'od gsal gyi 
273.5(1): gnas su gsan nas bsgom/ de nas 'phrul gshen snang ldan gyis ri rab kyi zom 
273.6(1): las gsan nas bsgom/ de nas ye gshen gtsug phud kyis/ g.yu lung shel gyi 
273.7(1): brag phug tu gsan nas bsgom mo/ /de yan chad ting nge 'dzin gyis bstan cing 
273.8(1): brgyud pa las/ tshig tu bkas ma gsungs so/ /de yan chad gcig gis gcig las 
273.9(1): dgongs pa nyams su lon pas dkyus nyid gsal ba'o/ /de nas 'chi med gtsug 
273.10(1): phud kyis gsang ba 'dus pa la go bar sgra ru snyan/ nyams su lon par bya ba'i phyir/
273.11(1): dkyus las bkrol zhing ngos bzung nas bshad pas/ lta spyod dam tshig 'phrin las 
273.12(1): dag /sgom pa dag tu shes par bya ces pas/ de ni mang tshig nyung du bsdus pa yin 
273.13(1): te/ gang zhe na/ phyi nang snod bcud dam 'khor ba dang mya ngan las 'das pa'i bon 
273.14(1): thams cad/ byang chub sems kyi rang bzhin du lta ba de ni lta ba'o/ /yang na sems 
273.15(1): kyis sems nyid mthong bas/ rtog pa rang bzhin gyi zhi ba yin pa'i phyir lta ba'o/ /
273.16(1): spyod pa ni lta ba'i don las gnas pa ni spyod pa'o/ /de lta ba'i don las mi 'da' 
273.17(1): ba ni dam tshig go /de ka na nyid kyi ngang la zhugs pas ni/ phrin las so/ /de ltar 
274.1(1): sal gyis gsal ba las gsal lo ba'i rtog pa las kyang bsda' ste/ gsal la rtog 
274.2(1): pa rdul kyang med pa de ni sgom pa'o/ /de ni lta spyod dam tshig 'phrin las sgom pa dag 
274.3(1): tu shes par bya ces bya'o/ /ma g.yos ma bcos ces pas ma rtogs pa rnams/ ma 
274.4(1): g.yos pa ni dbyings su shes par bya'o/ /ma bcos pa ni ye shes su shes par bya/ de 
274.5(1): dang de ye nas gnyis su med pa'i don la gnas par bya'o/ /de ltar shes na rig 
274.6(1): pa nang nas 'char/ drod nyams su myong zhing lon nas/ 'bras bu las gdon mi za 
274.7(1): ba'o/ /zhes bya'o/ /mi 'gyur dbyings nas mi dmigs pa'i thugs ces pas/ bon 
274.8(1): nyid mi 'gyur ba'i dbyings su/ mi dmigs pa'i thugs kyis ma bcos pa'i don la/
274.9(1): mi g.yo' ba'i dgongs pa gsal ba de/ rang shes rig gi rgyal por de bzhin sal 
274.10(1): gyis shes na/ dgongs pa yang dag pa'o zhes bya'o/ /de bzhin nyid zab ces pas/
274.11(1): de ni gong ma ltar gsal ba yin/ bzhin ni dgongs pa mi g.yo ba yin/ nyid ni 
274.12(1): dgongs pa zab mo'i don las bcos su med pa yin no/ /de ltar shes na ni gshen 
274.13(1): rab kyi dgongs pa dang ldan zhes de la bya'o/ /rtogs tshad mnyam nyid mi g.yo ba 
274.14(1): ces pas/ byang chub sems la rtogs pa'i tshad ni/ mnyam pa nyid gnyis su med 
274.15(1): pa'i don las mi g.yo ba yin la/ spyir yang rtogs pa chen pos kyang rtogs so snyam 
274.16(1): pa mi dmigs te/ sems ma bcos pa la don 'dus pa'o/ /bsgoms pa kun gzhi ma 
274.17(1): g.yos la/ rig pa nyid ces pas/ spyir sgom pa ces bya ba ni/ kun gzhi ma g.yos 
274.18(1): pa las/ rig pa nyid kyang bcos su med de ma bcos par bzhag pa la bya'o/ /ma 
274.19(1): bcos ngang las rig pa'i rgyun ces pas/ spyir yang bon nyid ma bcos pa'i ngang 
274.20(1): las/ rig pa rgyun chags su gnas pa'o/ /yang na ma g.yos pa'i ngang la ma yengs 
274.21(1): pa'i ngang nyid gnas pa de las mi 'da' ba'o/ /ngang nyid nam mkha' lta bu la ces 
275.1(1): pas/ kun gzhi byang chub sems nam mkha' ltar yangs shing rgya che ste/ cir yang ma 
275.2(1): g.yos pa ni/ byang chub sems kyi ngang yin pa la/ gsal ba nyid kyis ye shes cir 
275.3(1): yang ma bcos pa ni/ byang chub sems kyi ngang nyid yin/ ye nas shes na bcos su 
275.4(1): med/ ces pa de nam mkha' ltar ye shes chen po khyab bdal du gnas pas bcos 
275.5(1): su med do/ /de phyir ngang nyid nam mkha' ye shes bcos su med ces bya'o/ /snang 
275.6(1): la rang bzhin med bsgoms na ces pas/ bsgoms pa thams cad ni snang la rang 
275.7(1): bzhin med par bsgom ste/ snang stong gnyis kyi don gcig tu rtogs par bya ste/
275.8(1): gang zhe na/ sems stong ste yang dngos po dang mtshan ma rdul yang med pa la/ snang 
275.9(1): ste yang gsal ba'i ye shes nyid las nyid gsal ba la rang bzhin med pas ni/ de'i 
275.10(1): rang bzhin ci lta bur yang brtag tu med pas/ gsal la brtag tu med pa'i byang 
275.11(1): chub sems ces bya'o/ /de ni snang stong gnyis su med pa'i don dang ldan pa'i sems 
275.12(1): rnyed pa zhes bya'o/ /de bzhin nyid don gsal rtogs na/ ces pas/ kun gzhi byang 
275.13(1): chub sems/ nam mkha' ltar ye shes chen po khyab bdal pa las/ mi g.yo ba ni de 
275.14(1): yin/ ma g.yos pa'i ngang las ma bcos pa ni rang bzhin yin/ ma bcos pa las mi 
275.15(1): dmigs pa ni nyid yin/ de bzhin nyid las nyid kyis don de sal gyis rtogs nas 
275.16(1): bden pa'i yang bden pa yang dag pa yin te/ 'bras bu yu ba nas zin pa'o/ /don 
275.17(1): dam mi dmigs nam mkha' ltar ces pas/ bsgoms pa ni don dam pa cir yang 
275.18(1): mi dmigs pa la bzhag ste/ don dam par byang chub sems nam mkha' ltar ye 
275.19(1): shes chen por gsal gyis rtogs na/ spyir yang mi dmigs pa la gsal ba'i ting 
275.20(1): nge 'dzin gyis la bcad de/ dper nam mkha' yang mi dmigs pas/ don bon 
275.21(1): nyid kyang mi dmigs/ rtags sems nyid kyang mi dmigs/ dpe don rtags dang 
276.1(1): gsum/ tshig tsam yang ma yin par mnyam par rtogs pa las/ mnyam mo snyam pa 
276.2(1): yang mi dmigs te/ cir yang mi dmigs pa la/ gsal btabs pa la bzhag go /
276.3(1): der gyur dpyod 'das mtshon du med ces pa/ gong ma ltar gyur tsam nyid na/ lung 
276.4(1): las kyang ye shes spyod las 'das pa/ rig pas mtshon du med zhes bya ste/ de ltar 
276.5(1): gyur tsam nyid nas/ ye shes chen por gyur te/ dpyod pa las 'das pas so/ /de 
276.6(1): ltar 'das tsam nyid na rig pas kyang mtshon du med do/ /rig pas mtshon du med 
276.7(1): pas/ bon nyid nam mkha' 'dra/ bon nyid nam mkha'i dbyings dkyil du/ ye shes 
276.8(1): chen po ye nas dpyod las 'das pa'i 'bras bu thob ces bya'o/ /sems nyid thig le 
276.9(1): cir yang ma bcos pa zhes pas/ byang chub sems cir yang ma bcos pa ni/ sems 
276.10(1): kyi thig yin/ de'i ngang las mi dmigs pa ni le yin no/ /de yi ngang las gsal la 
276.11(1): ma yengs pa ni sems kyi sems nyid ces bya'o/ /bde ba'i thig le ces pas byang chub 
276.12(1): sems ma g.yos pa ni/ bde ba'i ngang la gnas pa yin/ de ni sems bde ba'i thig 
276.13(1): yin/ de ye nas mtshan ma thams cad las 'das pa ni/ sems bde ba'i le yin/
276.14(1): de ye nas bde ba'i ngang la gnas pa ni/ bde ba'i ngang las mtshon pa mya ngan las 
276.15(1): 'das zhes bya'o/ /ma g.yos bde chen bon nyid rtogs tsam na ces pas/ sems kyi 
276.16(1): rang bzhin ye nas ma g.yos pa ni/ bon nyid kyi dbyings yin la/ ma g.yos pa'i 
276.17(1): ngang las gsal ba'i ye shes nyid la nyid 'char ba ni/ bon nyid kyi ye shes yin te/
276.18(1): de dang de gnyis su 'dzin pa'i rtog pa las kyang bsda' ste/ mnyam pa nyid du rtogs 
276.19(1): pa de ni/ bon nyid kyi bon nyid ces kyang bya'o/ /don dam pa'i byang chub sems 
276.20(1): ces kyang bya'o/ /de lta ba'i don de gsal la ma yengs pa'i ngang las/ ma bcos pa 
276.21(1): ni/ ma bcos bon nyid bde chen rtogs ces kyang bya'o/ /rang shes rig gi rgyal po 
277.1(1): byang chub kyi sems kyis/ de ltar sal gyis rtogs tsam na/ sems kyi rang bzhin ni 
277.2(1): ye nas nam mkha' dang 'dra ste/ snang srid khyab bdal du gnas pa las/ yongs su 
277.3(1): rgya ma chad par gsal ba'i byang chub sems ces kyang ming de la gdags/ ye nas 
277.4(1): nam mkha' dang 'dra ba'o/ /dgongs pa'i don yang spro bsdus gcig tu 'dus ces 
277.5(1): pa/ 'khor ba dang mya ngan las 'das pa'i bon nam/ phyi nang gi theg rgyud dam/ phyi 
277.6(1): nang gi snod bcud thams cad yongs su rgya ma chad de/ thugs rje chen po'i ngang du 
277.7(1): gsal ba ni/ spros pa'i dgongs pa yang yin la/ de gcig dang gnyis su bgrang du 
277.8(1): med de/ thig le chen po gcig gi ngang du gsal ba ni/ bsdus pa yang yin/ de yang 
277.9(1): tshig gi na ya tsam las don gcig tu 'dus pas ni/ gcig tu 'dus zhes bshad do/
277.10(1): /de nyid shes na thams cad sangs rgyas so ces pas/ de ni gong ma de ga nyid dam/
277.11(1): sems de bzhin nyid la bya/ shes na ni gang gis shes kyang ngo / thams cad ni rtogs 
277.12(1): na yongs kyang sangs rgyas pa yin par nges zhes bshad do/ /byang chub sems lung 
277.13(1): gi rgyun thag gi dkyus las bkral zhing ngos bzung nas bshad pa rdzogs swo/ /'dzam 
277.14(1): gling gser gyis bkang pa bas/ man ngag thugs kyi brnags pa tshig gcig dga'/
277.15(1): de ltar rtogs par gyis/ sgom chen gshen rgur gyi gter lugs so/ /zhu g.yas 
277.16(1): legs po la gnyer gtad do/ /bkra shis/
278.1(1): sems kyi ngang thag 'thud kyi sa gcod 
278.2(1): bzhugs pa lags so/ /

278.16(1): pa dang / skye 'chi med pa'i don dang rang bzhin gyis ma 'chad do/ /kun gzhi rnam 
279.1(1): par dag pa'i klong nas kyang / 'khor rnam par shes pa brgyad las/ rang bzhin 
279.2(1): gyis ma skyes shing / ma bcos pa nam mkha' dang 'dra ba'i don dang / rig pa thams 
279.3(1): cad kyis 'chad/ de lta bu nyid la thugs su chud pa de/ skye 'chi dang 'du 'bral med

279.5(1): thams cad kyis bshad/ de lta ba'i don de la/ rnam par rtog pa'i gzugs rdul 
279.6(1): yang mi mnga' zhing / thams cad mkhyen pa'i dpal du shar bas/ 'chi med gtsug

279.10(1): pa gshen rab yan yab sras bar du ni/ las dag pa las 'ga' la ni/ tshig dang 
279.11(1): yi ge gnyis ka las zhal du brjod nas bstan/ de nas bar gyi gshen pos rnams 
279.12(1): par las tshig dang yi ger brjod pas kyis rtsa ba ni/ brjod du med pa'i byang chub

279.19(1): sgom chen legs pos zhus pa lags so/ /de nas ston pa legs po zhus pa lags

279.21(1): bstan te/ de las dang po kun gzhi rnam par dag pa'i dbyings nas/ rig pa kun

280.2(1): 'gag par 'char ba la/ phyag 'tshal bar bstan pa dang / don gnyis pa thams

280.6(1): nor ba'i byang chub sems kyis rtogs par bstan pa dang / don drug pa rang bzhin 
280.7(1): gyis gab cing sbas pa'i don gtan la phabs nas bstan pa dang / don bdun pa/

283.1(1): ngang la zhugs pas ni/ 'phrin las so/ /de ltar sal gyis gsal ba las/ gsal 
283.2(1): lo ba'i rtog pa las kyang bsda' ste/ gsal la rtog pa rdul yang med pa de ni/ sgom 
283.3(1): pa'o/ /de ni lta spyod dam tshig 'phrin las sgom pa dag tu shes par bya zhes bya'o/ /ma 
283.4(1): g.yos pa ma bcos pas/ ma rtogs pa rnams/ ma g.yos pa dbyings su shes par 
283.5(1): bya'o/ /ma bcos pa ni ye shes su shes par bya'o/ /de dang de ye nas gnyis su med 
283.6(1): pa las gnas par bya'o/ /de ltar shes na rig pa nang nas 'char ba/ drod nyams 
283.7(1): su myong zhing lon nas/ 'bras bu la gdon mi za ba'o zhes bya'o/ /mi 'gyur dbyings

283.9(1): pa'i thugs kyis ma bcos pa'i don la/ mi g.yo ba'i dgongs pa la gsal ba 
283.10(1): dang / rang shes rig gi rgyal pos de bzhin sal gyi shes na/ dgongs pa yang dag 
283.11(1): pa'o/ /zhes bya'o/ /de bzhin zab ces pa/ de ni gong ma ltar gsal ba yin/ bzhin

323.6(1): nus shing rtogs par byed/ de'i don mthar phyin pas/ rtogs pa thams cad yang 
323.7(1): dag pa'i dbyings su gsal ba ye shes kyi thig btab pas/ dbyings dang ye shes kyi 
323.8(1): bon thams cad 'dis gtan la phab pa'i don khyad par ba mthong ba las/ gsas 
323.9(1): mkhar 'phra mo gzhan gyis don phyogs re sgra phyogs tsam las gtan la mi phebs pas 
323.10(1): na go rtogs khyad par mchog ces bya'o/ /mu ne mu ber phyogs sangs la ces pa/ thog 
323.11(1): ma bon gyi dbyings rgyal ba lha yi dkyil 'khor/ stong la yongs su rgya ma chad stong la 
323.12(1): yongs su rgya ma nub/ stong la yongs su rgya ma thug pa zhes bya'o/ /cho 'phrul 'od las 
323.13(1): rten gzhir grub ces pa/ de ltar nam mkha' ci yang ma srid pa'i dbyings nam 
323.14(1): mkha' stong pa'i rang bzhin las/ las dang thugs rje'i dbang gis 'od kyi 'khor lo 
323.15(1): ci yang mkhyen pa zhes bya ste/ dbyibs dang kha dog cir yang snang ba cig rang bzhin 
323.16(1): gyis srid do/ /de 'khor zhing 'khrugs pa'i bcud las/ skad cig ma 'gyur ba'i rlung 
323.17(1): du srid do/ /de rlung rnam pa lnga'i rab tu smin pa las/ rlung gi dkyil 'khor kha dog 
323.18(1): sna tshogs kyi bdag nyid can// dbyibs kun tu zlum pa/ zheng du bye ba dang sa ya 
323.19(1): rngams su dpag tshad drug 'bum me dang chu'i rmeng la khyab pa mtha' 'khor du grangs 
323.20(1): kyi skad cig ma bgrangs pa las 'das pa chags so/ /rgyu 'byung ba lnga'i snying po can 
323.21(1): zhes bya ba 'byung ba kun gyi rgyu blangs te lhag par gnas so/ /me rin po che rlung 
324.1(1): mnyen lcug gi bdag nyid du smin te gsal lo/ /de tsha grang 'khrugs pa'i cho 'phrul 
324.2(1): las/ chu lnga bdud rtsi'i 'khor lor chags te/ dbyibs dang kha dog chags tshad du 
324.3(1): ldan par chags so/ /de'i steng du sa rin po che'i rmeng gzhir chags te/ dbyibs 
324.4(1): dang kha dog chags tshad du ldan par chags so/ /de man chad ni sa rin po che lnga'i 
324.5(1): gzhi ma zhes bya'o/ /dbus sbu gu sel ba rlung khong stong du gnas so/ /de las steng ba 
324.6(1): tsha can gyi rgya mtsho zhes bya ba chags so//de la gling bzhi dang gling phran ri dang ri 
324.7(1): rab tu chags so/ /steng gi rgya mtsho de'i rngams su dpag tshad 'bum phrag brgyad du 
324.8(1): gnas so/ /de nas dpag tshad stong phrag nyi shu mar gcal ba na rlung rin po che lnga'i 
324.9(1): rtse mo bya ba gnas so//de la khyad par gyi dpag tshad lnga ru gnas so/ /de'i bcud 
324.10(1): du rlung gi ba mo che zhes bya bar gnas so/ /me'i dug sbrul dmar mo dang / chu'i dug 
324.11(1): bya sngon mo dang / sa'i phag nag po gsum du byung ngo / sbrul gyi gdugs pa las yang 
324.12(1): snying me'i 'khor lor chags/ bya'i mchu las yang snying chu'i 'khor lor chags so/ /
324.13(1): phag gi blo ngan las yang snying sa yi 'khor lor chags so/ /de gsum gyi rngams su 
324.14(1): dpag tshad lnga brgyar gnas so/ /de las skye 'gul gyi sems can kun srid do/ /sa 
324.15(1): de'i snying po las rin po che'i sdong po yal ga bye ba phrag brgya gyes par srid do/ /de ni 
324.16(1): sa rin po che skye rgu'i rten gzhi zhes bya'o/ /mu ting g.yu mtsho klong du 'khyil zhes pa/
324.17(1): steng gi rgya mtsho de ni dkar ba dang ljang ba dang dmar ba dang sngo ba dang ser bar 
324.18(1): snang ba'i kha dog can ro kha ba dang mngar ba dang ska ba dang nyag pa dang skyur bar 
324.19(1): gnas pa ste/ rdzu 'phrul sgong nga 'dril rdol bas zhes pa/ ye srid smon gyi rgyal po'i 
324.20(1): smon lam las/ mtsho de'i dbus su rdzu 'phrul gyi rlung gis bskyod pas g.yu'i sgong nga 
324.21(1): 'od kyi thig le can cig tu byung ngo / sgong nga de rdzu 'phrul gyi rlabs kyis rdol bas 
325.1(1): mtshan dang ldan pa'i dbyal mo btsun cig byung ste/ rang ming rang gis btags pa 
325.2(1): yum bzang za ring btsun tu btags so/ /de yang sred len rgyu ngan pa las ma 
325.3(1): bskyed pas bzang za/ sems can gyi don du 'dren ston thun mong ma yin pa la yun 
325.4(1): du gnas pas ring btsun zhes bya'o/ /de mtshan dang dpe byad nyi shu'i rgyan gyis 
325.5(1): brgyan pa zhig byung ste/ dbyings las ye shes rdzogs sprul pas ces pa/ yab kun 
325.6(1): snang khyab pa dang yum mkha'i lha mo thugs rje mkha' yangs ma'i sprul pa yum la 
325.7(1): gshen khri nam ting bya bar sprul lo/ /sprul pa'i bstan pa yum gyis myong zhes pa/
325.8(1): gshen de'i thugs kyi sprul pa nyams sod pa btang bas yum gyi mtshan dang ltas su 
325.9(1): bcas pas mtshan ltas kyang bzang ste/ rab tu sku nyams bde bar gyur ro/ /yab kyi 
325.10(1): sprul pa gsung rol pa zhes/ khri bzhi nam ting des gsung gi sprul pa g.yu bya khu byug 
325.11(1): cig tu gsang ba rtsa'i lam du zhugs te yum gyi lhums su gshegs so/ /g.yung drung 
325.12(1): khyab par yon tan sras zhes pa/ yum de la mtshan dang ldan pa'i sras zhig sku 
325.13(1): 'khrungs te/ mtshan kyang gshen 'chi med rtsug tu gsol lo/ /sprul pa ye gshen rtsug 
325.14(1): phud bon ces pa/ gshen de ni dbyings dang ye shes kyi sprul pa rdzogs sku khri bzhi

325.16(1): zhes pa/ sras des sems kyi mi pho yid kyi rta la zhon nas yab khri bzhi nam ting la 
325.17(1): g.yung drung srid pa bon gyi bstan pa mnyan te thugs su chud par mdzad do/ /dun 
325.18(1): rtags tan tra sku la rdzogs ces pa/ yab kyi byin rlabs dang yum gyi bsod nams 
325.19(1): dang sras kyi brtson 'grus kyis/ dngos grub kyi don rtags dgu zhig brnyes te/ sku 
325.20(1): rdzu 'phrul gyi don rtags gsum// thugs byin rlabs kyi don rtags gsum/ gsung 
325.21(1): bstan pa'i don rtags gsum ste dgu brnyes so/ /rngos [/]dngos )med mtshon phyir

330.21(1): bsnyoms kyis brlab ste/ gzhal yas me chu sa rlung dang bcas pa yang don dam par

331.2(1): brlab/ de ltar nam mkha'i rang bzhin du gnas pa la yangs te stongs pa med de 
331.3(1): rang bzhin gyis gsal bar gnas so/ /dog ste ma shong ba med de 'byung ba rang

331.11(1): brlabs pas mtshan ma gang gis kyang bskyed du med pa zhes pa'o/ /phud byin gyis

331.13(1): byin gyis brlab pa/ bca' lugs dang dgongs pa gnas dang 'dra/ snying pos rgyud

331.18(1): zhes bya ba bden pas spyan drangs la rin po che gser skyems kyis mchod cing sa gzhi

331.21(1): sgom khog nas byung ba bzhin no/ /rab 'byams skongs kyis sbyin mchog yongs la 
332.1(1): dgye ('gyed )ces pa/ phyi ma lha srin sde brgyad rab 'byams mnyes pa'i skong ba bca'/
332.2(1): g.yu rngon dang mchod pa'i rab 'byams btang bas 'jig rten gyi dregs pa can spa 
332.3(1): bskong ba'o/ /phyogs bzhi mtshams bcad bka' bgo bden pa bdar bri zhes pa/
332.4(1): mtshan mas don la mtshon pa'i phyir pho brang dkyil 'khor bzhengs te/ de la yang 
332.5(1): sems can log pa can bar du gcod pa la dga' ba rnams kyis skabs mi rnyed

332.7(1): po chen po mtshams bsrung zhes/ phyi yi rgyal po bzhi bka'i bya ra byed du gzhug /de

332.9(1): dgu ltar bri yang rung gsang ba 'dus pa thig le dbyings kyi dkyil 'khor 'di nyid 
332.10(1): ltar byed kyang rung ste/ gnam thig gdab ste 'dom gang gru bzhir bya'o/ /dgongs

333.1(1): gdab par bya/ 'byed thig gi nang skor yang gsum du bgos la thig brgyad gdab/

363.14(1): tshogs pa ni/ ston pa thugs rje che la thabs mkhas pa'i thugs rje byin gyis brlabs 
363.15(1): las/ bka' bden pa yang dag pa byung ba/ lung gi yi ge gab pa dgu skor 'di 
363.16(1): yin te/ phyi nang gi theg rgyud dam/ bon gyi sgo mo brgyad khri bzhi stong bka' rab 
363.17(1): 'byams ji snyed cig mnga' na yang / don thams cad 'di yi ngang du ma 'dus shing 
363.18(1): ma khyab pa med pas so/ /yang na rang shes rig gi rgyal po byang chub kyi sems las/
363.19(1): bden pa'i bka' yang dag par byung ste/ gsung gis rig pa la bshad/ rig pas 
363.20(1): ye shes la bshad/ ye shes kyis rtogs pa la bshad/ nyid kyis nyid bshad pa'i 
363.21(1): bka' yang dag pa 'di la/ bstan pa thams cad kyi don 'dus shing tshogs pas ni/
364.1(1): bka' phun sum tshogs pa'o/ /'khor phun sum tshogs pa ni/ ston pa kun tu bzang 
364.2(1): po gshen lha 'od dkar la/ 'khor rigs kyi lha dang lha mo 'am/ dus gsum gyi 
364.3(1): gshen rab thams cad kyang / ma 'dus shing ma tshogs pa med pas so/ /yang na 
364.4(1): kun gzhi byang chub kyi sems bde ba chen po la/ ye shes lnga'am/ rnam par shes pa'i 
364.5(1): tshogs brgyad dam/ yul dang shes pas bsdus pa thams cad/ ma 'dus shing ma 
364.6(1): tshogs med pas/ 'khor phun sum tshogs pa'o/ /gnas phun sum tshogs pa ni/ bon 
364.7(1): nyid dbyings mi 'gyur ba ye shes lha yi pho brang / sa 'od dkar la ljon steng de na/
364.8(1): bde skyid thams cad phun sum tshogs pas so/ /yang na kun gzhi ma g.yos pa'i klong 
364.9(1): de/ thams cad kyi 'du ba'i gnas kyang yin la/ de na bde skyid phun sum tshogs pa 
364.10(1): ni/ gnas phun sum tshogs pa'o/ /dus phun sum tshogs pa ni/ bon nyid gyi 
364.11(1): dbyings rnam par dag pa de/ thog ma dang tha ma'i mtha' las ye nas 'das te/
364.12(1): dus gsum du sangs rgyas pa'o/ /yang na kun gzhi byang chub kyi sems bde ba chen 
364.13(1): po de/ thog ma dang tha ma'i mtha' las ye nas 'das te/ snga ba dang 'di dang phyi ma 
364.14(1): med par sangs rgyas pas/ dus phun sum tshogs pa'o/ /rgyu phun sum tshogs pa ni/
364.15(1): mi 'gyur gshen lha'i gnas de na/ yid bzhin gyi dkor nor 'dod pa'i yon tan 
364.16(1): dang ldan te/ longs spyod phun sum tshogs pa'o/ /yang na rang shes rig gi rgyal po/
364.17(1): kun gzhi byang chub kyi sems bde ba chen po/ rgyu las ma bskyed pas rkyen gyis mi 
364.18(1): 'jig ste/ 'dod pa'i yon tan thams cad/ rang bzhin du tshogs pas ni/ rgyu phun 
364.19(1): sum tshogs pa'o/ /'bras bu phun sum tshogs pa ni/ ston pa kun tu bzang po gshen 
364.20(1): lha 'od dkar las/ sku gsung thugs che ba'i rang bzhin lhun gyis rdzogs swo/ /yang 
364.21(1): na rang shes rig gi rgyal po/ kun gzhi byang chub kyi sems bde ba chen po/ 'bras bu 
365.1(1): sku gsung thugs la ye nas brten du med par lhun gyis rdzogs pas ni/ 'bras bu 
365.2(1): phun sum tshogs pa'o/ /yon tan phun sum tshogs pa ni/ ston pa kun tu bzang po 
365.3(1): de la/ legs pa'i yon tan dang / 'dod pa'i yon tan dang / 'byung ba'i yon 
365.4(1): tan thams cad tshogs pas so/ /yang na rang shes rig gi rgyal po byang chub kyi 
365.5(1): sems la/ yon tan thams cad phun sum tshogs pa ste/ byang chub kyi sems la 
365.6(1): legs pa thams cad byung bas/ 'dod pa'i yon tan thams cad 'byung ba dang /
365.7(1): 'byung ba'i yon tan thams cad 'dus shing tshogs pas ni/ yon tan phun sum 
365.8(1): tshogs pa'o/ /don phun sum tshogs pa ni/ bon nyid bde ba chen po de/ ston pa kun 
365.9(1): tu bzang po dang / mnyam pa nyid gnyis su med pa'i don la ma bcos pa ye nas 
365.10(1): rdzogs pas so/ /ye nas kun gzhi byang chub kyi sems bde ba chen po ste/ cir yang 
365.11(1): ma g.yos pa g.yo ba med pa de ni bon gyi dbyings yin la/ ma g.yos pa la gsal ba 
365.12(1): de ni/ bon gyi ye shes yin te/ de dang de gnyis su med par rtogs pa ni/ don 
365.13(1): dam pa yin te/ don phun sum tshogs pa'o/ /rtse rgyal thun mong ma yin pa ni/ dper 
365.14(1): na ri rgyal lhun po'i rtse mo la/ ri bran gzhan gyis mi slebs pa dang 'dra ste/ ston pa 
365.15(1): kun tu bzang po'i bla na gang yang med pa'o/ /yang kun gzhi byang chub kyi sems 
365.16(1): bde ba chen po 'di/ rtogs pa'i dus na snang srid thams cad kyi bla ru phyin te/ gong 
365.17(1): na gang yang med pa'o/ /byin brlabs thun mong ma yin pa ni/ dper na khyung chen 
365.18(1): nam mkha' la lding ste song ba ni/ nyam nga ba dang rten thogs med par/ gshog 
365.19(1): rlabs thabs cig gis gling bzhi 'khor te 'ong la/ de yang 'dab chags gzhan gyi 
365.20(1): thun mong ma byung ba dang 'dra ste/ ston pa kun tu bzang po'i thugs rje byin rlabs 
365.21(1): kyis kyang / thang dang yud tsam gyis/ khams gsum gyi sems can thams cad 
366.1(1): thugs rje'i zhing du gyur te/ de yang sems can gzhan gyi thun mong ma byung ba'o/ /

366.4(1): yin pa'o/ gdangs skad thun mong ma yin pa ni/ dper na seng ges skad chen phyung 
366.5(1): ba'i dus na/ sems can thams cad gnas nas brgyal ba'i gdangs skad yod pa 
366.6(1): de/ sems can gzhan gyi thun mong ma byung ba dang 'dra ste/ ston pa kun tu bzang po

366.19(1): gi gsung thos na/ sems can thams cad spro ba skye ste/ de yang sems can kun gyi

366.21(1): brlabs las/ yang dag pa'i bden pa ston pa'i gsung byung nas/ rang bzhin med 
367.1(1): pa'i gsung rig pa thabs kyis brgyud pas/ sems can thams cad spro ba skye bar 
367.2(1): gsungs pas so/ /yang na kun gzhi byang chub kyi sems las/ yang dag pa'i bden

373.3(1): 'dus pa med pa dang 'dra ste/ bon nyid nam mkha' dang 'dra bar yangs shing rgya che 
373.4(1): ba de'i snod du mi shong zhing ma 'dus pa med pas so/ /yang na kun gzhi ma g.yos 
373.5(1): pa'i klong dag pa de na/ mi bde ba'i dgra gang yang med la thams cad kyi snod du 
373.6(1): yangs pas so/ /thams cad mkhyen pa'i zhes pa/ kun gzhi ma g.yos pa'i klong dag 
373.7(1): pa de nas/ rang shes rig gi rgyal po byang chub kyi sems kyis sems nyid gsal bar 
373.8(1): rtogs pa'i dus na/ 'di ltar gyi snang ba thams cad nam mkha'i rang bzhin du sale 
373.9(1): mkhyen pas so/ /rnam rtog mi mnga' zhes pa/ gong ma ltar thams cad mkhyen pa de 
373.10(1): la/ mkhyen no ba'i rtog pa las kyang 'das te/ mkhyen la rtog pa rdul kyang med pa'i 
373.11(1): ngang las ma g.yos pa de/ sa le ma yengs pa la bya'o/ /de rtogs mi rtogs zhes pa/
373.12(1): 'dis rtogs tshad dang mthong tsam ston pa ste/ phywa gshen pas brtags pas 'di 
373.13(1): ltar snang ba thams cad thog mar yang bya ba po dang byed pa po yod la/ tha mar yang 
373.14(1): bcos shing bzlog tu yod par rtogs la/ sems kyang gong ma ltar rtogs pa'o/ /
373.15(1): snang gshen pas ni 'di ltar snang ba thams cad lha 'dre dang yas stags su rtogs la/
373.16(1): sems la yang skye shi yod par rtogs so/ /'phrul gshen pas ni/ 'di ltar snang ba 
373.17(1): thams cad dgra dang gnyen por rtogs la/ sems chad par lta ba'o/ /srid gshen 
373.18(1): pas ni 'di ltar snang ba thams cad/ srid pa srid cing bskal pas 'jig par 
373.19(1): rtogs la/ sems ni dum bu gsum du 'chad par rtogs so/ /dge bsnyen pas ni/
373.20(1): 'di ltar snang ba thams cad/ mi rtag sgyu ma'i rang bzhin du rtogs la/ sems ni 
373.21(1): thog ma dang tha ma gnyis su rtogs so/ /drang srong pas ni 'di ltar snang ba thams 
374.1(1): cad/ chags kyang rdul phra rab las chags la/ 'jig kyang rdul phra rab kyis 'jig 
374.2(1): par rtogs/ sems ni stong zhing bya btsal du yod par rtogs pa'o/ /a dkar bas 
374.3(1): ni 'di ltar snang ba thams cad/ lha dang lha mor rtogs/ sems ni yab yum gnyis 
374.4(1): su med pa'i don las/ lhag pa'i byang chub kyi sems bskyed nas/ lha dang lha mor 
374.5(1): grub par 'dod/ ye gshen pas 'di ltar snang ba thams cad/ bdag nyid ting nge 
374.6(1): 'dzin gyi dkyil 'khor du rtogs/ sems ni dus gsum du 'gyur ba med pa las/
374.7(1): gsal ba'i ye shes rang la rang 'char bar rtogs pa'o/ /khyad par bla med pas 'di 
374.8(1): ltar snang ba thams cad ye nas bya btsal dang bral ba'i byang chub kyi sems bde ba 
374.9(1): chen po thig le nyag gcig tu ye nas sangs rgyas par rtogs so/ /'gro ba ris drug 
374.10(1): gi mthong tshad ni/ dmyal bas bltas pas me ma mur gyi 'obs sam/ shal ma ri yi 
374.11(1): sdong po ltar rtogs/ yi dwags gyis bltas pas/ rnag khrag gi mtsho ltar rtogs/ byol 
374.12(1): song gis bltas pas/ rtswa chu ltar rtogs/ mi yis bltas pas/ 'dod pa'i yon tan 
374.13(1): du rtogs/ lha ma yin gyis bltas pas/ ya lad dang go mtshon du rtogs so/ /lha 
374.14(1): yis bltas pas/ longs spyod dang rol mo rtogs so/ /dus gsum gyi gshen rab bla 
374.15(1): na med pa'i 'bras bu thob pa rnams kyis rtogs pas ni/ byang chub kyi sems spros 
374.16(1): pa'i mtshan ma dang bral ba thig le nyag gcig tu rtogs so/ /de phyir rtogs dang ma 
374.17(1): rtogs kyi khyad par che'o/ /de la ma rtogs 'grib ces pa/ ma rtogs na lan cig 
374.18(1): 'grib ste/ nyon mongs pa lnga po 'di rgyu ci las skyes nas/ 'bras bu gang la bsgrib pa 
374.19(1): ston te/ de yang rgyu ni zhe sdang rnam par shes pa'i rgyu las byung ste/ nam mkha'i snying 
374.20(1): po/ gti mug sha yi rgyu las byung ste/ sa yi snying po/ nga rgyal dbugs kyi rgyu las byung 
374.21(1): ste/ rlung gi snying po/ 'phrag dog drod las byung ste/ me yi snying po/ 'dod chags 
375.1(1): khrag las byung ste/ chu yi snying po/ 'bras bu gang la 'grib pa ni/ gsal ba ye shes 
375.2(1): kyi 'bras bu la 'grib par nges pa'o/ /ma rtogs pa ces pas/ lan gcig 'grib 
375.3(1): par kyang bshad/ rgyu zhe sdang la shas che/ rkyen gsad gcod dang srog la 'bags 
375.4(1): nas/ 'bras bu dmyal bar skyes te/ dmyal ba'i gnas na tsha grang gi sdug bsngal 
375.5(1): gyis g.yengs nas/ kun gzhi byang chub kyi sems la 'grib par nges/ rgyu gti mug 
375.6(1): la shas che/ rkyen brdung brtsog dang bskol spyad byas na/ 'bras bu byol song du skye ste/
375.7(1): kun gzhi byang chub kyi sems la 'grib par nges/ rgyu 'dod chags la shas che/ rkyen 
375.8(1): ser sna dang 'jung gegs byas nas/ 'bras bu yi dwags su skye ste/ kun gzhi byang 
375.9(1): chub sems la 'grib par nges/ rgyu nga rgyal la shas che/ rkyen khro gtum dang ra chod 
375.10(1): byas nas/ 'bras bu lha tshe ring por skye ste/ kun gzhi byang chub kyi sems la 'grib 
375.11(1): par nges/ rgyu 'phrag dog la shas che/ rkyen ru nga dang 'thab rtsod byas nas/ 'bras 
375.12(1): bu lha ma yin du skye ste/ kun gzhi byang chub kyi sems la 'grib par nges/ de yang 
375.13(1): don dam par rtogs dang ma rtogs kyi khyad par las byung ba'o/ /rtogs na de ni 
375.14(1): ces pa/ kun gzhi byang chub kyi sems rtogs pa'i dus na/ mi 'grib par ston te/
375.15(1): dper na rgyal po'i dkor khang na/ dkor sna tshogs pa yod pa de yang / sgo lcags kyi 
375.16(1): tha rams kyis bcad na/ dkor yal bar mi 'gro ba dang 'dra ste/ nyon mongs pa lnga 
375.17(1): po de yang / kun gzhi byang chub kyi sems bde ba chen po la dgos pas 'ong ba las/
375.18(1): mi dgos na mi 'ong pa la bya'o/ /dang por lcags btsal ces pa/ sgo lcags de med 
375.19(1): na dang por rgyu yi lcags btsal dgos pa dang 'dra ba na/ kun gzhi byang chub kyi 
375.20(1): sems 'di ma rtogs pa las rtogs par 'dod na/ dang po ka na dpon gsas 
375.21(1): mkhas pa la dad pa bskyed la nyon cig /de nas gyong 'dul ces pa/ dper na 
376.1(1): lcags rdo las gyong pa med pa yang / mgar ba mkhas pas 'dul na gang ltar bya 
376.2(1): bar btub pa dang 'dra ste/ ma rtogs pa'i blo lcags rdo dang 'dra ste/ gyong pa de yang 
376.3(1): gshen rab rtogs pa can gyis bshad cing bkrol na/ rtogs pa can du 'ong ba la 
376.4(1): bya'o/ /thar ni dper na sgo lcags de yang mkhan po mkhas pas thar gyis phyin par 
376.5(1): byas na/ mi 'dzol mi 'chag gzhug par dang 'dra ste/ gshen rab mkhas pas bka' 
376.6(1): zhib la nan tan che bar bshad na/ man ngag rtogs te 'ong ba la bya'o/ /de nas sgo 
376.7(1): lcags gzhug par bya/ ces pa/ rtogs shing goms sam/ lde mig yod na sgo lcags 
376.8(1): de yang dbye ba'am/ gzhug gam gang bya yang gal med pa dang 'dra ste/ sems la 
376.9(1): rig pa shar na/ dug lnga ye shes su gnas 'gyur te/ byang chub kyi sems su ro gcig 
376.10(1): pa la bya'o/ /kun bzang gsang mdzod ces pa/ ston pa kun du bzang po gshen lha 
376.11(1): 'od dkar la rigs kyi kun du bzang po lnga yis bskor ba yi/ gsang mdzod lnga yi 
376.12(1): sgo lcags kyang yin te/ zhe sdang mkha' 'gying dkar po'i thugs/ byams pa chen po 
376.13(1): phyal bar mi 'gro ba'i gsang mdzod kyi sgo lcags/ gti mug gsas rje rmang po yi/
376.14(1): thugs ye shes chen po phyal bar ma 'gro ba'i/ gsang mdzod kyi sgo lcags/ nga rgyal 
376.15(1): gar gsas btsan po yi/ thugs zhi ba chen po phyal bar mi 'gro ba'i gsang mdzod kyi 
376.16(1): sgo lcags/ 'dod chags gnam gsas dbyings rum gyi thugs/ sbyin pa chen po phyal

376.18(1): thugs/ yangs pa chen po phyal bar mi 'gro ba'i gsang mdzod kyi sgo lcags/ byang 
376.19(1): chub sems gsal me long zhes pa/ nyon mongs pa lnga po 'di/ rtogs na byang chub kyi

376.21(1): pa chen po'i byang chub sems/ gsal bar bya ba'i gsal ba'i me long gti mug ye

377.17(1): sems/ nga rgyal bdag nyid chen po'i byang chub sems/ phrag dog gzhan las dpag 
377.18(1): pa'i byang chub sems/ ye shes lnga yang ces pa/ ye ni byang chub kyi sems ye thog ma 
377.19(1): nas yod pa yin la/ shes ni sus kyang ma bslab par/ rang bzhin gyis gsal ba 
377.20(1): yin/ lnga ni zhe sdang stong pa nyid kyi ye shes/ nga rgyal me long lta bu'i ye shes/ gti

391.20(1): rnams ni/ lhun gyis rdzogs pa'i byang chub sems dang 'gyangs nas stor te mi phrad 
391.21(1): pa la bya'o/ /ci bzhin tha rams ces pa/ ci bzhin gyi las ni/ de bzhin nyid byang 
392.1(1): chub sems la 'grib pa yin te/ ma rtogs pa rnams ci bzhin 'khrul pas dam du 
392.2(1): bcings pa la bya'o/ /de 'byed ces pas/ ma rtogs pa ci bzhin 'khrul pa'i blo dang 
392.3(1): ldan pa rnams ni/ de bzhin nyid byang chub sems dang 'gyangs nas/ stor te mi 
392.4(1): 'phrad pa la bya'o/ /'byung 'jug tha rams ces pas/ 'byung 'jug gi las ni/ ye 
392.5(1): nas gnas pa'i byang chub sems la 'grib pa yin te/ ma rtogs pa rnams 'byung 
392.6(1): 'jug gis dam du bcings pa la bya'o/ /de 'byed ces pa/ sems can ma rtogs 
392.7(1): 'byung 'jug 'khrul pa'i blo dang ldan pa rnams ni/ ye nas gnas pa'i byang chub 
392.8(1): sems dang 'gyangs nas stor te mi 'phrad pa la bya'o/ /dus kyi tha rams ces pa/
392.9(1): dus su 'dzin pa'i las ni/ thog ma dang tha ma'i mtha' las 'das te ye nas yod 
392.10(1): pa'i byang chub sems la 'grib pa yin te/ ma rtogs pa rnams dus su 'dzin pas 
392.11(1): dam du bcings pa la bya'o/ /de 'byed ces pas/ ma rtogs pa dus su 'dzin pa 
392.12(1): 'khrul pa'i blo dang ldan pa rnams ni/ thog ma dang tha ma'i mtha' las 'das pa'i 
392.13(1): byang chub sems dang 'gyangs nas/ stor te mi 'phrad pa la bya'o/ /mngon sprul tha 
392.14(1): rams ces pas/ mngon sprul gyi las ni/ ma bcos pa'i byang chub sems la 'grib 
392.15(1): pa yin te/ ma rtogs pa rnams ni mngon sprul gyis dam du bcings pa la bya'o/ /de 
392.16(1): 'byed ces pas/ sems can ma rtogs pa mngon sprul 'khrul pa'i blo dang ldan pa 
392.17(1): rnams ni/ ma bcos pa'i byang chub sems dang 'gyangs nas stor te mi 'phrad pa la 
392.18(1): bya'o/ /rnam rtog tha rams ces pa/ rnam rtog gi las ni/ mi dmigs pa'i byang chub

392.20(1): pa la bya'o/ /de 'byed ces pa/ ma rtogs pa 'khrul pa'i blo dang ldan pa rnams ni/ ci 
392.21(1): yang ma yin pa'i byang chub sems dang 'gyangs nas/ stor te mi 'phrad pa la bya'o/ /
393.1(1): 7 de btsal ba la ni de dbye'o zhes pa/ 'di nas mar ni kun gzhi byang chub kyi 
393.2(1): sems 'phrul gyi lde mig yang 'byed ston te/ thog ma thugs rjes chen po'i byang chub 
393.3(1): sems nas/ tha ma mi dmigs pa'i byang chub sems yan chad kyi don/ rang shes 
393.4(1): rig gi rgyal po kun gzhi byang chub sems kyis rtogs par bya'o/ /nyon mongs pa nas/
393.5(1): rnam par rtogs pa yan chad/ sems nyid thugs rje chen po'i byin gyis brlabs la 
393.6(1): gsal te/ thams cad sems nyid du shes par bya'o/ /thugs rje 'phrul gyi ces pa/
393.7(1): kun gzhi byang chub kyi sems las thugs rje chen po byung pa'i dus na/ nyon mongs 
393.8(1): pa'i las thugs rje chen po'i byang chub sems la 'grib pa bsal nas/ sems nyid 
393.9(1): nyon mongs pa med pa'i ye shes su shar nas/ rang shes rig gi rgyal pos/ thugs rje 
393.10(1): dang nyon mongs pa gnyis su med par rtogs na/ thugs rje'i yang thugs rje chen po'i

393.12(1): byams pa 'phrul ces pas/ kun gzhi byang chub kyi sems la byams pa chen po byung 
393.13(1): ba'i dus na/ zhe sdang gi las byams pa chen po'i byang chub sems la 'grib pa gsal 
393.14(1): nas sems nyid zhe sdang med pa'i ye shes su shar nas/ rang shes rig gi rgyal po 
393.15(1): yis/ zhe sdang dang byams pa gnyis med par sal gyis rtogs pa'i dus na/ byams 
393.16(1): pa'i yang byams pa chen po'i byang chub sems ces pas ming gdags te/ byams pa 
393.17(1): chen po'i klong du gyur pa'o/ /ye shes 'phrul gyi ces pas/ kun gzhi byang chub kyi

393.20(1): nas/ rang shes rig gi rgyal po yis/ gti mug dang ye shes gnyis su med par sal 
393.21(1): gyis rtogs pa'i dus na/ ye shes kyi yang ye shes chen po'i byang chub sems ces ming

401.11(1): 'dzin chags kyi las/ tshad med pa'i byang chub sems la 'grib pa bsal nas/
401.12(1): sems nyid 'dzin chags med pa'i ye shes su shar te/ rang shes rig gi rgyal po yis/
401.13(1): 'dzin chags dang tshad med par gnyis su med par sal gyis rtogs pa'i dus na/
401.14(1): tshad med pa'i yang tshad med pa'i byang chub sems kyi ming de la gdags/ tshad med 
401.15(1): pa'i klong du gyur pa'o/ /ting 'dzin 'phrul gyi ces pas/ kun gzhi byang chub kyi 
401.16(1): sems las/ ting 'dzin gsal bar byung ba'i dus na/ stor bral gyi las ting nge 
401.17(1): 'dzin gyi byang chub sems la 'gribs pa bsal nas/ sems nyid stor bral med 
401.18(1): pa'i ye shes su shar te/ rang shes rig gi rgyal po yis/ stor bral dang ting nge 'dzin 
401.19(1): gnyis su med par sal gyis rtogs pa'i dus na/ ting nge 'dzin gyi yang ting 'dzin 
401.20(1): chen po'i byang chub sems kyi ming de la gdags/ ting nge 'dzin chen po'i klong du 
401.21(1): gyur pa'o/ /grub pa 'phrul gyi ces pas/ kun gzhi byang chub kyi sems las/ ye grub 
402.1(1): chen po byung ba'i dus na/ spongs pa'i las/ grub pa chen po'i byang chub sems la 
402.2(1): 'grib pa bsal nas/sems nyid spong ba med pa'i ye shes su shar te/ rang shes 
402.3(1): rig gi rgyal po yis/spong ba dang grub pa gnyis su med pa'i don sal gyis rtogs 
402.4(1): pa'i dus na/ grub pa'i yang grub pa chen po'i byang chub sems kyi ming de la gdags/
402.5(1): grub pa chen po'i klong du gyur pa'o/ /khyab pa 'phrul gyi ces pas/ kun gzhi byang chub 
402.6(1): kyi sems las/ khyab pa chen po'i don byung ba'i dus na/ mngon mthong gi las/ khyab 
402.7(1): pa chen po'i byang chub sems la 'grib pa bsal nas/ sems nyid mngon mthong
