478.1(1): chub sems zhes bya'o/ /dgos dgu rang la tshang bas ces pa/ byang chub sems bde 
478.2(1): ba chen po las/ yon tan gyi tshogs ma 'gag par rang bzhin du byung bas ni/
478.3(1): gzhan du btsal ba'i rgyu yang ni/ rdul phra rab tsam yang med de/ btsal dang mi 
478.4(1): btsal ba gnyis med pa'i byang chub sems zhes bya'o/ /rtsal gsum rang la rdzogs 
478.5(1): zhes pa/ byang chub sems la dgongs pa zab mo'i rtsal dang / ting nge 'dzin mi 
478.6(1): 'gyur ba'i rtsal dang / ye shes rnon pa'i rtsal dang gsum lhun gyis rdzogs pas/
478.7(1): byang chub sems stobs kyis rgyal por gyur te/ thams cad sems kyis ngang du 'dus 
478.8(1): par 'grub pas/ ma grub pa ye nas mi mnga' ste/ stobs chen rang bzhin shugs kyi 
478.9(1): 'byung ba'i byang chub sems zhes bya'o/ /'khrul pa'i blo byung tshor med ces pa/ byang 
478.10(1): chub sems 'khrul pa'i phyin ci log dang ma 'khrul pa'i gdeng du gyur pas/ sdug 
478.11(1): bsngal gyis byung tshor med do/ /gnod cing 'jigs par byed pa thams cad dang 
478.12(1): bral te/ dgra rnams ye nas med ces bya'o/ /bzod thob rgyal po ces pa/ sra brtan 
478.13(1): mi 'gyur g.yung drung tshe yi rgyal por gnas pas/ mi bzod pa'i sdug bsngal thams 
478.14(1): cad las thar te/ bde ba chen po gzhan las dpag pa'o/ /mnyam pa nyid kyi byang 
478.15(1): chub sems zhes bya'o/ /'od zer rig pa ces pa/ byang chub sems ye shes kyi 'od du 
478.16(1): gyur pas/ gzhan las dpag pa'i gzi brjid byung ste/ snang srid thams cad zil 
478.17(1): gyis gnon pa'i rig pa'i rgyal po des/ bla na med pa yang dag par rdzogs pa'i sa 
478.18(1): rang bzhin gyis gnon pa la bya'o/ /gnod cing 'jigs pa yongs dang ces pas/
478.19(1): byang chub sems yang dag pa'i sa non pa de yang / lha yis mches su med pa la/
478.20(1): 'dre yis bza' ru yang med pa ste/ 'jigs pa yo dang bral ba'i byang chub sems 
478.21(1): ces bya'o/ /mi mnyam mnyam pas mnyam pa chen po'i ces pa/ byang chub sems la 
479.1(1): mnyam pa nyid kyi don ma rtogs pa'i dus na/ mi mnyam pa'i rig pa yod de/
479.2(1): gzugs 'dzin sgyu ma dang / byang chub sems mi mnyam/ gshen rab dang sems 
479.3(1): can mi mnyam/ de las sogs te mi mnyam pa grangs kyi mang na yang / don dam 
479.4(1): par mnyam par chen po byang chub sems rtogs pa'i dus na/ snang zhing srid pas 
479.5(1): bsdus pas thams cad byang chub sems mnyam pa nyid kyi ngang la/ ye nas sangs 
479.6(1): rgyas par rtogs pas/ mnyam pa nyid chen po'i mchog tu gyur pa'i byang chub sems 
479.7(1): zhes bya'o/ /yod med rtag chad gnyis kyi mtha' las 'das ces pas/ dper na 
479.8(1): nam mkha'i rang bzhin ni/ yod ces byar kyang dngos po dang mtshan ma thams cad 
479.9(1): las ye nas 'das la/ med ces byar kyang khams gsum khyab bdal du gnas shing /
479.10(1): thams cad nam mkha'i ngang las byung ste/ yod med gnyis kyi mtha' las 'das pa 
479.11(1): dang 'dra bar na/ byang chub sems bde ba chen po la yang / yod ces byar kyang 
479.12(1): skad cig tsam yang dngos su ma byung la/ med ces byar ni gsal ba ye shes kyi 'od 
479.13(1): du gsal zhing / mnyam pa nyid kyi don las mi 'da' bas/ byang chub sems bde ba 
479.14(1): chen po'i ngang las/ thams cad mnyam pa nyid kyi don du 'dus so/ /thog dang tha ma 
479.15(1): med ces pa/ byang chub sems thog ma gang nas kyang ma 'ong / da lta gar yang mi 
479.16(1): 'gro mi rtsol/ tha ma gang du yang mi 'gro bas/ dus su 'dzin pa thams cad las 
479.17(1): 'das te/ dus mtha' ngang la mnyam pa'i byang chub sems ces bya'o/ /mtha' dbus 
479.18(1): med pas phyogs mtshams ces pa/ dper na nam mkha' la 'di nam mkha'i mtha' 
479.19(1): yin zhes bya ba'am/ 'di nam mkha'i dbus yin zhes bya bar dpag tu med pa dang 
479.20(1): 'dra bar na/ byang chub sems bde ba chen po yang / sems kyi mtha' 'di yin zhes 
479.21(1): bya ba'am/ sems kyi dbus 'di yin zhes bya bar/ dmigs su ye nas med de/ de'i 
480.1(1): phyir na sems la steng 'og med pas/ mtho ba dang dma' ba zhes bya ba yang ye nas 
480.2(1): med de/ sems la phyogs mtshams med pas shar nub bya ba yang ye nas med mtha' 
480.3(1): dbus dang phyogs mtshams thams cad kyi mtha' las 'das pa'i byang chub sems 
480.4(1): zhes bya'o/ /nam mkha'i ngogs bzhin ces pa/ dper nam mkha' dag pa'i rang 
480.5(1): nyi ma'i 'od kyang ma byung ri'i grib ma yang ma byung / nam ni langs nyi ma bzhin ni/
480.6(1): ni ma shar ba'i bar de tsam na ni/ kha dog cir yang mi phyed pa'i 'od cig 'byung ste/
480.7(1): dpe de dang 'dra bar na/ byang chub sems la kha dog 'di yin zhes gdags su med/
480.8(1): kha dog lnga las 'das pa'i byang chub sems zhes bya'o/ /thams cad 'byung zhes pa/
480.9(1): 'byung ba lnga dang snang srid thams cad kyang nam mkha'i ngang las ma byung ba med pa 
480.10(1): dang 'dra bar na/ byang chub sems las lung rgyud man ngag gsum byung ste/ sems 
480.11(1): las ma brgyud pa'i bon med pas rgyud kyi bon thams cad kyang sems kyi ngang la 
480.12(1): mnyam/ sems bde ba chen po ni/ lung gi mnga' bdag yin te/ byang chub sems 
480.13(1): las ma byung ba'i lung zhig gud nas mi 'ong bas/ lung gi bon thams cad kyang 
480.14(1): sems kyi ngang la mnyam/ kun gzhi byang chub sems nam mkha' dang 'dra ba des/
480.15(1): yid dang rnam par shes pa la bden pa'i man ngag bstan nas/ sems kyi rang 
480.16(1): bzhin du shes par bya ba'i don/ thog tu phebs pa'i man ngag las ma rtogs pa/
480.17(1): man ngag ces bya ba zhig gud nas 'ong mi srid pas/ man ngag gi bon thams cad 
480.18(1): sems kyi ngang la mnyam/ de yang don dam par gsum du dbyer med de/ byang chub 
480.19(1): sems bde ba chen po'i don la/ ming so sor gdags par zad do/ /yang dag 
480.20(1): mkha' la mnyam zhes pa/ byang chub sems bde ba chen po gsal ba'i ye shes mkha' 
480.21(1): la/ nyid don nyid kyis rtogs pa'i dus na/ mnyam pa nyid kyi don thams cad 
481.1(1): brtsal ba med par lhun gyis rdzogs pa'o/ /'khrul pa'i rjes su zhes pa/ kun gzhi 
481.2(1): byang chub sems mnyam pa nyid gnyis su med par lhun gyis rdzogs pa'i dus na/
481.3(1): 'khrul pa so so'i phyir du rjes su mi rtog ste/ so sor rtogs pa'i mtha' las 'das 
481.4(1): pa'i byang chub sems ces bya'o/ /sems dang nam mkha'i snod yangs pa ces pa/
481.5(1): dper nam mkha'i snod du mi shong ba cig 'ong mi srid pa dang 'dra bar/ byang chub 
481.6(1): sems kyi snod du yang / 'khor ba dang mya ngan las 'das pa'i bon thams cad mi 
481.7(1): shong par med de/ 'di ltar snang ba thams cad byung yang sems dang nam mkha' 
481.8(1): gnyis su med pa'i ngang las byung / thim yang gnyis su med pa'i ngang la thim pas/
481.9(1): thams cad mnyam pa'i byang chub sems zhes de la bya'o/ /bdal pa chen por gyur pa 
481.10(1): ces pa/ byang chub sems nam mkha' ltar snang srid khyab bdal du gnas pa de/
481.11(1): 'di tsam cig yod do bar dpag tu med pa la bya'o/ /'das pa chen po zhes pa/
481.12(1): kun gzhi byang chub sems ye nas mtshan mar 'dzin pa'i mya ngan las 'das pa ste/
481.13(1): sangs rgyas pa de la tshig dang yi ges ye nas mtshon cing brjod du med pa'o/ /don 
481.14(1): de ltar rtogs pa'i dus na/ mnyam pas yang mnyam pa chen po byang chub sems zhes 
481.15(1): bya'o/ /
481.16(1): 7 zad pa med pa g.yung drung zhes pa/ 'di nas mar ni rig pa dmar thag gi 
481.17(1): lung ston te/ dpe zad pa med pa nam mkha' yin te/ nam mkha'i rang bzhin la 
481.18(1): bskal pa chen po thams cad dus gcig tu byung yang / nam mkha' zad pa med pa 
481.19(1): ste/ nam mkha'i rang bzhin la snang zhing srid pas bsdus pa'i sems can thams 
481.20(1): cad kyang / dga' bder spyad kyang zad pa'i dus mtha' med pas/ dpe zad pa 
481.21(1): med pa'o/ /de la dus gsum du 'gyur ba med pas ni g.yung drung / de la 'chi 'pho 
482.1(1): med pas ni/ 'khor ba'i mtha' las rgyal bas tshe yi rgyal po/ don zad pa med pa ni 
482.2(1): bon nyid/ byang chub sems kyi rtag tu bon la longs spyod che bar byas kyang / bon 
482.3(1): nyid la zad pa med pas don zad pa med pa'o/ /bon nyid bde ba chen po de/ dus 
482.4(1): gsum du 'gyur ba med pas g.yung drung / 'jig pa'i dus mtha' med pas tshe yi bya/
482.5(1): 'khor ba'i bon thams cad la rgyal bas/ bon gyi sgo mo brgyad khri bzhi stong gi/ dpe 
482.6(1): bon nyid kyis bskyed pa ni/ tshe'i rgyal po'o/ /rtags zad pa med pa ni sems nyid/
482.7(1): snang zhing srid pas bsdus pa thams cad las/ gzugs re re blangs nas/ ci snang 
482.8(1): ba sems can du gyur bas kyang / sems nyid la zad pa med la/ yang na rgya mtsho 
482.9(1): gcig gi nang du/ nyi zla dang gza' skar thams cad dus gcig tu shar nas 'dug 
482.10(1): pa la/ rgya mtsho skams kyang nyi zla dang gza' skar la zad pa med pa dang 'dra ba na/
482.11(1): sems can gyi 'khor ba stong kyang sems nyid la zad pa med pa'o/ /zad pa med pa'i 
482.12(1): byang chub sems de/ dus gsum du 'gyur ba med pas g.yung drung / dus gsum du 
482.13(1): 'chi 'pho med pas che'o/ /sems can thams cad 'khor ba'i mtha' las rgyal nas/
482.14(1): sems can gyi dpe'o/ /sems nyid kyis bskyed pas rgyal po/ thams cad kun rtogs 
482.15(1): ces pa/ gong ma ltar zad pa med pa/ g.yung drung tshe'i rgyal po de/ 'di ltar snang ba 
482.16(1): thams cad kyi don rtogs par byed pa/ thams cad kyi bdag po yin la/ bon nyid 
482.17(1): kyi lung thams cad kyang de las byung las/ don de lta bu rtogs na/ bden pa'i yang 
482.18(1): bden pa chen po'i byang chub sems ces bya'o/ /rig pa'i dmar thag ces pa/ rig 
482.19(1): na rang shes rig gi rgyal po byang chub sems nyid kyis nyid rig pa yin la/
482.20(1): ni bde ba chen po byang chub sems kyi don dmar la/ thag ni 'khor ba'i skyon thams 
482.21(1): cad/ de ltar bden pa'i don de sal gyis rtogs pa'i dus na/ skye 'gro thams cad 
483.1(1): kyi mtha' las 'das/ gshen rabs thams cad kyi mchog tu gyur pa la bya'o/ /nyi 
483.2(1): zer ma la 'dus pa ces pa/ dper na nyi ma ri rab kyi phag tu song ba'i dus na/
483.3(1): dmar thag kyang de kho zer thams cad ni nyi ma rang la 'dus nas 'gro ba dang /
483.4(1): nar chad do bya ba dang 'dra bar na/ byang chub sems bde ba chen po de/ mngon par 
483.5(1): rdzogs par sangs rgyas pa'i dus na/ rnam par shes pa brgyad dam/ yul dang shes 
483.6(1): pas bsdus pa thams cad/ byang chub sems bde ba chen po nyid la 'dus la/
483.7(1): dmar ni byang chub sems bde ba chen po dmar la/ thag ni nyon mongs pa dang shes 
483.8(1): bya thams cad gcod do/ /thams cad yid ci la ches pa'i dmar thag ces pa/ yid 
483.9(1): ches pa rnam pa gsum ston te/ de gang zhe na/ lam la yid ches pa dang gcig /
483.10(1): gnas la yid ches pa dang gnyis/ 'bras bu la yid ches pa dang gsum mo/ /de la 
483.11(1): lam la yid ches pa bstan pa ji ltar yin zhe na/ sems can gyi lam ni/ 'khor 
483.12(1): ba'i kha brgyud nas/ skye 'chi dang 'du 'bral las med/ gshen rab bla na med pa 
483.13(1): sangs rgyas pa rnams kyi lam ni/ skye 'gag med pa yin pa'i phyir yid ches te/ de 
483.14(1): yang sems can gyi lam ni 'khor ba la gnas/ 'khor ba chu rgyun 'dra ba las zad 
483.15(1): pa'i dus mtha' med pas/ sdug bsngal las thar pa'i dus mtha' med par yid 
483.16(1): ches la/ gshen rab lam skye 'gag med pa de ni/ bgrod du med par phyin cing /
483.17(1): sdug bsngal dang 'khor ba'i mtha' las 'das par yid ches pas/ lam la yid 
483.18(1): ches pa'o/ /gnas la yid ches pa ni/ sems can gyi gnas la ni/ mtho dman dang 
483.19(1): ra ldog yod de/ gshen rab bla na med pa'i 'bras bu thob pa rnams ni/ gnas 
483.20(1): la mtho dman dang 'pho 'chug ye nas med de/ gnas kyi khyad par de la yid ches 
483.21(1): pa'o/ /'bras bu la yid ches pa ni/ sems can gyi 'bras bu ni/ rtag chad dang bde 
484.1(1): sdug la gnas la/ gshen rab kyi 'bras bu ni/ rtag chad dang bde sdug gi mtha' 
484.2(1): las 'das te/ sangs rgyas pa'i 'bras bu yin te/ khyad par de la yid ches pas/
484.3(1): 'bras bu la yid ches pa'o/ /dmar ni byang chub sems kyi 'bras bu sangs rgyas thob 
484.4(1): pas dmar la/ thag ni rtag chad dang bde sdug gi mtha' las 'das par gcad/
484.5(1): spyod pa'i 'bras bu ni rang shes rig gi rgyal po la smin no/ /smin pa'i don ni/ gsal 
484.6(1): la rang bzhin med pa'i ye shes chen po khyab bdal du gnas pa'o/ /lta ba thams 
484.7(1): cad kyi yid ni/ rtogs dang ma rtogs kyi khyad par ces pa la/ de yang ma rtogs na/
484.8(1): 'khor ba la gnas pa'i sems can du 'gyur la/ rtogs na bla na med par sangs 
484.9(1): rgyas pas yid de la ches pa'o/ /dmar ni rtogs pa chen po'i byang chub sems dmar 
484.10(1): la/ thag ni ma rtogs pa thams cad las 'das par gcad/ lta ba mngon du gyur pa 
484.11(1): ni/ ma rtogs pa ye nas mi mnga' ste/ rtogs pa chen po byang chub sems mngon du 
484.12(1): gyur pa'o/ /dmar ni rtogs pa chen po mngon du gyur pa'i byang chub sems dmar la/
484.13(1): thag ni rtogs pa chen po mngon du gyur pa la sgrib pa mi mnga' ba gcad/ lta ba 
484.14(1): mngon du gyur pa ji ltar gnas zhe na/ rtogs dang ma rtogs gnyis kyi mtha' las 
484.15(1): 'das pa'i byang chub sems bde ba chen por gnas/ dmar ba ni rtogs dang ma 
484.16(1): rtog gnyis kyi mtha' las 'das pas dmar/ thag ni rtogs dang ma rtogs gnyis 
484.17(1): su bzung nas/ rtogs so snyams pa'i shes bya gcad 'on tang na rtogs pa chen po'i 
484.18(1): sgo nas sangs rgyas pa'o/ /rig pa'i yid ci la ches ces pa ni/ byang chub sems bde 
484.19(1): ba chen po rig dang ma rig gnyis kyi khyad par la ches/ ma rig pa'i dbang ni rgan 
484.20(1): mo long ba dang 'dra ste/ khams gsum 'khor zhing gnas la/ rang rig pa'i ye shes 
484.21(1): ni/ nam mkha' la nyi ma shar ba 'dra ste/ yid de la ches/ dmar ni rang rig pa'i 
485.1(1): ye shes dmar la/ thag ni ma rig pa thams cad kyi mtha' las 'das par gcad 
485.2(1): do/ /rig pa mngon du gyur pa ni/ ma rig pa ye nas mi mnga' ste/ rig pa chen po 
485.3(1): mngon du gyur pa'i byang chub sems so/ /dmar ni rig pa mngon du gyur pa'i dmar 
485.4(1): la/ thag ni rig pa chen po'i byang chub sems la 'grib par gcad/ rig pa mngon 
485.5(1): du gyur pa ji ltar gnas pa ni/ rig pa dang ma rig gnyis kyi mtha' las 'das pa'i 
485.6(1): byang chub sems bde ba chen por gnas/ dmar ni rig dang ma rig gnyis kyi 
485.7(1): mtha' las 'das pa'i sems dmar la/ thag ni rig go snyam pa'i shes bya'i g.yo ba 
485.8(1): gcad/ 'on tang na rig pa chen po'i sgo nas sangs rgyas pa'i 'bras bu thob ces 
485.9(1): bya'o/ /ye shes yid ci la ches pa ni/ gsal ba dang rmongs pa gnyis kyi khyad par la 
485.10(1): yid ches pa'o/ /rmongs pa gti mug gi rang bzhin te/ dbyar gyi she'u mun dang 'dra 
485.11(1): ba la/ ye shes ji ltar gsal ba ste/ nyi ma sprin gyis ma bsgribs pa dang 'dra ste/
485.12(1): de'i khyad par la yid ches pa'o/ /dmar ni ye shes chen po'i byang chub sems dmar 
485.13(1): la/ thag ni gti mug mun pa'i mtha' las 'das par gcad/ ye shes mngon du 
485.14(1): gyur pa ni/ mi gsal ba ye nas mi mnga' ste/ gsal ba ye shes su mngon du gyur 
485.15(1): pa'o/ /dmar ni ye shes mngon du gyur pa'i dmar la/ thag ni ye shes mngon du gyur 
485.16(1): pa la 'grib pa gcad/ ye shes mngon du gyur pa ji ltar gnas zhe na/ gsal dang 
485.17(1): mi gsal ba gnyis kyi mtha' las 'das par gnas/ dmar ni gsal dang mi 
485.18(1): gsal gnyis kyi mtha' las 'das pa'i sems dmar/ thag ni gsal lo snyams pa'i 
485.19(1): shes bya dang rtog pa gcad/ 'on tang na gsal ba ye shes sgo nas sangs rgyas pa'i 
485.20(1): 'bras bu thob pa'o/ /shes rab yid ci la ches pa'i dmar thag ni/ 'khrul pa dang 
485.21(1): shes rab gnyis kyi don la yid ches/ dmar ni shes rab chen po byang chub sems 
486.1(1): dmar/ thag ni 'khrul pa thams cad kyi mtha' las 'das par gcad/ shes rab 
486.2(1): mngon du gyur pa ni/ 'khrul pa ye nas mi mnga' ste/ shes rab chen po'i sems su 
486.3(1): mngon du gyur pa'o/ /dmar ni shes rab chen po mngon du gyur pa'i dmar la/ thag 
486.4(1): ni shes rab chen po mngon du gyur pa la 'grib pa gcad/ shes rab mngon du gyur pa 
486.5(1): ji ltaraganas pa ni/ 'khrul pa dang shes rab gnyis kyi mtha' las 'das pa'i byang 
486.6(1): chub sems su gnas/ 'on tang na shes rab chen po'i sgo nas sangs rgyas pa'i 
486.7(1): 'bras bu thob ces bya'o/ /stobs kyi yid ci la ches pa ni/ grub pa dang ma grub pa 
486.8(1): gnyis kyi khyad par la yid ches/ dmar ni stobs chen shugs kyis 'byung ba'i sems 
486.9(1): dmar/ thag ni ma nus pa dang grub pa med pa'i mtha' las 'das par gcad/
486.10(1): stobs mngon du gyur pa ni/ ma grub pa ye nas mi mnga' ste/ grub pa chen po'i byang 
486.11(1): chub sems su mngon du gyur pa'o/ /dmar ni grub pa chen po'i mngon du gyur pa'i 
486.12(1): sems dmar/ thag ni grub pa chen po'i mngon du gyur pa'i sems la 'grib pa 
486.13(1): gcad/ stobs mngon du gyur pa ji ltar gnas pa ni gyur pa dang / ma grub pa 
486.14(1): gnyis su med pa'i byang chub sems su gnas so/ /dmar ni grub pa dang ma grub pa 
486.15(1): gnyis su med pa'i sems dmar/ thag ni grub bo snyams pa'i shes bya thag gcad/
486.16(1): 'on tang na grub pa'i sgo nas sangs rgyas pa'i 'bras bu grub pa'o/ /thig le'i yid ci 
486.17(1): la ches pa ni/ byang chub kyi sems thig le nyag gcig ma dang / kun 'byung gi khyad 
486.18(1): par la yid ches/ dmar ni byang chub sems thig le nyag gcig ma dmar la/ thag 
486.19(1): ni kun 'byung thams cad kyi mtha' las 'das par gcod/ thig le mngon du gyur 
486.20(1): pa ni/ kun 'byung ye nas mi mnga' ste/ thig le chen po nyag gcig tu mngon du gyur 
486.21(1): pa'o/ /dmar ni thig le mngon du gyur pa'i sems dmar/ thag ni thig le mngon du 
487.1(1): gyur pa la 'grib pa gcad/ thig le mngon du gyur pa ji ltar gnas pa'i ces pa/
487.2(1): kun 'byung dang thig le gnyis kyi mtha' las 'das pa'i byang chub sems su gnas/
487.3(1): dmar ni mtha' las 'das pa'i thig le chen po'i sems dmar/ thag ni thig le 
487.4(1): chen po rang la yod do snyams pa'i thag gcad/ 'on tang na thig le chen po'i sgo nas 
487.5(1): sangs rgyas pa'i 'bras bu thob pa'o/ /dgongs pa'i yid ci la ches pa ni/ dgongs 
487.6(1): pa zab mo dang g.yo rtsol gnyis kyi khyad par la yid ches pa'o/ /dmar ni dgongs 
487.7(1): pa zab mo'i sems dmar/ thag ni g.yo zhing rtsol bar byed pa thams cad gcad/
487.8(1): dgongs pa mngon du gyur pa ni/ g.yo rtsol ye nas mi mnga' ste/ dgongs pa zab 
487.9(1): mo'i don mngon du gyur pa'o/ /dmar ni dgongs pa mngon du gyur pa'i sems 
487.10(1): dmar/ thag ni dgongs pa mngon du gyur pa'i sems la 'grib pa gcad/ dgongs 
487.11(1): pa mngon du gyur pa ji ltar gnas pa ni/ bsam rtog gnyis kyi mtha' las 'das 
487.12(1): pa'i byang chub sems su gnas/ dmar ni bsam rtog gnyis kyi mtha' las 'das 
487.13(1): pa'i byang chub sems dmar/ thag ni dgongs pa lhun gyis grub bo snyams pa'i shes 
487.14(1): bya thag gcad/ 'on tang na dgongs pa zab mo'i sgo nas 'bras bu thob ces bya'o/ /
487.15(1): ting nge 'dzin gyi yid ci la ches pa ni/ ting nge 'dzin gsal ba'i sems dang /
487.16(1): 'gyur ldog 'khrul pa'i khyad par la yid ches/ dmar ni ting nge 'dzin gsal ba'i 
487.17(1): byang chub sems dmar/ thag ni 'gyur ldog byed pa'i blo las 'das par gcad/
487.18(1): ting nge 'dzin mngon du gyur pa ni/ 'gyur ldog ye nas mi mnga' ste/ ting nge 'dzin 
487.19(1): zab mo mngon du gyur pa'o/ /dmar ni ting nge 'dzin zab mo gsal ba'i byang chub 
487.20(1): sems dmar/ thag ni ting nge 'dzin zab mo mngon du gyur pa'i byang chub sems la 
487.21(1): 'grib pa gcad/ ting nge 'dzin mngon du gyur pa ji ltar gnas pa ni/ 'gyur ba 
488.1(1): dang mi 'gyur ba gnyis kyi mtha' las 'das pa'i sems su gnas/ dmar ni 'gyur 
488.2(1): ba dang mi 'gyur ba'i mtha' las 'das pa'i sems dmar/ thag ni mi 'gyur ba la 
488.3(1): gsal lo snyams pa'i shes bya gcad/ 'on tang na ting nge 'dzin gsal ba'i sgo nas 
488.4(1): 'bras bu thob ces bya'o/ /lam gyi yid ci la ches pa'i dmar thag ni/ 'khor ba dang 
488.5(1): bgrod du med pa la yid ches/ dmar ni bgrod du med pa'i lam dmar/ thag ni 
488.6(1): 'khor ba rgyu drug gi thag gcad/ lam ni rnam pa thams cad mngon du gyur pa ni/
488.7(1): 'khor ba ye nas mi mnga' ste/ thar pa chen po'i sems mngon du gyur pa'o/ /dmar 
488.8(1): ni thar pa chen po'i sems dmar/ thag ni thar pa chen po'i sems la 'grib pa 
488.9(1): gcad/ lam gyi rnam pa thams cad mngon du gyur pa ji ltar gnas pa ni/ thar pa 
488.10(1): dang 'khor ba'i mtha' las 'das pa'i byang chub sems su gnas pa'o/ /dmar ni 
488.11(1): mtha' las 'das pa'i sems dmar/ thag ni thar ro snyams pa'i shes bya gcad/
488.12(1): 'on tang na 'khor ba bgrod du med pa'i sgo nas mya ngan las 'das pa'i 'bras bu 
488.13(1): thob ces bya'o/ /rgyu 'bras thams cad yid ci la ches pa'i dmar thag ni/ rgyu mi rtag 
488.14(1): pa dang 'bras bu g.yung drung gnyis kyi khyad par la yid ches/ dmar ni 'bras bu 
488.15(1): g.yung drung chen po'i sems dmar/ thag ni rgyu mi rtag pa gzugs kyi phung po gcad/
488.16(1): rgyu 'bras mngon du gyur pa ni/ gzung 'dzin thams cad dang bral ba'i byang chub 
488.17(1): sems mngon du gyur pa'o/ /dmar ni gzung 'dzin dang bral ba'i byang chub sems 
488.18(1): dmar/ thag ni gzung 'dzin dang bral lo snyams pa'i shes bya gcad/ rgyu 'bras 
488.19(1): mngon du gyur pa ji ltar gnas pa ni/ rgyu 'bras gnyis su med pa'i byang chub kyi 
488.20(1): sems bde ba chen po/ lhun gyis grub par gnas pa'o/ /dmar ni rgyu 'bras gnyis 
488.21(1): su med pa'i sems dmar/ thag ni dmar ro snyams pa'i shes bya gcad/ 'on tang 
489.1(1): na 'bras bu g.yung drung gi sgo nas 'bras bu thob ces bya'o/ /snang srid thams cad 
489.2(1): yid ci la ches pa'i dmar thag ni/ snang srid thams cad mi rtag pa la yid ches/
489.3(1): dmar ni nam mkha' stong zhing bdag med pa dmar/ thag ni 'byung ba dang snang 
489.4(1): srid mi rtag pa gcad/ snang srid mngon du gyur pa ni/ nam mkha'i rang bzhin las 
489.5(1): gzhan ci yang mi snang bar mngon du gyur pa'o/ /dmar ni snang ba med pa'i nam 
489.6(1): mkha' dmar/ thag ni snang ba med pa la snang ba g.yo ba gcad/ snang srid mngon du 
489.7(1): dmar ni mtha' las 'das pa'i klong dmar/ thag ni bskal pa dang srid pa thams 
489.8(1): yod med gnyis kyi mtha' las 'das te gnas/gyur pa ji ltar gnas pa ni/
489.9(1): cad gcad/ 'on tang na nam mkha' snang la rang bzhin med pa rtogs pa'i sgo nas 
489.10(1): 'bras bu thob ces bya'o/ / /bzod pa thams cad yid ci la ches pa ni/ bde sdug 
489.11(1): gnyis kyi khyad par la ches/ dmar ni bzod pa chen po'i byang chub sems dmar/
489.12(1): thag ni sdug bsngal dang dgra tshogs thams cad gcad/ bzod pa mngon du gyur pa 
489.13(1): ni/ dgra tshogs ye nas mi mnga' ste/ bzod thob rgyal po'i sems su mngon du gyur 
489.14(1): pa'o/ //dmar ni bzod thob mngon du gyur pa'i sems dmar/ thag ni bzod thob 
489.15(1): mngon du gyur pa la sgrib pa gcad/ bzod pa mngon du gyur pa ji ltar gnas pa ni/
489.16(1): byung tshor gnyis kyi mtha' las 'das pa'i byang chub sems su gnas/ dmar ni byung 
489.17(1): tshor med pa'i sems dmar/ thag ni bzod pa thob bo snyams pa thag gcad/ 'on 
489.18(1): tang na bzod pa chen po'i sgo nas 'bras bu thob ces bya'o/ /thugs rje chen po'i yid 
489.19(1): ci la ches pa ni/ nyon mongs pa dang thugs rje gnyis kyi khyad par la yid ches/
489.20(1): dmar ni thugs rje chen po dang ldan pa'i byang chub sems dmar/ thag ni nyon 
489.21(1): mongs pa brgyad khri bzhi stong bcad/ thugs rje mngon du gyur pa ni/ nyon mongs pa 
490.1(1): ye nas mi mnga' ste/ thugs rje chen po dpag tu med pa'i byang chub sems su gyur 
490.2(1): pa'o/ /dmar ni dpag tu med pa'i byang chub sems dmar/ thag ni thugs rje chen 
490.3(1): po dang ldan pa'i sems la 'grub pa gcad/ thugs rje chen po mngon du gyur pa ji 
490.4(1): ltar gnas pa ni/ nyon mongs pa dang thugs rje 'dzin pa thams cad kyi mtha' las 
490.5(1): 'das par gnas pa/ dmar ni nyon mongs pa dang thugs rje gnyis kyi mtha' las 
490.6(1): 'das pa'i sems dmar/ thag ni thugs rje chen po dang ldan no snyams pa'i shes bya 
490.7(1): gcad/ 'on tang na thugs rje chen po'i sgo nas sangs rgyas pa'i 'bras bu thob ces 
490.8(1): bya'o/ /sbyin pa thams cad yid ci la ches pa ni/ nyon mongs pa'i 'dod chags dang /
490.9(1): sbyin pa chen po'i sems kyi khyad par la yid ches/ dmar ni sbyin pa chen po'i byang 
490.10(1): chub sems dmar/ thag ni nyon mongs pa'i 'dod chags thams cad gcad/ sbyin 
490.11(1): pa mngon du gyur pa ni/ 'dod chags ye nas mi mnga' ba'i byang chub sems mngon 
490.12(1): du gyur pa'o/ /dmar ni 'dod chags mi mnga' ba'i sems dmar/ thag ni de la 
490.13(1): 'grib pa'i thag gcad/ sbyin pa mngon du gyur pa ji ltar gnas pa ni/ 'dod 
490.14(1): chags dang sbyin pa gnyis su 'dzin pa'i mtha' las 'das te gnas/ dmar ni 
490.15(1): 'dod chags dang sbyin pa'i mtha' las 'das pa'i sems dmar/ thag ni 'dod 
490.16(1): chags dang sbyin pa gnyis kyi mtha' las 'das so snyams pa'i thag gcad/ 'on tang 
490.17(1): na sbyin pa chen po'i sgo nas 'bras bu thob zhes bya'o/ /man ngag thams cad yid ci 
490.18(1): la ches pa ni/ byang chub kyi sems gtan la phab pa dang / ma phab pa gnyis la yid 
490.19(1): ches/ dmar ni byang chub kyi sems thog tu pheb pas dmar/ thag ni ma yin pas 
490.20(1): bslu ba gcad/ man ngag mngon du gyur pa ni/ ma yin pas bslu ba med pa'i byang 
490.21(1): chub sems mngon du gyur pa'o// /dmar ba ni ma yin pas bslu ba med pa'i byang 
491.1(1): chub sems dmar ba'o/ /thag ni de la 'grib pa gcad/ man ngag mngon du gyur pa 
491.2(1): ji ltar gnas pa ni/ man ngag dang man ngag ma yin pa gnyis kyi mtha' las 'das 
491.3(1): te gnas pa'o/ /dmar ni mtha' las 'das pa'i sems dmar/ thag ni man ngag 
491.4(1): gdeng gi chod do snyams pa'i thag gcad/ 'on tang na man ngag thog tu phebs pa'i 
491.5(1): sgo nas 'bras bu thob ces bya'o/ /dam tshig thams cad yid ci la ches pa ni/ dam 
491.6(1): tshig blang dor dang srung du med pa'i khyad par la yid ches/ dmar ni ye srung chen 
491.7(1): po'i byang chub sems dmar/ thag ni dam tshig blang dor thams cad gcad/ dam 
491.8(1): tshig mngon du gyur pa ni/ blang dor med pa'i byang chub sems dmar du gyur pa'o/ /
491.9(1): dmar ni blang dor med pa'i byang chub sems dmar/ thag ni de las 'grib pa 
491.10(1): gcad/ dam tshig mngon du gyur pa ji ltar gnas pa ni/ bsrung ba dang mi bsrung ba 
491.11(1): gnyis kyi mtha' las 'das pa'i byang chub sems su gnas/ dmar ni bsrung dang 
491.12(1): ma bsrung gnyis kyi mtha' las 'das pa'i sems dmar/ thag ni srung du med do 
491.13(1): snyams pa'i shes bya gcad/ 'on tang na ye srung chen po'i sgo nas 'bras bu thob ces 
491.14(1): bya'o/ /smon lam thams cad yid ci la ches pa ni/ re smon 'cha' ba dang re dogs 
491.15(1): med pa'i byang chub sems kyi khyad par la yid ches/ dmar ni re dogs med pa'i 
491.16(1): byang chub sems dmar/ thag ni de la 'grib pa gcad/ smon lam thams cad 
491.17(1): mngon du gyur pa ni/ re ba dang dogs pa med pa'i byang chub sems su mngon du 
491.18(1): gyur pa'o/ /dmar ba ni re smon dang bral ba'i sems dmar/ thag ni de la 'grib pa 
491.19(1): gcad/ smon lam mngon du gyur pa ji ltar gnas pa ni/ re dogs med pa dang re 
491.20(1): smon 'cha' ba gnyis kyi mtha' las 'das te gnas/ dmar ni mtha' las 'das 
491.21(1): pa'i sems dmar/ thag ni re dogs med do snyams pa'i shes bya gcad/ 'on tang 
492.1(1): na re dogs med pa'i sgo nas 'bras bu thob ces bya'o/ /byams pa thams cad yid ci 
492.2(1): la ches pa'i dmar thag ni/ zhe sdang dang byams pa gnyis kyi khyad par la yid ches/
492.3(1): dmar ni byams pa chen po'i byang chub sems dmar/ thag ni zhe sdang gi gdug pa 
492.4(1): gcad/ byams pa mngon du gyur pa ni/ zhe sdang ye nas mi mnga' ba'i byang chub 
492.5(1): sems su gyur pa'o/ /dmar ni zhe sdang mi mnga' ba'i byang chub sems dmar/ thag 
492.6(1): ni zhe sdang mi mnga' ba'i sems la 'grib pa gcad/ byams pa mngon du gyur pa ji 
492.7(1): ltar gnas pa ni/ zhe sdang byams pa gnyis kyi mtha' las 'das te gnas/ dmar 
492.8(1): ni byams sdang gnyis kyi mtha' las 'das pa'i sems dmar/ thag ni byams sdang 
492.9(1): gnyis kyi mtha' las 'das so snyams pa gcad/ 'on tang na byams pa chen po'i sgo 
492.10(1): nas 'bras bu thob ces bya'o/ /zhi ba thams cad yid ci la ches pa ni/ zhi ba dang nga 
492.11(1): rgyal gyi khyad par la yid ches/ dmar ni zhi ba chen po'i byang chub sems dmar/
492.12(1): thag ni nyon mongs pa'i nga rgyal gcad/ zhi ba mngon du gyur pa ni/ nga rgyal ye nas 
492.13(1): mi mnga' ba'i byang chub sems su mngon du gyur pa'o/ /dmar ni nga rgyal mi mnga' 
492.14(1): ba'i byang chub sems dmar/ thag ni nga rgyal med pa'i byang chub sems la 'grib pa 
492.15(1): gcad/ zhi ba mngon du gyur pa ji ltar gnas pa ni/ nga rgyal dang zhi ba gnyis kyi 
492.16(1): mtha' las 'das par gnas/ dmar ni nga rgyal dang zhi ba gnyis kyi mtha' las 
492.17(1): 'das pa'i sems dmar/ thag ni mtha' las 'das so snyams pa'i shes bya gcad/
492.18(1): 'on tang na zhi ba chen po'i sgo nas 'bras bu thob ces bya'o/ /gsal ba thams cad 
492.19(1): yid ci la ches pa ni/ gsal ba dang rmongs pa gnyis kyi khyad par la yid ches/
492.20(1): dmar ni gsal ba chen po'i byang chub sems dmar/ thag ni nyon mongs pa'i rmongs 
492.21(1): pa gcad/ gsal ba mngon du gyur pa ni/ rmongs pa ye nas mi mnga' ba'i byang chub 
493.1(1): sems su mngon du gyur pa'o/ /dmar ni rmongs pa mi mnga' ba'i sems dmar/
493.2(1): thag ni rmongs pa med pa'i sems la 'grib pa gcad/ gsal ba mngon du gyur pa ji 
493.3(1): ltar gnas pa ni/ gsal ba dang rmongs pa gnyis kyi mtha' las 'das par gnas/
493.4(1): dmar ni gsal ba dang rmongs pa gnyis kyi mtha' las 'das pa'i sems dmar/
493.5(1): thag ni gsal lo snyams pa'i shes bya gcad/ 'on tang na gsal ba chen po'i sgo nas 
493.6(1): 'bras bu thob ces bya'o/ /yangs pa thams cad yid ci la ches pa ni/ yangs pa dang 
493.7(1): phrag dog gnyis kyi khyad par la yid ches/ dmar ni yangs pa chen po'i byang chub 
493.8(1): sems dmar/ thag ni nyon mongs pa'i phrag dog gcad/ yangs pa mngon du gyur 
493.9(1): pa ni/ phrag dog ye nas mi mnga' ba'i byang chub sems su mngon du gyur pa'o/ /
493.10(1): dmar ni phrag dog ye nas mi mnga' ba'i byang chub sems dmar/ thag ni yangs pa 
493.11(1): chen po'i byang chub sems la 'grib pa gcad/ yangs pa mngon du gyur pa ji ltar 
493.12(1): gnas pa ni/ yangs pa dang phrag dog gnyis kyi mtha' las 'das pa'i byang chub 
493.13(1): sems su gnas/ dmar ba ni yangs pa dang phrag dog gnyis kyi mtha' las 'das 
493.14(1): pa'i byang chub sems dmar/ thag ni yangs pa dang phrag dog gnyis kyi mtha' las 
493.15(1): 'das so snyam pa gcad/ 'on tang na yangs pa chen po'i sgo nas 'bras bu thob ces 
493.16(1): bya'o/ /yon tan thams cad yid ci la ches pa ni/ byang chub sems kyi yon tan 
493.17(1): dang / gzugs 'dzin gyi khyad par la yid ches/ dmar ni yon tan chen po'i byang 
493.18(1): chub sems dmar/ thag ni gzugs 'dzin gyi skyon gcad/ yon tan mngon du gyur 
493.19(1): pa ni/ gzugs 'dzin skyon dang bral nas/ byang chub sems su mngon du gyur pa'o/ /
493.20(1): dmar ni gzugs 'dzin dang bral ba'i byang chub sems dmar/ thag ni gzugs 
493.21(1): 'dzin skyon dang bral ba'i byang chub sems la 'grib pa gcad/ yon tan mngon du 
494.1(1): gyur pa ji ltar gnas pa ni/ skyon dang yon tan gnyis su 'dzin pa'i mtha' las 
494.2(1): 'das pa'i byang chub sems su gnas/ dmar ni skyon dang yon tan las 'das pa'i 
494.3(1): sems dmar/ thag ni skyon dang yon tan gnyis kyi mtha' las 'das so snyams pa'i 
494.4(1): shes bya gcad/ 'on tang na yon tan chen po'i sgo nas 'bras bu thob ces bya'o/ /
494.5(1): phrin las thams cad yid ci la ches pa ni/ lhun gyis grub pa dang rtsol ba gnyis kyi 
494.6(1): khyad par la yid ches/ dmar ni lhun gyis grub pa'i byang chub sems dmar/ thag 
494.7(1): ni sgyu ma'i las dang rtsol ba gcad/ 'phrin las mngon du gyur pa ni/ rtsol ba med 
494.8(1): pa lhun gyis grub pa'i byang chub sems su gnas/ dmar ni rtsol ba dang bral ba'i 
494.9(1): byang chub sems dmar/ thag ni sgyu ma'i las rtsol ba thams cad gcad/ phrin las 
494.10(1): mngon du gyur pa ji ltar gnas pa ni/ rtsol ba dang mi rtsol ba gnyis su med pa'i 
494.11(1): byang chub sems su gnas/ dmar ni rtsol ba dang mi rtsol ba'i mtha' las 'das 
494.12(1): pa'i sems dmar/ thag ni rtsol ba dang mi rtsol ba gnyis kyi mtha' las 'das so 
494.13(1): snyams pa gcad/ 'on tang na lhun gyis grub pa'i sgo nas 'bras bu thob ces bya'o/ /
494.14(1): sku thams cad yid ci la ches pa ni/ g.yung drung sku mi 'gyur ba dang / sgyu ma'i 
494.15(1): gzugs 'chi 'pho byed pa'i khyad par la yid ches/ dmar ni g.yung drung mi 'gyur 
494.16(1): ba'i sku dmar/ thag ni gzugs 'dzin sgyu ma 'chi 'pho byed pa gcad/ sku mngon du 
494.17(1): gyur pa ni/ dus gsum du 'gyur ba med pa'i sku gzugs 'dzin dang bral ba'o/ /
494.18(1): dmar ni dus gsum du 'gyur ba med pa'i sku dmar/ thag ni 'gyur ba med pa'i sku 
494.19(1): la 'grib pa gcad/ sku mngon du gyur pa ji ltar gnas pa ni/ 'gyur ba dang mi 
494.20(1): 'gyur ba gnyis su med pa'i mtha' las 'das pa'i byang chub sems su gnas/
494.21(1): dmar ni mtha' las 'das pa'i byang chub sems dmar/ thag ni 'gyur ba dang mi 
495.1(1): 'gyur ba gnyis kyi mtha' las 'das so snyams pa'i shes bya thag gcad/ 'on tang 
495.2(1): na g.yung drung mi 'gyur ba'i sgo nas 'bras bu thob ces bya'o/ /gsung thams cad 
495.3(1): yid ci la ches pa'i dmar thag ni/ sgra ru grags pa dang rang bzhin med pa'i khyad 
495.4(1): par la yid ches/ dmar ni byang chub sems kyi gsung rang bzhin med pa dmar/
495.5(1): thag ni nga rgyal las 'byung ba bdag dang gzhan du 'dzin pa gcad/ gsung mngon 
495.6(1): du gyur pa ni/ rang bzhin med pa'i gsung du mngon du gyur pa'o/ /dmar ni rang 
495.7(1): bzhin med pa'i byang chub sems dmar/ thag ni de las 'grib pa gcad/ gsung 
495.8(1): mngon du gyur pa ji ltar gnas pa ni/ sgra ru grags pa dang / rang bzhin med pa'i 
495.9(1): mtha' las 'das te gnas/ dmar ni mtha' las 'das pa'i byang chub sems 
495.10(1): dmar/ thag ni sgra ru grags pa dang / rang bzhin med pa gnyis kyi mtha' las 
495.11(1): 'das so snyams pa'i shes bya gcad/ 'on tang na gsung rang bzhin med pa'i sgo 
495.12(1): nas 'bras bu thob ces bya'o/ /thugs yid ci la ches pa ni/ mnyam nyid 'khrul pa 
495.13(1): med pa'i thugs dang / nyon mongs pa la phyir ldog pa'i khyad par la yid ches/
495.14(1): dmar ni mnyam nyid 'khrul pa med pa'i thugs dmar/ thag ni nyon mongs pa la 
495.15(1): phyir ldog pa gcad/ thugs mngon du gyur pa ni/ nyon mongs pa la phyir mi ldog pa'i 
495.16(1): byang chub sems su gnas pa'o/ / /dmar ni nyon mongs pa las phyir mi ldog pa'i 
495.17(1): sems dmar/ thag ni nyon mongs pa la phyir mi ldog pa'i 'grib pa gcad/ thugs 
495.18(1): mngon du gyur pa ji ltar gnas pa ni/ phyir ldog pa dang mi ldog pa gnyis kyi mtha' 
495.19(1): las 'das pa'i thugs nyid nam mkha' dang 'dra bar gnas/ dmar ni ldog pa 
495.20(1): dang mi ldog pa gnyis kyi mtha' las 'das pa dmar/ thag ni thugs nyid nam 
495.21(1): mkha' dang 'dra ba rtogs so/ /snyams pa thag gcad/ 'on tang mnyam nyid 'khrul 
496.1(1): pa med pa'i sgo nas 'bras bu thob ces bya'o/ /thabs dang rdzu 'phrul yid ci la ches 
496.2(1): pa ni/ thabs dang rdzu 'phrul dang ldan pa'i byang chub sems dang / thabs med shes 
496.3(1): rab dang bral ba gnyis la yid ches/ dmar ni byang chub sems thabs dang rdzu 
496.4(1): 'phrul dang ldan pa'i sems dmar/ thag ni thabs med 'khrul pa'i blo gcad/
496.5(1): thabs dang rdzu 'phrul mngon du gyur pa ni/ thabs chen dbyings la rol pa'i byang 
496.6(1): chub sems su mngon du gyur pa'o/ /dmar ni thabs chen dbyings la rol pa'i byang 
496.7(1): chub sems dmar/ thag ni de la 'grib pa gcad/ thabs dang rdzu 'phrul mngon du 
496.8(1): gyur pa ji ltar gnas pa ni/ thabs dang thabs med gnyis su med pa'i mtha' las 
496.9(1): 'das par gnas/ dmar ni mtha' las 'das pa'i byang chub sems dmar/ thag 
496.10(1): ni rtogs so snyams pa'i shes bya gcad/ 'on tang na rdzu 'phrul dang ldan pa'i sgo nas 
496.11(1): 'bras bu thob ces bya'o/ /brtson 'grus thams cad yid ci la ches pa ni/ brtson 
496.12(1): 'grus chen po'i byang chub sems dang / btang snyoms 'khrul pa'i blo la yid ches/
496.13(1): dmar ni bla na med par phyin pa'i sems dmar/ thag ni btang snyoms 'khrul pa 
496.14(1): thams cad gcad/ brtson 'grus mngon du gyur pa ni/ btang snyoms ye nas mi 
496.15(1): mnga' ba'i byang chub sems su mngon du gyur pa'o/ /dmar ni btang snyoms med 
496.16(1): pa'i sems dmar/ thag ni de la 'grib pa gcad/ brtson 'grus mngon du gyur pa 
496.17(1): ji ltar gnas pa ni/ btang snyoms dang brtson 'grus gnyis su 'dzin pa'i mtha' 
496.18(1): las 'das te gnas/ dmar ni btang snyoms dang brtson 'grus gnyis kyi mtha' 
496.19(1): las 'das pa'i sems dmar/ thag ni mtha' las 'das so snyams pa'i shes bya 
496.20(1): gcad/ 'on tang na bla na med par phyin pa'i sgo nas 'bras bu thob ces bya'o/ /spyod 
496.21(1): pa thams cad yid ci la ches pa'i dmar thag ni/ rnam par dag pa dang ma dag pa 
497.1(1): gnyis kyi don la yid ches/ dmar ba ni rnam par dag pa'i byang chub sems dmar/
497.2(1): thag ni sgyu ma'i las rnam par dag pa gcad/ spyod pa mngon du gyur pa ni/ rnam 
497.3(1): par ma dag pa ye nas mi mnga' ba'i sems mngon du gyur pa'o//dmar ni rnam 
497.4(1): par ma dag pa ye nas mi mnga' ba'i byang chub sems dmar/ thag ni de la 'grib 
497.5(1): pa gcad/ spyod pa mngon du gyur pa ji ltar gnas pa ni/ rnam par dag pa dang ma 
497.6(1): dag pa gnyis su 'dzin pa'i mtha' las 'das par gnas/ dmar ni dag dang ma 
497.7(1): dag gnyis kyi mtha' las 'das pa'i sems dmar/ thag ni de ltar rtogs so 
497.8(1): snyams pa'i thag gcad/ 'on tang na rnam par dag pa'i sgo nas 'bras bu thob ces 
497.9(1): bya'o/ /bden pa thams cad yid ci la ches pa ni/ bden pa chen po'i byang chub 
497.10(1): sems dang log par lta ba'i khyad par la yid ches/ dmar ni bden pa chen po'i 
497.11(1): byang chub sems dmar/ thag ni log par lta ba gcad/ bden pa mngon du gyur pa 
497.12(1): ni/ log par lta ba ye nas mi mnga' ba'i byang chub sems su gyur pa'o/ /dmar ni 
497.13(1): log par 'khrul pa mi mnga' ba'i byang chub sems dmar/ thag ni de la 'grib 
497.14(1): gcad/ bden pa mngon du gyur pa ji ltar gnas pa ni/ log par lta ba dang bden 
497.15(1): par rtogs pa gnyis kyi mtha' las 'das pa'i sems su gnas/ dmar ni bden 
497.16(1): pa dang log par lta ba gnyis kyi mtha' las 'das pa'i byang chub sems dmar/
497.17(1): thag ni 'das so snyams pa'i shes bya gcad/ 'on tang na bden pa chen po'i sgo nas 
497.18(1): 'bras bu thob pa'o/ /dpe thams cad yid ci la ches pa ni/ byang chub sems kyi dpe 
497.19(1): nam mkhas mtshon pa dang / mtshan mar 'dzin pa la yid ches/ dmar ni nam 
497.20(1): mkhas mtshon pa'i byang chub sems dmar/ thag ni mtshan mar 'dzin pa thams cad 
497.21(1): gcad/ dpe mngon du gyur pa ni/ byang chub sems gzhan gyis mtshon du med pa 
498.1(1): mngon par gyur pa'o/ /dmar ni mtshon du med pa'i sems dmar/ thag ni de la 
498.2(1): 'grib pa gcad/ dpe mngon du gyur pa ji ltar gnas pa ni/ mtshon pa dang mi 
498.3(1): mtshon pa gnyis kyi mtha' las 'das pa'o/ /dmar ni dpe yis mtshon du med pa'i 
498.4(1): byang chub sems dmar/ thag ni mtshon du med do snyams pa'i shes bya gcad/ 'on 
498.5(1): tang na mtshon du med pa'i sgo nas 'bras bu thob pa'o/ /don thams cad yid ci la 
498.6(1): ches pa ni/ byang chub sems kyi don thams cad bon nyid la 'dus pa dang / mtshan 
498.7(1): mar btags pa gnyis kyi khyad par la yid ches/ dmar ni bon nyid la don 'dus 
498.8(1): pa'i byang chub sems dmar/ thag ni tshig dang mtshan ma la don rtogs pa gcad/
498.9(1): don mngon du gyur pa ni/ mtshan ma med pa'i bon nyid bde ba chen po'i sems su 
498.10(1): mngon du gyur pa'o/ /dmar ni mtshan ma med pa'i bon nyid dang mnyam pa'i sems 
498.11(1): dmar/ thag ni de la 'grib pa gcad/ don mngon du gyur pa ji ltar gnas pa ni/
498.12(1): bon nyid dang mtshan mar 'dzin pa gnyis kyi mtha' las 'das par gnas/ dmar 
498.13(1): ni bon nyid dang mtshan mar 'dzin pa'i mtha' las 'das pa'i byang chub sems 
498.14(1): dmar/ thag ni rtogs so snyams pa'i shes bya byung ba gcad/ 'on tang na bon nyid 
498.15(1): la don 'dus pa'i sgo nas 'bras bu thob pa'o/ /kun gzhi byang chub sems yid ci la 
498.16(1): ches pa ni/ bag chags yod pa'i phyir ni/ kun gzhi yang yod pa la yid ches/
498.17(1): dmar ni kun gzhi byang chub sems dmar/ thag ni bag chags thams cad gcad/
498.18(1): kun gzhi byang chub sems su mngon du gyur pa ni/ bag chags mi mnga' ba'i kun 
498.19(1): gzhi byang chub sems mngon du gyur pa'o/ /dmar ni bag chags med pa'i kun gzhi 
498.20(1): dmar/ thag ni bag chags med pa'i kun gzhi la 'grib pa gcad/ kun gzhi mngon 
498.21(1): du gyur pa ji ltar gnas pa ni/ / kun gzhi dang bag chags gnyis su 'dzin pa'i 
499.1(1): mtha' las 'das pa'i byang chub sems su gnas/ dmar ni kun gzhi dang bag 
499.2(1): chags gnyis su 'dzin pa'i mtha' las 'das pa'i byang chub sems dmar/ thag ni 
499.3(1): kun gzhi rtogs so snyams pa gcad/ 'on tang na kun gzhi byang chub sems kyi sgo 
499.4(1): nas 'bras bu thob pa'o/ /dmar thag nyid yid ci la ches pa ni/ byang chub sems 
499.5(1): bde ba chen po'i don rtogs pa 'di/ dmar bar yid ches pa'o/ /dmar ni 'di 
499.6(1): ma yin pa mtshan ma byung ba gcad/ dmar thag mngon du gyur pa ni/ mtshan mar 
499.7(1): byung ba ye nas mi mnga' ba'i sems su mngon du gyur pa'o/ /dmar ni mtshan mar 
499.8(1): byung ba med pa'i sems dmar/ thag ni de la 'grib pa gcad/ dmar thag mngon 
499.9(1): du gyur pa ji ltar gnas pa ni/ byang chub kyi sems spros pa'i mtshan ma dang bral ba/
499.10(1): thig le nyag gcig tu gsal bar gnas pa'o/ /dmar ni byang chub sems thig le 
499.11(1): nyag gcig tu rtogs pa'i don dmar/ thag ni gsal lo snyams pa'i rtog pa dang 
499.12(1): shes bya gcad/ dmar thag thams cad kyi tshad cis gzung ba ni/ mnyam pa nyid 
499.13(1): gnyis su med pa'i don gyis gzung / dmar thag thams cad kyi la gang gis gcad 
499.14(1): ltar snang ba thams cad byang chub sems su rtogs pa'i don dmar/thag ni de ltar 
499.15(1): pa ni/ rtogs pa chen pos kyang rtogs so snyams pa mi dmigs pas gcad/ dmar 
499.16(1): thag thams cad kyi don sems nyid ma bcos par 'dus so/ /rig pa dmar thag 
499.17(1): rdzogs so/ /
499.18(1): 7 mi nub rgyal mtshan zhes pa/ 'byung ba dang snang srid la mi nub pa ni/ nam 
499.19(1): mkha' ste/ ci'i phyir zhe na/ srid pa ni bskal pas nub par byed/ bskal pa ni srid 
499.20(1): pas nub par byed/ 'byung ba bzhi ni gcig gis gcig nub par byed na/ nam 
499.21(1): mkha' la nub pa'i dus med pas/ dpe mi nub pa'o/ /don mi nub pa ni bon nyid 
500.1(1): de/ de ci'i phyir zhe na/ bon gyi sgo mo brgyad khri bzhi stong dang / mtshan mar btags 
500.2(1): pa'i bon thams cad ni/ ched 'ga' dus kyis nub par byed ched 'ga' las kyis 
500.3(1): nub par byed de/ bon nyid la nub pa'i dus med pas/ don mi nub pa'o/ /rtags 
500.4(1): mi nub pa ni sems nyid de/ de ci'i phyir zhe na/ phung po dang khams dang skye mched 
500.5(1): rnams ni/ skye 'chi mi rtag pa'i nub par byed de/ kun gzhi byang chub sems bde ba 
500.6(1): chen po la/ nub pa'i dus med pas rtags mi nub pa'o/ /rgyal ba ni/ nub pa'i dus 
500.7(1): mtha' med pa'i byang chub sems bde ba chen po'o/ /'khor ba thams cad kyi mtha' 
500.8(1): las rgyal bas so/ /mtshan ni gong du smos pa'i tshig de ka nyid/ kun gzhi byang chub 
500.9(1): kyi sems kyi mtshan yin pas/ mi nub pa'i rgyal mtshan ces pa'o/ /ye shes ni kun 
500.10(1): gzhi byang chub kyi sems bde ba chen po/ ye ma byung ma skyes skye ba med par gdod 
500.11(1): nas dag pa ste/ gshen rab sgam ste yang ma mdzad/ sems can sgrin de yang ma 
500.12(1): bcos/ ye nas de bzhin gnas pa'o/ /de lta bu'i don de/ kun gzhi byang chub 
500.13(1): sems kyis gsal bar ye nas shes pas ye shes ces bya'o/ /de lta bu'i don thams 
500.14(1): cad dpe nam mkha' dang mnyam pas/ nam mkha'i dpe zhes bya'o/ /ston pa'i thugs 
500.15(1): las rig pa'i bcud ces pa/ 'byung ba dang snang srid kyi ston pa ni nam mkha' ste/
500.16(1): 'byung ba dang snang srid thams cad/ so so na gsal bar nam mkhas bstan pas 
500.17(1): ston pa'o/ /yang na bon nyid zad pa med pa'i dbyings nas/ bon gyi sgo mo brgyad khri 
500.18(1): bzhi stong dang / smrang gi bye brag mtha' yas pa ma 'dres par ston pas so/ /yang na 
500.19(1): kun gzhi byang chub sems bde ba chen po yis phung po dang khams dang skye mched 
500.20(1): las sogs pa la/ yang dag pa'i don ston pas ston pa'o/ /de ltar ston pa'i don de/
500.21(1): kun gzhi byang chub sems kyis gsal bas/ thugs las ces bya'o/ /de ltar thugs 
501.1(1): nyid nam mkha' dang 'dra ba de las/ rig pa nyi ma dang 'dra ba de/ bcud du shar 
501.2(1): bas ston pa'i thugs las rig pa'i bcud du shar ba ces bya'o/ /thams cad mkhyen

501.5(1): med la/ lung gi nam mkha'i rang bzhin te/ snang srid thams cad las rgyal bas 
501.6(1): rgyal la/ nam mkha' 'byung ba dang / snang srid thams cad kyi dpe bskyed pas dpe

501.11(1): nyid kyi ngang la gnas par mkhyen pas so/ /bon gyi sgo mo brgyad khri bzhi stong dang /

501.13(1): gi'o/ /bon nyid ni mtshan mar btags pa'i bon thams cad las rgyal la/ bon 
501.14(1): can mtshan mar btags pa thams cad kyi dpe/ bon nyid kyis bskyed pas/ bon gyi 
501.15(1): gsung dbyangs cho dgu tha dad par gyes pa bon nyid kyi gsung du byung bas gsungs 
501.16(1): pa'o/ /yang na phung po dang khams dang skye mched dang / de'i 'khor dang yan lag 
501.17(1): gis btags pa thams cad dang / kun gzhi byang chub sems kyi ngang du mkhyen pas/
501.18(1): thams cad mkhyen pa'o/ /phung po dang khams dang skye mched de'i 'khor dang yan 
501.19(1): lag tu bcas pa thams cad kyi lung / kun gzhi byang chub sems las byung bas lung 
501.20(1): gi/ kun gzhi byang chub sems ni/ phung po dang khams dang skye mched de'i 'khor 
501.21(1): dang yan lag thams cad las rgyal bas rgyal la/ kun gzhi byang chub sems kyi phung 
502.1(1): po dang khams dang skye mched dang / 'di'i 'khor dang yan lag thams cad dpe 
502.2(1): bskyed pas/ sgra skad bsam gyis mi khyab pa/ kun gzhi byang chub sems kyi gsung du

502.18(1): don gyi yi ge'o/ /tseg dgu ni bon gyi klong brgyad bon nyid rnam par dag pa'i klong 
502.19(1): mi 'gyur ba dang dgu'o/ /yang na mnyam pa ni/ phung po dang khams dang skye mched

502.21(1): med pas mnyam la ma 'dres pa ni/ phung po dang khams dang skye mched dang / 'khor

503.5(1): bkod/ gu gu 'greng bu sna ru zhabs cu shad dang tseg gis/ tshig gi go phye nas smrang 
503.6(1): rnams gsal bar/ bden pa'i sgo mo nges par phye nas ni/ kun gzhi byang chub

503.11(1): don dam par kun gzhi byang chub kyi sems bde ba chen pos mtshon pa mya ngan las 
503.12(1): 'das pa ni/ tshig dang yi ges kyang mtshon du rdul kyang med do/ /dpe don rtags 
503.13(1): dang gsum du mnyam pa ces pa/ kun gzhi byang chub sems bde ba chen po/ mtshon

503.18(1): bon nyid ci bzhin du/ kun gzhi byang chub kyi sems mtshon cing brjod du med pas/

503.20(1): dang gsum du dbye ba yang / 'khor ba'i bkri drang tsam du zad do/ /don dam par 
503.21(1): nam mkha' gang yin pa ni byang chub sems la/ byang chub kyi sems gang yin pa ni

504.21(1): 'gyur ba'o/ /rtags mi 'gyur ba ni byang chub sems yin te/ phung po dang khams

505.21(1): bon gyi sgo mo brgyad khri bzhi stong ni/ ston pa re re byon zhing cher skye na/ bon nyid ni

506.2(1): gdod nas dag pa'o/ /phung po dang khams dang skye mched ni/ dang po zil chab dang

506.4(1): par skye ba yod na/ kun gzhi byang chub kyi sems ni/ thog ma yang ye yod pa las ma

506.8(1): gnas pas skye med nam mkha' ye shes gdod nas dag ces bya'o/ /'chi med nam

506.11(1): gser gyi nyi ma bdun bdun shar nas/ 'jig rten me dpung 'bar ba ru 'gyur ba 
506.12(1): ni/ chu'i shi ba yin la/ de la rdza sor mes btang ba ltar gyur pa ni/ rtsi shing dang 
506.13(1): nags tshal gyi shi ba yin/  las rlung gis gtor te mi snang bar gyur pa ni/ sa'i 
506.14(1): shi ba yin la/ de las chu yi bskal pas rgya mtsho chen por gyur pa ni/ me'i shi ba yin 
506.15(1): la/ de las bse gzhong mar gyis bkang pa ltar/ ltam me mi g.yo bar du 'dug pa 
506.16(1): ni/ rlung gi shi ba yin la/ shi ba'i rang bzhin yin no/ /yang na tshe lo 'bum pa nas 
506.17(1): bcu pa'i bar du/ ston pa snga mar gshegs pa'i bstan pa ni nub ste/ glegs bam la 
506.18(1): bris pa thams cad kyang / nang ma gcig la dung phyis pa ltar tsug tu 'gyur/ ston pa 
506.19(1): phyi nas 'byon pa'i bstan pa ni ma shar gyi bar de ru/ bon gyi sgo mo brgyad khri bzhi 
506.20(1): stong gi rang bzhin ni/ phra rab kyi rdul las sum brgya drug cu rtsa bzhir bgos pa'i 
506.21(1): cha cig tsam yang mi snang ste/ sems can gyi shes pa'i rgyun la gnas pa'i bon ni bya 
507.1(1): bya bang thod kar gyis 'phur nus par byed pa yan chad phrug khug skad kyis non pa/
507.2(1): nub ste/ bon la yid tsam yang mi rgyu ste/ de yang bon gyi sgo mo brgyad khri bzhi stong 
507.3(1): dang / mtshan ma'i bon thams cad shi ba'i rang bzhin yin no/ /bon nyid bde ba 
507.4(1): chen po ni/ dus gsum gyi gshen rab kyis kyang / bon nyid 'di yin zhes bya ba 
507.5(1): mtshon cing bstan tu med de/ tshig dang yi ge'i spyod yul las ye nas 'das pas/
507.6(1): shi zhing brlag pa med pas/ don shi ba med pa'o/ /phung po dang khams dang skye 
507.7(1): mched dang 'khor las sogs pa rnams ni/ dang po rgyu las bskyed pas/ tha ma rkyen 
507.8(1): gyis 'jig ste/ sha khrag drod dbugs bzhis ni rgyu byas/ de las nad bzhi brgya rtsa 
507.9(1): bzhi ni/ rkyen du 'byung / ye 'brog sum brgya drug cus ni/ glo bur byed/ ma rig 
507.10(1): 'khrul pa'i bdud kyis ni khram la btab/ sdug bsngal nyon mongs pa'i ni btson 
507.11(1): rar bcug /skye shi mi rtag pa ni pang du blangs/ gzugs kyi phung po spre'u 'dra/ shi 
507.12(1): bdag bdud ni gyad 'dra/ spre'u yi steng du gyad byung ba la ni/ bzur long med de 
507.13(1): rang dbang par ni skye/ rang dbang med par ni 'chi na/ kun gzhi byang chub kyi 
507.14(1): sems ni/ thog ma rgyu gang las kyang ma skyes pas/ tha ma rkyen gang gis kyang mi 'jig 
507.15(1): ste/ ye nas shi zhing brlag pa med pas/ rtags kyi shi ba med pa'o/ /'chi ba med 
507.16(1): pa'i don de ka ltar ye shes chen po khyab bdal du gnas pas/ nam mkha' ye shes 
507.17(1): ces bya'o/ /skyes snang brtsan bya ba ni/ kun gzhi byang chub sems 'chi med nam 
507.18(1): mkha' ltar gnas pa'i don de sal gyis rtogs na/ ye shes chen po skyes nas/
507.19(1): thams cad khyab bdal du gsal bas rang shes rig gi rgyal po bya'o/ /brtsan zhes bya 
507.20(1): ba ni/ gong ma rgyu las skyes pa rkyen gyis 'chi ba rnams ni/ kun gzhi byang chub kyi 
507.21(1): sems skye 'chi med pa'i don 'di sal gyis ma rtogs kyi bar du/ gang ltar bros kyang 
508.1(1): thar cing brtsan par mi 'gyur te/ g.yung drung brag chen la 'khras kyang brtsan par 
508.2(1): mi 'gyur la/ rin po che'i sgrom bu dgu'i nang du sbas nas/ kha lcags kyi tha rams 
508.3(1): kyis bcad kyang brtsan par mi 'gyur la/ brtsan bya ba yang dag pa ni/ kun gzhi 
508.4(1): byang chub sems thog ma rgyu gang las kyang ma bskyed pas/ tha ma rkyen gang gis kyang 
508.5(1): mi 'chi ba'i nam mkha' dang / dbyer med pa'i 'bras bu de thob nas/ rtag pa chen 
508.6(1): po g.yung drung mi 'gyur bar gnas pas/'chi med skyes snang brtsan zhes bya'o/ /
508.7(1): snang med nam mkha' zhes pa/ 'byung ba dang snang srid thams cad ni/ kha dog dang 
508.8(1): dbyibs dang dngos po cir yang snang ste/ nam mkha'i rang bzhin ni/ kha dog du yang 
508.9(1): mi snang dngos por kyang mi snang / dbyibs cir yang mi snang bas snang med do/ /yang 
508.10(1): na bon gyi sgo mo brgyad khri bzhi stong dang / bon can mtshan mar btags pa thams 
508.11(1): cad ni/ tshig dang yi ge dang sgra cir yang snang ste/ bon nyid ni tshig dang yi ge'i sgra 
508.12(1): cir yang mi snang bas snang med do/ /yang na phung po dang khams dang skye mched dang 
508.13(1): 'khor thams cad dngos po dang mtshan ma cir yang snang ste/ kun gzhi byang chub 
508.14(1): sems dngos po dang mtshan ma cir yang mi snang bas rtags snang ba med pa'o/ /de 
508.15(1): nam mkha' rang bzhin du ye shes chen po khyab bdal du gnas pas/ snang med nam 
508.16(1): mkha' ye shes ces bya'o/ /dpe las 'das pa ni/ snang ba med pa nam mkha' ltar 
508.17(1): gnas pa'i ye shes chen po de/ dpe 'di 'dra ba cig yod ces dngos su 'byung du 
508.18(1): med pas/ dpe las 'das ces bya'o/ /tshad med nam mkha' zhes pa/ dper na 
508.19(1): nam mkha'i tshad 'di tsam zhig yod ces gzung du med pa'am/ bon nyid kyi tshad 
508.20(1): 'di tsam zhig yod ces gzung du med pa'am/ kun gzhi byang chub kyi sems kyi tshad 
508.21(1): 'di tsam cig yod ces byar med pas tshad med ces bya'o/ /de nam mkha' ltar 
509.1(1): thams cad khyab bdal du ye shes chen po lhun gyis rdzogs pas/ tshad med nam 
509.2(1): mkha' ye shes lhun la rdzogs ces bya'o/ /yang na kun gzhi byang chub sems bde ba 
509.3(1): chen po'i don sal gyis rtogs pa'i dus na/ ma yin pa tshad med pa nam mkha' ltar 
509.4(1): ye shes chen po lhun la rdzogs pa dang / phyal ba tshad med pa nam mkha' ltar ye shes 
509.5(1): chen po lhun la rdzogs pa dang bdag nyid tshad med ye shes chen po lhun la rdzogs pa 
509.6(1): dang / lhun gyis rdzogs pa nyid tshad med nam mkha' ltar ye shes chen po'i lhun la 
509.7(1): mnyam pa nyid du don rdzogs pa'o/ /rdzu 'phrul nam mkha' zhes pa/ 'byung ba nam 
509.8(1): mkha' ltar snang srid thams cad kyang rtogs pas/ nam mkha'i rdzu 'phrul las ma 
509.9(1): rtogs pa med de/ de nam mkha'i rang bzhin las rdzu 'phrul thams cad ye shes chen 
509.10(1): po'i ngang la ji ltar yang snang bas/ mi 'byung ba med do/ /yang na bon nyid bde ba 
509.11(1): chen po las/ bon gyi sgo mo brgyad khri bzhi stong ngam/ bon can mtshan mar snang ba 
509.12(1): thams cad sprul par byung ba yin te/ de bon nyid rang bzhin las/ rdzu 'phrul 
509.13(1): thams cad ye shes chen po'i ngang la/ ji ltar kyang snang bas mi 'byung ba yang med 
509.14(1): do/ /yang na kun gzhi byang chub kyi sems la/ phung po dang khams dang skye mched 
509.15(1): dang thams cad sprul par byung ba yin te/ nam mkha' dang 'dra ba de kun gzhi byang 
509.16(1): chub sems kyi rang bzhin las// rdzu 'phrul thams cad ye shes chen po'i ngang la ji 
509.17(1): ltar kyang snang bas/ rdzu 'phrul nam mkha' ye shes cir yang snang zhes bya'o/ /thig le 
509.18(1): nam mkha' zhes pa/ dpe yi thig le nam mkha' ste/ nam mkha'i rang bzhin dus 
509.19(1): gsum du mi 'khrug mi 'chol ba'i don de/ ma nor ba ni thig yin la/ nam mkha'i 
509.20(1): rang bzhin khyab bdal du gnas pa ni le yin no/ /yang na bon nyid bde ba chen po 
509.21(1): dus gsum du mi 'khrug mi 'chol ba'i don ma nor ba ni thig yin la/ bon nyid kyi 
510.1(1): rang bzhin khyab bdal du 'dug pa ni le yin no/ /kun gzhi byang chub sems nam

510.3(1): kun gzhi byang chub kyi sems bde ba chen po nam mkha' ltar khyab bdal du gnas 
510.4(1): pa ni le yin pas so/ / /nam mkha'i dbyings su dpe'i thig le rdzogs/ bon nyid 
510.5(1): kun gzhi byang chub sems kyi dbyings su rtags dbyings su don gyi thig le rdzogs/

510.7(1): bden pa nam mkha' zhes pa/ dpe mi nor ba bden pa'i thig btab pa ni nam 
510.8(1): mkha' ste/ de ci'i phyir zhe na/ kun gzhi byang chub sems kyi dpe ni/ lung la la'i 
510.9(1): nang nas yid bzhin nor bu rin po ches mtshon te/ de tshig tu bden te don du mi 
510.10(1): bden no/ /de ci'i phyir zhe na/ sems can gyi dgos don yid bzhin du skong ba ni 
510.11(1): tshig tu bden na/ yid bzhin nor bu la dngos po dang mtshan ma yod de/ kun gzhi 
510.12(1): byang chub sems la dngos po dang mtshan ma med pas/ de yang bden pa ma yin no/ /
510.13(1): dpe gzhan ma thams cad kyang* / dngos po dang mtshan ma yod pas/ tshig tu bden 
510.14(1): kyang don du mi bden no/ /lung gi rgyal po 'di yi nang nas ni/ dpe thams cad 
510.15(1): nam mkhas mtshon pas/ don thams cad bden par ye shes chen pos thig 'debs 
510.16(1): pas/ bden pa'i yang bden pa chen po'o/ /de ltar dpe mi nor ba'i bden pa nam 
510.17(1): mkha' 'dra bas mtshon pas/ don mi nor bden pa bon nyid nam mkha' 'dra ba 
510.18(1): rtogs nas/ rtags mi nor ba'i bden pa'i sems nyid nam mkha' 'dra ba yis/
510.19(1): 'bras bu mi nor ba'i bden pa nam mkha' 'dra ba thob pa'o/ /dgongs pa nam 
510.20(1): mkha' zhes pa/ dper na 'byung ba dang snang srid ci ltar g.yos kyang / nam mkha' 
510.21(1): la g.yo ba med pa dang 'dra bar na/ mtshan ma'i bon ci ltar g.yos kyang / bon nyid 
511.1(1): la g.yo ba med do/ /phung po ci ltar g.yos kyang / kun gzhi byang chub sems la g.yo 
511.2(1): ba med do/ /de ltar g.yo ba med pa'i don de rang shes rig gi rgyal pos rtogs pa'i 
511.3(1): dus na/ dpe ma g.yos pa nam mkha' dang 'dra bas mtshon nas/ don ma g.yos pa 
511.4(1): bon nyid nam mkha' dang 'dra ba rtogs nas/ rtags mi g.yos pa sems nyid nam

511.9(1): 'dra ste/ bon nyid ma dang 'dra ba yis/ bon gyi sgo mo brgyad khri bzhi stong dang /
511.10(1): mtshan ma'i bon bu dang 'dra ba'i 'khor lo thams cad bon nyid kyis bsgyur ro/ /
511.11(1): kun gzhi byang chub kyi sems bde ba chen po ma dang 'dra bas/ phung po dang khams 
511.12(1): dang skye mched bu dang 'dra ba'i dbang byed de/ de yang mas bu la log par mi ston 
511.13(1): pa dang 'dra bar na/ kun gzhi bde ba chen po las/ man ngag bden pa'i don byung 
511.14(1): nas yid dang nyon mongs pa la thig btab pa bzhin du ston pa 'di yang / man 
511.15(1): ngag gi yang man ngag /bden pa'i yang bden pa chen po yin te/ de yang nam 
511.16(1): mkha' stong pa ltar ye shes chen po khyab bdal du ston pa de yin par gdeng bas/
511.17(1): man ngag nam mkha' ye shes gdeng dang chas zhes bya'o/ /lta ba nam mkha' zhes pa/
511.18(1): lta ba thams cad kyi don ni/ rnam pa cir yang mi rtog pa yin te/ rang shes rig gi 
511.19(1): rgyal po las/ lta ru med pa'i lta ba chen po yang dag pa gsal bar byung ba'i dus na/
511.20(1): 'byung ba dang snang srid thams cad nam mkha'i rang bzhin du mthong la/ nam 
511.21(1): mkha'i rang bzhin ni/ rnam par rtog pa'i mtshan ma thams cad las 'das par

512.5(1): bzhin du rtogs la/ kun gzhi ni rnam par rtog pa'i mtshan ma thams cad las

512.12(1): bag chags kyis ma gos shing rnam par dag pa yin te/ rang shes rig gi rgyal po'i 
512.13(1): spyod du med pa'i spyod pa chen po la/ mi 'jug pa'i 'jug pa chen po yis ji la yang 
512.14(1): ma chags/ rang bzhin thabs kyis spyod pa'i dus na/ 'byung ba dang snang srid thams

512.16(1): 'das nas/ ye nas rnam par dag ste sangs rgyas/ bon gyi sgo mo brgyad khri bzhi stong 
512.17(1): 'am/ mtshan ma'i bon thams cad kyang / bon nyid bde ba chen po'i rang bzhin du/
512.18(1): tshig dang yi ge'i spyod yul las 'das nas/ ye nas rnam par dag nas sangs rgyas 
512.19(1): pa'o/ /phung po khams dang skye mched thams cad kyang kun gzhi byang chub sems bde 
512.20(1): ba chen po'i rang bzhin du/ 'khrul pa dang mtshan ma'i spyod yul las 'das te/ ye 
512.21(1): nas rnam par dag ste sangs rgyas pa'o/ /de lta bu de rtogs pa'i dus na/ spyod pa'i

513.2(1): par dag pas/ spyod dang mi spyod gnyis med do/ /phrin las nam mkha' zhes pa/
513.3(1): phrin las thams cad kyi don ni// rtsol ba dang bral ba yin te/ 'byung ba srid pa 
513.4(1): thams cad g.yo zhing rtsol kyang / nam mkha' la g.yo zhing rtsol ba med de/ ye nas 
513.5(1): lhun gyis grub pa'o/ /mtshan ma'i bon thams cad ji ltar g.yo yang / bon nyid bde

514.18(1): ste/ nam ni lang nyi ma ni ma shar gyi bar der/ nam mkha'i ngogs ces bya ba cig 
514.19(1): 'byung ste/ de ni cir yang ma g.yos par gsal ba'o/ /shes rab kyi spyan dag pas 
514.20(1): bltas na/ snang srid thams cad nam mkha'i ngogs de bzhin du/ ye nas sa le 
514.21(1): gzigs so/ /yang na bon nyid bde ba chen po ci ltar yang mi g.yo ba las/ cir

516.8(1): thams cad 'khrul kyang / nam mkha' la 'khrul pa med de/ ye nas shes rab chen 
516.9(1): por gyur pa'o/ /mtshan ma'i bon thams cad 'khrul par 'byung yang / bon nyid 
516.10(1): bde ba chen po la 'khrul pa med de/ shes rab chen por gyur pa'o/ /phung po khams 
516.11(1): dang skye mched thams cad ni/ 'khrul pa'i rang bzhin yin te/ don ma yin pa dang /
516.12(1): phyin ci log dang dmyal ba'i ded dpon dang / tshogs gcog dang / gdug rtsub 
516.13(1): dang / mtshon cha go ber dang / mi dge ba'i las mtha' dad pa la 'khrul te/ kun 
516.14(1): gzhi byang chub sems bde ba chen po la 'khrul pa med de/ ye nas shes rab chen 
516.15(1): por gyur pa'o/ /de lta bu'i don de sal gyis rtogs pa'i dus na/ rang rig pa'i ye 
516.16(1): shes/ 'khrul pa med pa'i shes rab chen por gyur te/ 'khrul pa med pa'i dbyings 
516.17(1): nyid nas/ shes rab chen po'i kun gzhi las thogs pa med pa'i ye shes byung nas/
516.18(1): 'khrul pa med pa'i dbyings/ shes rab chen por gyur pas/ shes rab kyi don kyang de 
516.19(1): yin te/ shes rab dang 'khrul pa gnyis med do/ /yon tan nam mkha' zhes pas/
516.20(1): yon tan thams cad kyi don ni/ skyon gyis ma gos pa yin te/ dper na 'byung ba 
516.21(1): dang snang srid thams cad la yang / yon tan re re dang mi ldan pa ni gang yang med 
517.1(1): na/ skyon re re yang kun la 'byung bas/ yang dag pa'i yon tan ma yin te/ de ci'i 
517.2(1): phyir zhe na/ dper na yid bzhin gyi nor bu rin po che yang / gang gis thob pa'i 
517.3(1): dgos don skong ba ni/ yon tan yin te/ de kun la ma khyab pa'i skyon yod pas/
517.4(1): yang dag pa'i yon tan ma yin no/ /tha ma na skyer tsher las gdug pa med pas 
517.5(1): kyang / bye'u khras nyen pa skyabs nus te/ de yang yon tan de yin kyang / skyon kun 
517.6(1): skyob pa mi nus pa dang / tsha ba dang gdug pa yod pas/ yang dag pa'i yon tan 
517.7(1): ma yin no/ /yang dag pa'i yon tan ni/ nam mkha' la yod do/ /nam mkha' kun 
517.8(1): la khyab pa yon tan yin la/ ma khyab pa'i skyon med pas ni yang dag pa'i yon tan 
517.9(1): no/ /thams cad kyi snod du yangs pas ni/ yon tan yin la/ dog cing mi shong ba'i 
517.10(1): skyon med pas ni/ yang dag pa'i yon tan no/ /de dang 'dra bar yon tan bsam 
517.11(1): gyis mi khyab pa ni yod la/ skyon med pas ni yang dag pa'i yon tan no/ /de phyir ni 
517.12(1): 'di ltar snang ba thams cad/ nam mkha'i rang bzhin du rtogs na/ yang dag pa'i 
517.13(1): yon tan las/ skyon btsal gyis mi rnyed de/ dper na rgya mtsho chen po'i gling klu 
517.14(1): 'jog po'i 'chags sa/ rin po che'i gling stod du phyin pa'i tshe na/ sa rdo btsal gyis 
517.15(1): mi rnyed pa dang 'dra'o/ /yang na bon gyi sgo mo brgyad khri bzhi stong ngam/ mtshan ma'i 
517.16(1): bon thams cad la ni/ yon tan re re yang kun la 'byung na/ skyon re yang kun la 
517.17(1): 'byung bas/ yang dag pa'i yon tan ma yin no/ /bon nyid kyi sku bde ba chen po la/
517.18(1): yon tan gyi rnam grangs bsam gyis mi khyab pa 'byung ba las/ skyon ye nas mi mnga' 
517.19(1): bas/ yang dag pa'i yon tan no/ /de phyir na bon gyi sgo mo brgyad khri bzhi stong ngam/
517.20(1): mtshan ma'i bon thams cad bon nyid du rtogs na/ skyon btsal gyis kyang mi rnyed de/
517.21(1): kun tu bzang po gshen lha 'od dkar gyi bzhugs gnas/ bzhi bcu rtsa gnyis theg 
518.1(1): pa'i yang gong / gsal la rang bzhin med pa'i gnas bya bar phyin pa'i dus na/
518.2(1): tshig dang yi ge'i mtshan ma'i skyon ye nas mi srid do/ /yang na phung po dang khams 
518.3(1): dang skye mched las/ / yon tan re re yang kun las 'byung ste/ skyon re yang kun las 
518.4(1): 'byung bas/ yang dag pa'i yon tan ma yin no/ /kun gzhi byang chub kyi sems las/
518.5(1): yon tan gyi don bye brag bsam gyis mi khyab pa ni 'byung la/ skyon ye nas mi 'byung 
518.6(1): bas/ yang dag pa'i yon tan no/ /de phyir phung po khams dang skye mched thams cad/
518.7(1): kun gzhi byang chub sems su rtogs na/ skyon btsal gyis mi rnyed de/ kun gzhi ma 
518.8(1): g.yo ba yum gyi dbyings rnam par dag pa/ gsal la rang bzhin med pa/ yid kyi 
518.9(1): rnam par shes pas mthong ba'i dus na/ byung tshor dang rnam par rtog pa'i mtshan 
518.10(1): ma'i skyon btsal gyis mi rnyed do/ /de lta bu'i don de/ rang shes rig gi rgyal pos 
518.11(1): rtogs pa'i dus na/ bon nyid kun la snyoms pa nam mkha' 'dra ba las/ kun gzhi 
518.12(1): kun la snyoms pa nam mkha' dang 'dra ba byung / kun gzhi kun la nam mkha' dang 
518.13(1): 'dra ba las/ ye shes kun la snyoms pa nam mkha' 'dra ba shar nas/ yon tan kun 
518.14(1): la snyoms pa nam mkha' 'dra ba byung ste/ skyon rnams thams cad yon tan du sangs 
518.15(1): rgyas pas/ skyon dang yon tan gnyis med do/ /thar lam nam mkha' zhes pa/ lam 
518.16(1): thams cad kyi don ni/ 'khor ba med par yin te/ dper na nam mkha'i rang 
518.17(1): bzhin no/ /thog ma gang nas kyang ma 'ong / tha ma gang du yang mi 'gro ste/ 'byung ba 
518.18(1): dang snang srid kyi 'khor ba las ye nas 'das te thar ro/ /yang na bon nyid bde ba 
518.19(1): chen po ni/ thog ma gang nas kyang ma 'ong bas/ tha ma gang du yang mi 'gro ste/ 'khor 
518.20(1): ba thams cad las ye nas 'das shing thar ro/ /yang na kun gzhi byang chub sems 
518.21(1): bde ba chen po ni/ thog ma gang nas kyang ma 'ong / tha ma gang du yang mi 'gro ste/
519.1(1): phung po dang khams dang skye mched thams cad las/ ye nas 'das shing thar ro/ /de 
519.2(1): lta bu'i don rang shes rig gi rgyal pos gsal bar rtogs pa'i dus na/bon nyid 
519.3(1): nam mkha' 'dra ba ye nas gdal pa chen po'i gnas mchog tu/ ye shes nam mkha' 
519.4(1): 'dra ba ye nas gsal bas/ 'khor ba med pa'i lam la/ 'jug pa med pa gsal 
519.5(1): bar rtogs pas/ bgrod pa med par gnas su bzhugs zhes bya ste/ phyin pa dang ma 
519.6(1): phyin pa gnyis med do/ /dkyil 'khor nam mkha' zhes pa/ dper na nam mkha' 
519.7(1): cir yang ma g.yos pa'i thig le nyag gcig tu rtogs pa ni/ dkyil yin la/ nam 
519.8(1): mkha' khyab bdal du gnas pa yongs su rgya ma chad pa ni 'khor/ de la 'di tsam 
519.9(1): zhig yod ces gzhal du med de dpag tu med gzhal du med ces de la bya'o/ /
519.10(1): gzhan cis kyang dpag tu med pa la bya/ de 'byung ba dang snang srid thams cad kyi 
519.11(1): snod dang gnas su yangs pas khang zhes bya'o/ /yang na bon nyid bde ba chen po/ ji 
519.12(1): ltar yang ma g.yos pa thig le nyag gcig tu rtogs pa ni dkyil yin la/ bon nyid 
519.13(1): bde ba chen po de thams cad khyab bdal du gnas te/ yongs su rgya ma chad pa ni 
519.14(1): 'khor/ de la 'di tsam yod pa gzhan cis kyang rang bzhin gzhal cing dpag tu 
519.15(1): med pas ni/ gzhal med khang zhes bya'o/ /de bon gyi sgo mo brgyad khri bzhi stong gi 
519.16(1): snod dang gnas su yangs pas khang zhes bya'o/ /yang na kun gzhi byang chub sems 
519.17(1): bde ba chen po/ jir yang ma g.yos pa'i thig le nyag gcig tu rtogs pa ni/ dkyil 
519.18(1): yin la/ kun gzhi snang srid thams cad la gnas pa la/ rgya yongs su ma chad pa ni 
519.19(1): 'khor/ de la 'di tsam zhig yod do/ /bar gzhal cing cis kyang dpag tu med pa ste/
519.20(1): de dus gsum gyi gshen rab dang khams gsum gyi sems can thams cad kyi/
519.21(1): gnas dang snod du yangs pas khang zhes bya'o/ /de lta bu'i snod de rang shes rig gi 
520.1(1): rgyal pos rtogs pa'i dus na/bon nyid gzhal med khang nam mkha' dang 'dra ba'i 
520.2(1): dbyings nas/ sems nyid ma bcos gsal ba 'od kyi 'khor lo skor zhes bya'o/ /
520.3(1): dkyil dang 'khor la gnyis med do/ /sku gsum nam mkha' zhes pa/ dper na nam 
520.4(1): mkha'i rang bzhin khyab cing bdal pa la/ cir yang ma g.yos pa ni/ nam mkha' 
520.5(1): bon gyi sku yin/ nam mkha' la nyi zla dang rgyu skar gyis brgyan pa ni/ nam mkha' 
520.6(1): longs spyod rdzogs pa'i sku yin/ nam mkha' las 'brug dang thog dang glog dang 
520.7(1): sprin dang gzha' tshon dang / de dag na nam mkha' sprul pa'i sku yin/ dpe de dang 
520.8(1): 'dra bar na/ bon nyid cir yang ma g.yos shing / dngos po dang mtshan ma las 
520.9(1): 'das te dmigs su med pa ni/ bon gyi sku yin la/ bon nyid bde ba chen po de la/
520.10(1): che ba'i yon tan gyi tshogs ma 'gag par brgyan pa ni/ bon gyi longs spyod rdzogs 
520.11(1): pa'i sku yin/ de las bon gyi sgo mo brgyad khri bzhi stong dang / theg pa chen po dgu'i 
520.12(1): khyad par dang / tshig dang yi ges mtshon pa bsam gyis mi khyab pa byung bas/ bon 
520.13(1): gyi sprul pa'i sku yin/ yang na byang chub kyi sems bde ba chen po/ spros pa'i mtshan ma 
520.14(1): dang bral ba ye nas ma bcos pa ni/ byang chub sems kyi bon gyi sku yin/ byang chub 
520.15(1): sems la ye shes chen po bzhi dang / ye shes kyi tshogs bsam gyis mi khyab pas 
520.16(1): brgyan pa ni/ byang chub sems longs spyod rdzogs pa'i sku yin/ byang chub sems las 
520.17(1): yid dang rnam par shes pa dang / khams dang skye mched la sogs pa byung bas ni/
520.18(1): byang chub sems las sprul pa'i sku yin/ don dam par sku gcig gis yongs la 
520.19(1): khyab pa las med do/ /de yang sku gcig ni gang zhe na/ dper na nam mkha' la zla 
520.20(1): ba'i sku gcig shar ba'i dus na/ sa'i chu mig dang / chu ldang lding bsam gyis mi 
520.21(1): khyab pa yongs la khyab pa dang 'dra ste/ sku gcig ni bon gyi sku bde ba chen po thig 
521.1(1): le gnyag gcig las med la// yongs la khyab pa ni/ dus gsum gyi gshen rab 
521.2(1): dang / khams gsum gyi sems can thams cad la khyab pa'o/ /dus gsum gyi gshen 
521.3(1): rab dang / khams gsum gyi sems can thams cad kyang / don dam par sku gcig 
521.4(1): la 'dus so/ /gsung dbyangs nam mkha' zhes pa/ gsung thams cad ni rang 
521.5(1): bzhin med pa la 'dus te/ nam mkha' la me sgra chu sgra rlung sgra 'brug sgra las sogs 
521.6(1): pa bsam gyis mi khyab pa byung yang don du de la rang bzhin med la/ bon nyid nam 
521.7(1): mkha' dang 'dra ba las bon gyi sgo mo brgyad khri bzhi stong dang / gsung rab kyi yan 
521.8(1): lag bsam gyis mi khyab pa byung yang / de yang rang bzhin med la/ sems nyid la 
521.9(1): tshig gi rnam grangs dang / sgra yi bye brag bsam gyis mi khyab pa byung yang / don du de 
521.10(1): la rang bzhin med na/ rang bzhin med pa'i gsung / de rnams nam mkha' ltar/
521.11(1): ye shes chen po khyab bdal du gnas pas/ gsung dbyangs nam mkha' ye shes rang 
521.12(1): bzhin med ces bya'o/ /thugs nyid nam mkha' zhes pa/ nam mkha' ji ltar yang ma 
521.13(1): g.yos pa las/ gsal ba'i 'od khams gsum du khyab bdal du gnas te/ dus 
521.14(1): gsum du mi 'khrug pa ni nam mkha'i thugs nyid yin te/ 'byung ba dang snang srid 
521.15(1): 'gyur zhing ldog pas 'khrul pa yod kyang / nam mkha' dus gsum du 'gyur ba med 
521.16(1): pa las/ gsal ba'i 'od khyab bdal du gnas pa'o/ /yang na bon nyid nam mkha' 
521.17(1): ltar yangs shing rgya che ba las/ phyin ci log la dus gsum du mi 'khrul pa ni/ bon 
521.18(1): nyid kyi thugs kyi yang thugs nyid yin la/ mtshan mar snang ba'i bon thams cad 
521.19(1): cir 'khrul pa dang cir 'gyur yang / bon nyid bde ba chen po las 'gyur ba med 
521.20(1): pa ste/ nam mkha' ltar ye shes chen po khyab bdal du gnas pas so/ /yang na byang 
521.21(1): chub kyi sems gsal la ma 'gag pa las/ ma bcos pa ste/ dus gsum du 'gyur ba 
522.1(1): med pa ni/ byang chub sems kyi yang sems nyid yin la/ phung po dang khams dang skye 
522.2(1): mched las sogs pa cir 'gyur cir 'khrul yang / byang chub kyi sems la 'gyur 
522.3(1): zhing 'khrul pa med pa de/ nam mkha' ltar ye shes chen po khyab bdal du gnas pa 
522.4(1): ni 'khrul cing 'jig pa med pas so/ /ngang nyid nam mkha' zhes pa/ nam mkha' 
522.5(1): yangs shing rgya che ba ni/ nam mkha'i ngang yin/ de mtshan ma'i yul las 'das te 
522.6(1): bcos su med pa ni/ nam mkha'i ngang nyid yin/ 'byung ba dang snang srid thams 
522.7(1): cad la bcos su yod kyang / nam mkha' la ye nas bcos su med pa'i don de ni/
522.8(1): snang srid khyab bdal du gnas pas so/ /yang na bon nyid nam mkha' ltar/ yangs 
522.9(1): shing rgya che ba ni/ bon gyi ngang yin/ de dmigs pa'i yul las 'das nas bcos su 
522.10(1): med pa ni/ bon gyi ngang nyid yin/ bon can mtshan mar snang ba dang / bon gyi sgo 
522.11(1): mo brgyad khri bzhi stong la bcos su yod kyang / bon nyid bde ba chen po la bcos su 
522.12(1): med pa de ye shes chen po khyab bdal du gnas pas so/ /yang na kun gzhi byang chub 
522.13(1): sems nam mkha' ltar yangs shing rgya che ste/ cir yang ma g.yos pa ni/ byang chub 
522.14(1): sems kyi ngang yin la/ gsal ba nyid kyi ye shes cir yang ma bcos pa ni/ byang chub 
522.15(1): sems kyi ngang nyid yin/ de nam mkha' ltar ye shes chen po khyab bdal du gnas pa 
522.16(1): las/ bcos su med pas ngang nyid nam mkha' ye shes bcos su med ces bya'o/ /
522.17(1): rang bzhin nam mkha' zhes pa/ snang srid thams cad 'dus byas las byung ste/ nam 
522.18(1): mkha' rang bzhin dus gsum du 'dus ma byas pa de/ ye nas khyab bdal chen por 
522.19(1): gnas pas so/ /yang na bon gyi sgo mo brgyad khri bzhi stong ngam/ mtshan ma'i bon 
522.20(1): thams cad ni 'dus byas las byung na/ bon nyid bde ba chen po de dus gsum du 
522.21(1): 'dus ma byas pa te/ nam mkha' ltar ye shes chen po khyab bdal du gnas pas so/ /
523.1(1): yang na phung po dang khams dang skye mched thams cad ni 'dus byas las byung ste/
523.2(1): byang chub kyi sems dus gsum du 'dus ma byas te/ rang gi rang bzhin gyi nam 
523.3(1): mkha' ltar ye shes chen po khyab bdal du gnas pas ni/ rang bzhin nam mkha' ye 
523.4(1): shes 'dus ma byas zhes bya'o/ /bdag nyid nam mkha' ltar ye shes zhes pa/ nam 
523.5(1): mkha' yongs su rgya ma chad pa ni/ nam mkha'i bdag yin la/ de la gcig dang 
523.6(1): gnyis su bgrang du med de/ ye nas thig le nyag gcig tu gnas pa ni/ nam mkha'i 
523.7(1): bdag nyid do/ /'byung ba dang snang srid thams cad la/ gcig dang gnyis su 
523.8(1): bgrang pa yod kyang / nam mkha'i rang bzhin la gcig dang gnyis su bgrang du med 
523.9(1): pa ste/ ye nas khyab bdal chen por gnas pas so/ /yang na bon nyid yongs su rgya 
523.10(1): chad pa ni/ bon gyi bdag yin la/ de las gcig las gnyis su bgrang du med pa 
523.11(1): ni bon nyid yin/ bon gyi sgo mo brgyad khri bzhi stong ngam/ mtshan ma'i dngos po 
523.12(1): thams cad ni/ theg pa rim gyis bgrod du yod na/ bon nyid bde ba chen po la/
523.13(1): gcig dang gnyis su bgrang du med pa thig le chen po nyag gcig tu gnas pa de/
523.14(1): nam mkha' ltar ye shes chen po khyab bdal du gnas pas so/ /yang na kun gzhi 
523.15(1): byang chub sems yongs su rgya ma chad pa ni/ byang chub sems kyi bdag yin/ de la 
523.16(1): gcig dang gnyis su bgrang du med pa ni/ byang chub sems kyi bdag nyid yin/
523.17(1): phung po khams dang skye mched rnams/ gcig dang gnyis su kha gram du bgrang du yod 
523.18(1): kyang / byang chub kyi sems bde ba chen po ni/ gcig las gnyis su bgrang du med de/
523.19(1): thig le chen po gcig tu ye nas sangs rgyas pa de/ nam mkha' ltar ye shes chen po 
523.20(1): khyab gdal du gnas pas/ bdag nyid nam mkha' ye shes nyag gcig ma zhes bya ste/
523.21(1): bgrang pa dang mi bgrang pa gnyis med do/ /dngos po nam mkha' zhes pa/ 'byung ba
