524.2(1): dngos po thams cad kyi yul las 'das te/ ye shes chen po khyab bdal du gnas 
524.3(1): pas/ dpe dngos po yul las 'das pa'o/ /yang na bon gyi sgo mo brgyad khri bzhi stong 
524.4(1): ngam/ mtshan ma'i bon thams cad dngos por gnas te/ bon nyid bde ba chen po 
524.5(1): ni/ dngos po dang mtshan ma'i yul las ye nas 'das te/ nam mkha' ltar ye nas 
524.6(1): khyab bdal du gnas pas/ don dngos po med pa'i yul las 'das pa'o/ /yang na 
524.7(1): phung po dang khams dang skye mched la sogs pa ni/ dngos po cir yang snang ste/ byang 
524.8(1): chub kyi sems bde ba chen po ni/ dngos po thams cad kyi yul las ye nas 'das 
524.9(1): pas/ dngos po nam mkha' ye shes yul las 'das kyis bya ste/ dngos po gzung ba 
524.10(1): dang mi gzung ba gnyis su med do/ /mtshan ma nam mkha' zhes pa/ snang srid thams 
524.11(1): cad la mtshan ma yod kyang / nam mkha' la mtshan mar byung yang rdul yang ye nas 
524.12(1): med de/ mtshan ma med pa de ye nas khyab bdal du gnas pas so/ /yang na bon gyi 
524.13(1): sgo mo brgyad khri bzhi stong la mtshan ma yod de/ bon nyid bde ba chen po la ye nas 
524.14(1): mtshan ma rdul kyang mi srid pa de/ nam mkha' ltar ye nas khyab bdal du gnas 
524.15(1): pas so/ /yang na phung po khams dang skye mched la mtshan ma yod kyang / byang chub kyi 
524.16(1): sems bde ba chen po la ye nas mtshan ma rdul yang mi srid de/ de ye shes chen po 
524.17(1): khyab bdal du gnas pas ni/ mtshan ma nam mkha' ye shes rdul mi srid kyis bya'o/ /
524.18(1): de'i phyir na byang chub sems la mtshan ma rgyu ba dang mi rgyu ba gnyis med do/ / smra 
524.19(1): bsam nam mkha' zhes pa/ 'byung ba dang snang srid thams cad ni/ smra zhing brjod 
524.20(1): las ma 'das te/ nam mkha'i rang bzhin ni brjod pa'i tha snyad thams cad las ye 
524.21(1): nas 'das te/ de ye nas khyab bdal chen por gnas pas so/ /yang na bon gyi sgo 
525.1(1): mo brgyad khri bzhi stong ni/ tshig dang yi ge'i brjod du yod de/ bon nyid bde ba chen 
525.2(1): po ni/ tshig dang yi ge'i spyod yul 'das te/ nam mkha' ltar khyab bdal du gnas 
525.3(1): pas so/ /yang na phung po khams dang skye mched las sogs pa ni/ smra bsam brjod 
525.4(1): pa yod de/ byang chub kyi sems bde ba chen po ni/ smra bsam dang brjod pa'i tha snyad 
525.5(1): las ye nas 'das pa de/ nam mkha' ltar ye shes chen po khyab bdal du gnas pa 
525.6(1): ni/ smra bsam nam mkha' ye shes brjod du med ces bya ste/ byang chub sems la 
525.7(1): brjod pa dang mi brjod pa gnyis med do/ /'di zhes nam mkha' ye shes ces pa/
525.8(1): 'byung ba dang snang srid thams cad la 'di zhes bya bar gdags su yod de/ de ci'i 
525.9(1): phyir zhe na/ snang srid thams cad ni kha dog kyang so sor gdags su yod la/
525.10(1): dbyibs kyang so sor gdags su yod la/ dngos po yang 'di zhes bya bar so sor 
525.11(1): gdags su yod na/ nam mkha'i rang bzhin la/ kha dog 'di zhes bya bar gdags 
525.12(1): su med la/ dbyibs 'di zhes bya bar gdags su med la/ dngos po 'di zhes bya 
525.13(1): bar gdags su med do/ /de nam mkha' ltar khyab bdal chen por gnas pas so/ /
525.14(1): yang na bon gyi sgo mo brgyad khri bzhi stong ngam/ mtshan ma'i bon thams cad la/ gong 
525.15(1): ma ltar 'di zhes bya bar gdags su yod de/ bon nyid bde ba chen po la 'di zhes 
525.16(1): bya bar gdags su med de/ nam mkha' ltar ye shes chen po khyab bdal du gnas 
525.17(1): pa'o/ /yang na phung po dang khams dang skye mched la 'di zhes bya bar gdags su yod 
525.18(1): de/ kun gzhi byang chub sems la 'di zhes bya bar ye nas gdags pa med de/ nam 
525.19(1): mkha' ltar ye shes chen po khyab bdal du gnas pas/ 'di zhes nam mkha' ye shes 
525.20(1): gdags su med de/ byang chub sems la gdags pa dang mi gdags pa gnyis med 
525.21(1): do/ /stobs chen nam mkha' ye shes ces pa/ nam mkha' cir yang ma g.yos pa'i 
526.1(1): ngang las/ rang bzhin chen po'i stobs shugs kyis 'byung ba dang / snang srid thams 
526.2(1): cad shugs kyis byung nas/ nam mkha'i klong du bsdu zhing thim par bya ba'i stobs dang 
526.3(1): ldan pas/ dpe stobs dang ldan pa'o/ /yang na bon nyid cir yang ma g.yos pa las/
526.4(1): bon gyi sgo mo brgyad khri bzhi stong shugs kyis byung nas/ bon nyid kyi klong du bsdu zhing 
526.5(1): thim par bya ba'i stobs dang ldan pas/ don stobs dang ldan pa'o/ /yang na kun 
526.6(1): gzhi byang chub sems bde ba chen po cir yang ma g.yos pa la/ dus gsum gyi gshen 
526.7(1): rab dang / khams gsum gyi sems can thams cad rang bzhin gyis shugs kyis 
526.8(1): byung nas/ gshen rab dang sems can thams cad/ sems nyid kyi ngang du 'dus 
526.9(1): nas/ de rang bzhin nam mkha' ltar ye shes chen po khyab bdal du gnas pas/
526.10(1): stobs chen nam mkha' ye shes shugs kyis byung zhes bya'o/ /de phyir na byang chub 
526.11(1): sems la 'du ba dang mi 'du ba gnyis med do/ /bden pa'i nam mkha' ye shes 
526.12(1): ces pa/ dpe bden pa de bzhin nyid ni/ nam mkha' yin te/ nam mkha' ye shes 
526.13(1): chen po khyab bdal du gnas pas ni de yin la/ de'i ngang las ma g.yos pa ni 
526.14(1): bzhin yin/ ma bcos pa cir yang / mi dmigs pa ni nyid yin/ yang na bon nyid 
526.15(1): nam mkha' ltar ye shes chen po khyab bdal du gnas pas/ de la mi g.yo ba ni de 
526.16(1): yin/ mi g.yo ba de yi don de las ma bcos pa ni bzhin yin/ ma bcos pa de las 
526.17(1): gnyis su med pas nyid do/ /yang na kun gzhi byang chub sems nam mkha' ltar ye 
526.18(1): shes chen po khyab bdal du gnas pa las/ mi g.yo ba ni de yin/ mi g.yo ba'i ngang 
526.19(1): las ma bcos pa ni bzhin yin/ ma bcos pa las mi dmigs pa ni nyid yin/ de 
526.20(1): bzhin nyid kyis don de sal gyis rtogs na/ bden pa'i yang bden pa chen po yin 
526.21(1): te/ bden pa nam mkha' ye shes nyid zhes bya ste/ byang chub sems la bden pa dang 
527.1(1): mi bden par gnyis med de/ mthong ba nam mkha' zhes pa/ nam mkha'i rang bzhin 
527.2(1): yang rang gis rang gsal la// bon nyid bde ba chen po yang rang gis rang gsal 
527.3(1): la/ byang chub kyi sems bde ba chen po yang rang gis rang gsal la/ don dam par 
527.4(1): byang chub kyi sems sal gyis rtogs pa'i dus na/ snang zhing srid pas bsdus pa 
527.5(1): thams cad byang chub sems kyi rang bzhin du gsal te/ nam mkha' ltar ye shes 
527.6(1): chen po yongs su rgya ma chad pa des/ nyid zhal nyid kyis mthong ba las/ gzhan du 
527.7(1): mthong ba ci yang med de/ de'i phyir na mthong ba nam mkha' ye shes bdag zhal lta 
527.8(1): zhes bya ste/ byang chub sems la mthong ba ma mthong ba gnyis med do/ /don dam 
527.9(1): nam mkha' zhes pa/ don dam par byang chub sems/ nam mkha' ltar ye shes chen 
527.10(1): po khyab bdal du rtogs na/ spyir yang mi dmigs pa'i ting nge 'dzin gyis la gcad 
527.11(1): de/ dadape nam mkha' yang mi dmigs/ don bon nyid kyang mi dmigs/ rtags 
527.12(1): sems nyid kyang mi dmigs/ dpe don rtags dang gsum tshig tsam ma yin par 
527.13(1): mnyam par rtogs pa las/ mnyam mo snyams pa yang mi dmigs te/ cir yang mi 
527.14(1): dmigs pa la gzhag /ye shes nam mkha' zhes pa/ lung las kyang ye shes spyod las 
527.15(1): 'das pas/ rig pas mtshon du med/ rig pas mtshon du med pas/ bon nyid nam 
527.16(1): mkha' 'dra bon nyid nam mkha' 'dra ba'i dbyings dkyil du/ ye shes chen po ye 
527.17(1): nas dpyod las 'das zhes bya'o/ /mi nub rgyal mtshan rdzogs so/ /
527.18(1): 7 ye shes thig le zhes pa 'di nas mar ye shes thig le yi lung ston te/ byang chub 
527.19(1): kyi sems ye nas yod pa'i don/ gsal la ma nor bar ye nas shes pa ni/ ye shes 
527.20(1): kyi thig yin la/ de ye nas ma g.yos pa'i ngang las/ ye shes chen por gnas pas 
527.21(1): ni le yin/ de las ma bcos pa ni/ yang dag pa gsal ba'i mchog yin te/ thig le 
528.1(1): dbyings nas rang 'byung ye shes rdzogs pa'i byang chub sems zhes bya'o/ /snang srid 
528.2(1): snang zhing srid pas bsdus pa thams cad/ gsal ba ye shes kyi mkha' thig zhes pa/
528.3(1): la shar bas/ srid pa thams cad dus gcig tu sa le mkhyen pa'i don de/ snang srid 
528.4(1): kyi thig yin/ yangs shing rgya che ba yongs su rgya ma chad pa ni le yin/ de'i don las 
528.5(1): ma bcos pa ni/ snang srid dbyings nas gsal ba mkha' la shar ba'i byang chub 
528.6(1): sems zhes bya'o/ /bon nyid thig le zhes pa/ bon nyid bde ba chen po yod par sgros 
528.7(1): ma btags/ med par skur ma btab/ yod med gnyis kyi mtha' las 'das pa'i 
528.8(1): don de/ rang shes rig gi rgyal pos/ ma nor bar sa le mkhyen pa ni/ bon nyid kyi

528.11(1): ces bya'o/ /mi nub thig le zhes pa/ byang chub sems dus gsum du mi nub pa'i don

528.13(1): med pa ni le yin/ de dang de gnyis su med par ma bcos pa ni/ nub pa med pa'i

528.18(1): de gnyis su med pa'i don de sa le ma bcos pa ni/ g.yung drung dbyings nas/ ye 
528.19(1): shes thig le ston pa'i byang chub sems zhes bya'o/ /skye med thig le zhes pa/ byang chub

528.21(1): med byang chub kyi sems kyi thig yin/ skye ba med pa'i don de yongs su rgya ma chad pa 
529.1(1): ni le yin/ de dang de gnyis su med pa'i ngang las ma bcos pa ni/ skye med dbyings 
529.2(1): nas ye shes thig le rdzogs pa'i byang chub sems zhes bya'o/ /ston pa'i thig le zhes pa/

529.9(1): de dang de gnyis su med pa'i don las ma bcos pa ni/ kun 'byung gsal bar ston

529.12(1): dmigs su med par gsungs pas ni le yin/ dmigs su med pa'i don las ma 
529.13(1): bcos pa ni/ thabs chen rgyud las rig pa'i mchog tu gyur pa'i byang chub sems 
529.14(1): ces bya'o/ /man ngag thig le zhes pa/ byang chub sems las bden pa don gyi man

529.20(1): tu med pa de le yin/ de gnyis su med pa'i ngang las ma bcos pa ni/ thig le'i

546.3(1): khyab/ ma rtsal lhun grub phrin las kun gyi gzhi/ thugs rje 'byung gnas 'gro ba 
546.4(1): yongs la khyab/ don gnyis lhun grub byed pa'i rtsol ba bral/ mkha' gting kun 
546.5(1): snang srid pa bag la 'tsho/ mkha' klong dbyings shes bag la 'dus pa'i dbyings/
546.6(1): snang gsal sgron ma ma rig mun sel sgron/ ne slas sra brtan sa nyid sog pa'i rten/
546.7(1): li mun lan brgyad ye shes bskyed pa'i gzhi/ gnyis med thig le'i rang bzhin g.yos 
546.8(1): pa med/ sdong po dgu 'dus lta ba'i dngos gzhi 'di/ skye med rang shar mtha' 
546.9(1): gnyis grol ba'i gnas/ bltas pa med par de bzhin nyid mthong sems/ rlabs 
546.10(1): chen spyod pa kun gyi dngos gzhi 'di/ 'gag med rang shar rnam dag rang lugs 
546.11(1): gnas/ byas pa med par rnal mar lam la 'byor/ ma bcos sgom pa kun gyi dngos 
546.12(1): gzhi 'di/ rang gnas bde bar chen por rang gnas bde/ brjod med gleng bral ye 
546.13(1): nas kun gzhi sems/ ngo bo stong pa 'di zhes med/ rang bzhin snang la dngos po 
546.14(1): med/ bye brag sna tshogs phyogs lhung med/ dngos po rang bzhin bye brag med/ brjod 
546.15(1): med gleng bral byang chub sems/ de bzhin mkha' la lhag pa med/ rang bzhin klong 
546.16(1): la dog pa med/ ci bzhin dbyings la bri ba med/ mkha' klong dbyings la 'di zhes 
546.17(1): su/ brjod med gleng bral byang chub sems/ ye nas khebs pas ma khebs med/ ye 
546.18(1): nas khyab par ma 'dus med/ ye nas gnas par 'gyur ba med/ ye khebs ye khyab 
546.19(1): ye gnas par/ brjod med gleng bral byang chub sems/ ye nas rig pa bstan du 
546.20(1): med/ ye nas dag pa sbyang du med/ ye nas gsal ba sgrib pa med/ ye dag ye rig 
546.21(1): ye gsal bar/ brjod med gleng bral byang chub sems/ ma g.yos pa la phyogs cha 
547.1(1): med/ ma bcos pa la rnam 'gyur med/ lhun gyis grub la ma rdzogs med/ ma g.yos 
547.2(1): ma bcos lhun grub par/ brjod med gleng bral byang chub sems/ 'das pa nyid la 
547.3(1): brjod du med/ ma 'ongs 'di zhes gleng du med/ da ltar nyid la mtshon du med/
547.4(1): 'das dang ma 'ongs da ltar du/ brjod med gleng bral byang chub sems/ 'dus pa 
547.5(1): med pas 'bral ba med/ bral ba med pas 'dus pa med/ 'du 'bral med pas 
547.6(1): 'jig pa med/ 'du dang 'bral dang gnyis med par/ brjod med gleng bral byang 
547.7(1): chub sems/ yod ces bya bar sgro ma btags/ med ces bya bar skur ma btab/
547.8(1): yod med gnyis su grangs ma bgrangs/ yod dang med dang gnyis snang du/ brjod 
547.9(1): med gleng bral byang chub sems/ gshen rab sgam pos mdzad pa min/ sems can 
547.10(1): sgrin pos bcos pa min/ mdzad bcos gnyis su phye ba min/ mdzad dang bcos 
547.11(1): dang phye ba ru/ brjod med gleng bral byang chub sems/ dngos po med pa'i kun gzhi 
547.12(1): ni/ ye nas phra ba'i dbyings su brdal pa yis/ rags pa'i dngos po sems la ye 
547.13(1): nas med/ phra rags gnyis med kun gzhi byang chub sems/ ye nas stong pa'i 
547.14(1): dbyings su brdal pa yis/ snang ba'i dngos po sems la ye nas med/ snang stong 
547.15(1): gnyis med kun gzhi byang chub sems/ ye nas med pa'i dbyings su brdal pa yis/
547.16(1): yod pa'i dngos po sems la ye nas med/ yod med gnyis med kun gzhi byang chub 
547.17(1): sems/ ye nas chad pa'i dbyings su gdal pa yis/ rtag pa'i dngos po sems la 
547.18(1): ye nas med/ rtag chad gnyis med kun gzhi byang chub sems/ ye nas dor ba'i 
547.19(1): dbyings su bdal pa yis/ blang ba'i dngos po sems la ye nas med/ blang dor 
547.20(1): gnyis med kun gzhi byang chub sems/ ye nas shes rab klong du bdal pa yis/
547.21(1): 'khrul pa'i dngos po ye nas sems la med/ shes 'khrul gnyis med kun gzhi byang

575.7(1): skad cig rgyun la dus gsum lhun gyis grub/ phyogs ris med par mthun snang lhun 
575.8(1): gyis grub/ dngos gzhi yin pas 'khor 'das lhun gyis grub/ ces gsungs so/ /lta 
575.9(1): ba'i yang rtse g.yung drung dgu 'bar/ sdong po dgu 'dus kyi rgyud las/ klong chen 
575.10(1): rab 'byams kyi rgyud kyi le'u ste drug pa'o// //
575.11(1): 7 de nas yang zab dbyings dgu gsungs pa/ 7 mi 'gyur rtog med bon gyi 
575.12(1): dbyings dkyil du/ nyon mongs lcags kyi tha rams sngon po yang / 'gyur med 
575.13(1): dbyings su ma phye rang sar grol/ 7 mi 'gyur sgrib med bon gyi dbyings dkyil du/
575.14(1): skye rga na 'chi lcags kyi tha rams kyang / 'gyur med dbyings su ma phye rang sar grol/
575.15(1): 7 mi 'gyur skye med bon gyi dbyings dkyil du/ dgra gnyen lcags kyi tha rams sdong 
575.16(1): po yang / skye med dbyings su ma phye rang sar grol/ 7 mi 'gyur gnyis med bon gyi 
575.17(1): dbyings dkyil du/ bdag gzhan lcags kyi tha rams sdong po yang / gnyis med 
575.18(1): dbyings su ma phye rang sar grol/ 7 'gyur med ye shes bon gyi dbyings dkyil du/
575.19(1): gti mug zhum pa'i tha rams sdong po yang / ye shes dbyings su ma phye rang sar grol/
575.20(1): zhi ba mi 'gyur bon gyi dbyings dkyil du/ bdag tu nga rgyal tha rams sdong po yang /
575.21(1): zhi ba'i dbyings su ma phye rang sar grol/ 7 chags med mi 'gyur bon gyi dbyings 
576.1(1): dkyil du/ 'dod chags zhen pa'i tha rams sdong po yang / chags med dbyings su 
576.2(1): ma phye rang sar grol/ 7 mi 'gyur byams pa bon gyi dbyings dkyil du/ zhe sdang 
576.3(1): gdug sems tha rams sdong po yang / byams pa'i dbyings su ma phye rang sar grol/
576.4(1): 7mi 'gyur yangs pa bon gyi dbyings dkyil du/ gzhan smod zhig dga'i tha rams 
576.5(1): sdong po yang / yangs pa'i dbyings su ma phye rang grol lo/ 7 /zad med lhun rdzogs 
576.6(1): bon gyi dbyings dkyil du/ sgrib pa lcags kyi tha rams sdong po yang / dbye bsdam 
576.7(1): gcig pas zad med lhun rdzogs sems/ 7 zad med skye med bon gyi dbyings 
576.8(1): dkyil du/ skye shi lcags kyi tha rams sngon po yang / dbye bsdams gcig pas zad 
576.9(1): med lhun rdzogs sems/ 7 zad med lhun rdzogs sems kyi dbyings dkyil du/
576.10(1): gzhan phyogs lcags kyi tha rams sdong po yang / dbye bsdam gcig pas zad med 
576.11(1): lhun rdzogs sems/ zad med bdag med sems kyi dbyings dkyil du/ dgrar snang 
576.12(1): lcags kyi tha rams sngon po yang / dbye bsdam gcig pas zad med lhun rdzogs 
576.13(1): sems/ 7 zad med kun byams sems kyi dbyings dkyil du/ sdang phyogs lcags kyi 
576.14(1): tha rams sngon po yang / dbye bsdam gcig pas zad med lhun rdzogs sems/ zad 
576.15(1): med ye shes sems kyi dbyings dkyil du/ gti mug lcags kyi tha rams sngon po yang /
576.16(1): dbye bsdam gcig pas zad med lhun rdzogs sems/ 7 zad med mnyam pa sems 
576.17(1): kyi dbyings dkyil du/ nga rgyal lcags kyi tha rams sngon po yang / dbye bsdam gcig 
576.18(1): pas zad med lhun rdzogs sems/ 7 zad med yangs pa sems kyi dbyings dkyil 
576.19(1): du/ 'phrag dog lcags kyi tha rams sngon po yang / dbye bsdam gcig pas zad med

576.21(1): lcags kyi tha rams sngon po yang / dbye bsdam gcig pas zad med lhun rdzogs 
577.1(1): sems/ 7 dpag med snang stong bon gyi dbyings dkyil du/ snang stong gnyis rtog 
577.2(1): lcags kyi tha rams kyang / snang stong gnyis med sems kyi dbyings rdzogs sems/ 7
577.3(1): dpag med yod med bon gyi dbyings dkyil du/ yod med rtog pa lcags kyi tha 
577.4(1): rams kyang / yod med gnyis med sems kyi dbyings rdzogs sems/ 7 rtag chad 
577.5(1): dpag med bon gyi dbyings dkyil du/ rtag chad gnyis rtog tha rams sngon po yang /
577.6(1): rtag chad gnyis med sems kyi dbyings rdzogs sems/ 7 skye shi dpag med sems 
577.7(1): kyi dbyings dkyil la/ skye 'gag gnyis sems tha rams sngon po yang / skye shi gnyis

577.10(1): med sems kyi dbyings rdzogs sems/ spong len dpag med bon gyi dbyings dkyil 
577.11(1): du/ spong len rtog pa lcags kyi tha rams kyang / spong len gnyis med sems kyi 
577.12(1): dbyings rdzogs sems/ snang srid dpag med bon gyi dbyings dkyil du/ snod 
577.13(1): bcud gnyis rtog lcags kyi tha rams kyang / snang srid gnyis med sems kyi 
577.14(1): dbyings rdzogs sems/ dpag med nam mkha' bon gyi dbyings dkyil du/ mkha' 
577.15(1): 'byung gnyis rtog lcags kyi tha rams kyang / 'byung mkha' gnyis med dpag med 
577.16(1): sems kyi dbyings/ 7 rtog sems dpag med bon gyi dbyings dkyil du/ rtog 
577.17(1): sems gnyis rtog lcags kyi tha rams kyang / rtog sems gnyis med dpag med 
577.18(1): sems kyi dbyings/ 7 bdal pa chen po bon gyi dbyings dkyil du/ 'gyur ldog 
577.19(1): 'khrul pa lcags kyi tha rams kyang / gdal pa'i klong du bsdam dang glod pa med/ 7
577.20(1): gdal pa chen po bon gyi klong dkyil du/ ming tshig 'khrul pa lcags kyi tha rams 
577.21(1): kyang / gdal ba'i dbyings su bsdam dang glod pa med/ 7 Rang dag 'od chen 
578.1(1): gdal pa'i bon dbyings su/ rtog dpyod 'khrul pa lcags kyi tha rams kyang / bdal 
578.2(1): pa'i dbyings su bsdam dang glod pa med/ rang byung yon tan gdal pa'i dbyings 
578.3(1): dkyil du/ legs nyes 'khrul pa lcags kyi tha rams kyang / gdal pa'i dbyings su 
578.4(1): bsdam dang glod pa med/ 7 rtsol med gdal pa bon gyi dbyings dkyil du/ 'bad 
578.5(1): rtsol 'khrul pa lcags kyi tha rams kyang / gdal pa'i dbyings su bsdam dang glod pa 
578.6(1): med/ 7 kun 'byung gdal pa bon gyi dbyings dkyil du/ stong zad 'khrul pa lcags 
578.7(1): kyi tha rams kyang / gdal pa'i dbyings su bsdam dang glod pa med/ 7 de bzhin 
578.8(1): gdal pa bon gyi dbyings dkyil du/ bltas pas mthong 'dod lcags kyi tha rams 
578.9(1): kyang / 7 gdal pa bon dbyings bsdam dang slod pa med/ 7 Rang dag ye khyab bon

578.12(1): dmigs bcas lcags kyi tha rams sngon po yang / gdal pa bon dbyings bsdam 
578.13(1): dang slod pa med/ 7 dog med khrog brlag med pa bon gyi dbyings/ stong gsal 
578.14(1): dog med g.yung drung dbyings dkyil du/ lta mthong 'khrul pa lcags kyi tha rams 
578.15(1): kyang / dog med dbyings su rang grol ye sangs rgyas/ 7 lhag chad dog med g.yung 
578.16(1): drung dbyings dkyil du/ so sor ma rtogs lcags kyi tha rams kyang / dog med 
578.17(1): dbyings su rang grol ye sangs rgyas/ 7 mi nub brjod med g.yung drung dbyings 
578.18(1): dkyil du/ sbyong sgrib log pa lcags kyi tha rams kyang / dog med dbyings su rang 
578.19(1): grol ye sangs rgyas/ 7 ma bcos dog med g.yung drung dbyings dkyil du/ phyogs 
578.20(1): 'dzin log pa lcags kyi tha rams kyang / nub med dbyings su rang grol ye sangs 
578.21(1): rgyas/ 7 dus gsum dog med g.yung drung dbyings dkyil du/ gsum 'dzin log pa

579.4(1): dbyings dkyil du/ 'dzin chags log pa lcags kyi tha rams kyang / dog med

579.6(1): dkyil du/ sgro skur log pa lcags kyi tha rams kyang / dog med dbyings su rang grol 
579.7(1): ye sangs rgyas/ 7 rgyu rkyen dog med g.yung drung dbyings dkyil du/ rgyu rkyen gnyis

579.9(1): 'di zhes gar yang rgya ma chad pa'i dbyings/ 'gro 'ong rgya chad med pa'i dbyings

582.17(1): 7 de nas yang ston pas ba ga klong chen rab 'byams las/ ma bgrod lam gyi 
582.18(1): thig le dgu gsungs pa/ lta ba mi 'gyur lha gsas sku/ 'od gsal 'gyur med thig

582.20(1): 'gyur g.yung drung ye gnas sku/ rtag pa ye shes thig le che/ pad ma dri med gsung

583.1(1): gsung / bstan pa kun grags thig le che/ bstan pa mi nub gnas gyi gsung / ma 
583.2(1): rtsal lhun grub thig le che/ lta ba lha gsas thugs gsas thugs/ shes rab stong 
583.3(1): gsal thig le che/ thugs mchog gdal pa thig le'i thugs/ mi nor gdal khyab thig 
583.4(1): le che/ ston pa mi 'khrul gsal ba'i thugs/ nam mkha' 'od gsal thig le che/ zhes 
583.5(1): gsungs so/ 7 /de nas yang ston pas mtshan ma la chags pa'i gshen rab rnams 
583.6(1): la/ ba ga klong chen rab 'byams su/ ye 'khrog khrog rlag dgu gsungs pa/ thams 
583.7(1): cad thig le gcig pa la/ ba ga klong chen rab 'byams su/ 7 gnas la nges pa 
583.8(1): med pas dmigs yul khrog brlag byas/ chags pa ye nas med pas 'khor chags

583.10(1): dang ma 'ongs med pas dus gsum khrog brlag byas/ rang dag lhun gyis grub pas

583.14(1): khrog brlag byas/ zhes gsungs so/ 7 /de nas yang ston pas klong chen ba ga rab 
583.15(1): 'byams su/ rgyu dang 'bras bur lta ba'i gshen po rnams la rgyu med rnam pa dgu 
583.16(1): gsungs pa/ 7 khyung phrug nam mkhar lding pas 'phur rjes bcad rgyu med/ rnam rtog 
583.17(1): 'bras bu yin pas lha 'dre bzung rgyu med/ kha la lud pa med pas 'du 'dzi g.yeng 
583.18(1): rgyu med/ dbyings la bri ba med pas dmigs pa zhum rgyu med/ snang ba 'dre gegs

584.1(1): ces gsungs so/ 7 /de nas yang ston pas sems la ma gtogs pa'i sangs rgyas 
584.2(1): cig gzhan na yod par rtog pa rnams la/ ba ga klong chen rab 'byams su/ thams 
584.3(1): cad lhun grub rnam pa dgu gsungs pa/ ba ga klong chen rab 'byams su/ gang ltar 
584.4(1): mthong ba bon gyi dbyings/ khams gsum sa dgu lhun gyis grub/ ji ltar spyad kyang 
584.5(1): stong snang gsal/ bya ba med pa lhun gyis grub/ gang du brtsal kyang gsas mkhar 
584.6(1): zhing / srid gsum sems su lhun gyis grub/ gang du 'dug kyang bden pa'i gnas/
584.7(1): bden gnyis sems su lhun gyis grub/ gang du bltas kyang nam mkhar gsal/ snang

584.12(1): gsungs so/ 7 /de nas yang ston pas/ ba ga klong chen rab 'byams su/ bon sgo 
584.13(1): theg rgyud kyi bya rtsol gyis zin pa rnams la/ rtsol bral rnam pa dgu gsungs pa/ ba 
584.14(1): ga klong chen rab 'byams su/ bsrung dus bsrung yul gnyis med pas/ dam tshig 
584.15(1): (rang ldan )'dul khrims rtsol ba bral/ ba ga klong chen rab 'byams su/ rten dang 
584.16(1): 'phen pa gnyis med pas/ snang ldan 'brel ba'i rtsod pa bral/ ba ga klong chen rab 
584.17(1): 'byams su/ gnyis su bzung ba'i mtha' med pas/ dbu ma ye (bzhed )ldan rtsol ba 
584.18(1): bral/ ba ga klong chen rab 'byams su/ rje dang 'bangs su gnyis med pas/ zhim 
584.19(1): ldang (tho tho )gtsang sbra'i rtsol ba bral/ ba ga klong chen rab 'byams su/ lha dang 'dre 
584.20(1): ru 'dzin med pas/ spyi tho kun sgrub rtsol ba bral/ ba ga klong chen rab 'byams 
584.21(1): su/ rig pa'i rang dbang kun rdzogs pas/ ye tho dbang bskur rtsol ba bral/ ba ga 
585.1(1): klong chen rab 'byams su/ sku dang ye shes kun rdzogs pas/ lha rtse bsnyen sgrub rtsol 
585.2(1): ba bral/ ba ga klong chen rab 'byams su/ gsal dang mi gsal gnyis med pas/
585.3(1): snang rtse ting 'dzin rtsol ba bral/ ba ga klong chen rab 'byams su/ sangs la rgya sa 
585.4(1): rgya yul med/ gol sa brgyad ldog rtsol ba bral/ zhes gsungs so/ 7 /de nas yang 
585.5(1): ston pas/ dngos grub dang bzod pa thob par 'dod pa rnams la/ thob med rnam 
585.6(1): pa dgu gsungs pa/ 7 ba ga klong chen rab 'byams su/ rtsol med rdzu 'phrul ldan pa 
585.7(1): la/ bsgrub pas da bzod 'thob tu med/ ba ga klong chen rab 'byams su/ 'bad 
585.8(1): med dngos grub thob pa la/ bsgrub pas da bzod 'thob tu med/ ba ga klong chen 
585.9(1): rab 'byams su/ g.yo med bzod thob ldan pa la/ bsgrub pas da gzod 'thob tu 
585.10(1): med/[ /]'di gsum dpe la mi 'dug pas gsar btsud la yin min mkhyen ldan gyi dpyad bcos dang 
585.11(1): dpe gzhan rnyed na dag bcos mdzad dgos/)ba ga klong chen rab 'byams su/ thogs med 
585.12(1): shes rab gsal ba la/ bsgrub pas da gzod 'thob tu med/ ba ga klong chen rab 
585.13(1): 'byams su/ ye nas brjod med gzungs thob pas/ bsgrub pas da gzod 'thob tu 
585.14(1): med/ ba ga klong chen rab 'byams su/ ye nas mthu rtsal ldan pa la/ bsgrub pas 
585.15(1): gzod 'thob tu med/ ba ga klong chen rab 'byams su/ ye shes cho 'phrul rang byung 
585.16(1): la/ bsgrub pas da gzod 'thob tu med/ ba ga klong chen rab 'byams su/ ye shes 
585.17(1): rtsal gsum rdzogs pa la/ bsgrub pas da gzod 'thob tu med/ ba ga klong chen rab 
585.18(1): 'byams su/ bsgrub pa'i ye yod 'bras bu la/ bsgrub pas da gzod 'thob tu med/
585.19(1): ces gsungs so/ 7 /de nas yang ston pas mtshan mar 'dzin pa rnams la/ mtshan 
585.20(1): med rnam pa dgu gsungs pa/ 7 rig 'dzin sa la gshegs pas sdug bsngal mtshan 
585.21(1): ma med/ gsas mkhar phyag rgyas 'dul ba'i 'jig pa'i mtshan ma med/ bon sgo 
586.1(1): theg rgyud thos pas the tshom mtshan ma med/ 'bras bu a ru gyur pas skye ba'i mtshan 
586.2(1): ma med/ bde chen snying po thob pas sdug bsngal mtshan ma med/ khams gsum khrog 
586.3(1): brlag sgrol bas 'khor ba'i g.yeng ba med/ 'bras bu sems su rdzogs pas thob 
586.4(1): pa'i mtshan ma med/ shes rab thabs la brten pas rdzas kyi mtshan ma med/ klong 
586.5(1): chen lam la zhugs pas bgrod pa'i mtshan ma med/ zhes gsungs so/ 7 /de nas 
586.6(1): yang ston pas ming tshig yi ge la zhen pa'i gshen po rnams la/ ba ga klong chen rab 
586.7(1): 'byams su/ brjod du med pa dgu gsungs pa/ dngos po mtshan ma med pas rtag 
586.8(1): ces brjod du med/ 'gyur med bon gyi sku la chad ces brjod du med/ snang med 
586.9(1): dpe ru 'das pas yod ces brjod du med/ ye shes 'od du gsal bas med ces 
586.10(1): brjod du med/ gzung 'dzin yul las 'das pas snang zhes brjod du med/ thig 
586.11(1): le dbyings la rdzogs pas stong zhes brjod du med/ ye khebs gdeng du gyur pas lta 
586.12(1): zhes brjod du med/ ye khyab chen por gyur pas spyod ces brjod du med/ ye gnas 
586.13(1): klong du gyur pas sgom zhes brjod du med/ ces gsungs so/ /de nas yang ston pas 
586.14(1): khyab gdal chen po'i klong chen dgu gsungs pa/ ba ga klong chen rab 'byams su/
586.15(1): gshen rab lha yi gsang mdzod du/ thams cad 'gyur med g.yung drung bon/ ba ga 
586.16(1): klong chen rab 'byams su/ gshen rab lha yi gsang mdzod du/ thams cad skye med 
586.17(1): gdod nas dag /ba ga klong chen rab 'byams su/ gshen rab lha yi gsang mdzod 
586.18(1): du/ thams cad 'chi med skyes nas brtsan/ ba ga klong chen rab 'byams su/ gshen 
586.19(1): rab lha yi gsang mdzod du/ 'di ltar snang med dpe las 'das/ ba ga klong chen 
586.20(1): rab 'byams su/ gshen rab lha yi gsang mdzod du/ lta ba gdeng chen rtogs pa 
586.21(1): ste/ ba ga klong chen rab 'byams su/ gshen rab lha yi gsang mdzod du/ spyod pa 
587.1(1): gang shar rnam par dag /ba ga klong chen bar 'byams su/ gshen rab lha yi gsang 
587.2(1): mdzod du/ mdzad spyod phrin las lhun gyis grub/ ba ga klong chen rab 'byams 
587.3(1): su/ gshen rab lha yi gsang mdzod du/ dam tshig ye srung bsrung med dag /ba ga 
587.4(1): klong chen rab 'byams su/ gshen rab lha yi gsang mdzod du/ gsal khyab thig le 
587.5(1): dbyings la rdzogs/ zhes gsungs so/ /lta ba sdong po dgu 'dus kyi rgyud las/ rab 
587.6(1): 'byams klong gi le'u ste brgyad pa'o/ //
587.7(1): 7 de nas yang ston pas lta ba dbyings kyi ngang dgu gsungs pa/ thams cad 
587.8(1): mkhyen las rang byung kun gyi klong / ji bzhin ma bcos ye shes byed pa med/ stong 
587.9(1): pa snang gsal phyogs med rab 'byams klong / rang byung ye shes sems klong mkha' 
587.10(1): ru yangs/ yang dag ma bslad gsas mkhar rang bzhin dag /ma bcos dbyings 
587.11(1): las rig pa'i snying po byung / ye shes ma sgrib ngang gis lhun gyis grub/ gnyis med 
587.12(1): mnyam pas nyon mongs ka nas dag /kun la rol pas khams gsum mngon sangs 
587.13(1): rgyas/ zhes gsungs so/ 7 /de nas yang ston pas byang chub sems lta ba'i rtsal dgu 
587.14(1): gsungs pa/ ngang dang rang bzhin bdag nyid chen po las/ mi g.yo mnyam gsal 
587.15(1): sems kyi nyi ma shar/ phyi nang yul zhes ri lung med par gsal/ gsas mkhar 
587.16(1): kun la ye shes me chen 'bar/ ye nas 'od 'bar kun gzhi dbal 'bar bas/ zhe 
587.17(1): sdang me bsad bsam pa cir mi dmigs/ nga rgyal mkhar phabs brjod med ngang 
587.18(1): la mnyam/ 'dod chags mtsho skems zhen pa gting nas bzlog /'phrag dog sgo 
587.19(1): bcad bde nyams bon gyi lam/ gti mug 'thom bsal ye shes 'od du 'bar/ zhes 
587.20(1): gsungs so/ 7 /de nas yang ston pas gsas mkhar las dbyings rang bzhin dgu 
587.21(1): gsungs pa/ kun gzhi rang gsal bde 'byams sems kyi 'od/ 'od zil bdud 
588.1(1): rtsi 'khor ba'i gting du gsal/ bdud rtsi'i rgya mtsho snang srid dbyings su bskyil/
588.2(1): mkha' klong ma lus kun gzhi dbyings su thim/ snang srid mtshan ma ye shes ngang las 
588.3(1): gsos/ cir snang srid las bde ba chen po bskyed/ gnyis med kun mnyam bdal 
588.4(1): pa chen por 'dus/ 'dus pa nyid la ma rdzogs gzhan na med/ zhes gsungs so/ /
588.5(1): 7 de nas yang ston pas lta ba dbyings kyi rgyun dgu gsungs pa/ gzhan du g.yo 
588.6(1): ba med pas dgongs pa rgyun mi 'chad/ dbyings la dbye ba med pas snying rje rgyun 
588.7(1): mi 'chad/ ye shes klong du gyur pas ting 'dzin rgyun mi 'chad/ rtogs pa klong du 
588.8(1): gyur pas yon tan rgyun mi 'chad/ byung tshor rang la rdzogs pas lhag mthong rgyun mi 
588.9(1): 'chad/ dmigs med g.yos pa med pas sgom pa rgyun mi 'chad/ rig pa khong nas 
588.10(1): shar bas ye shes rgyun mi 'chad/ snang la rang bzhin med pas phyag rgya rgyun mi 'chad/
588.11(1): bdag dang bdag tu ma byas dngos grub rgyun mi 'chad/ ces gsungs so/ 7 /de 
588.12(1): nas yang ston pas lta ba dbyings kyi dmar thag dgu gsungs pa/ brjod bcos 
588.13(1): rtsol med gsas mkhar lha gnas su/ snga 'das phyi gshegs gshen po kun 'das 
588.14(1): pas/ skye med dbyings su gshegs par dmar thag bcad/ rgyal ba gshegs bzhin 
588.15(1): rig 'dzin kun gshegs pa/ brjod med gnas su gshegs par dmar thag bcad/
588.16(1): snga rdzogs phyi rdzogs rdzogs pa chen po ru/ ma bcos gnas su rdzogs par dmar thag 
588.17(1): bcad/ dag byed dag pa med de rang dag lhun grub par/ rtsol bral gnas su dag 
588.18(1): par dmar thag bcad/ 'das dang ma 'das med de byung ba kha 'das pas/ ma 
588.19(1): g.yos gnas su 'das par dmar thag bcad/ shi dang ma shi med de gsas mkhar 
588.20(1): nam mkha' ru/ 'od gsal gnas su thim par dmar thag bcad/ dog med yul 
588.21(1): na gzugs med sku gnas pa/ rtag tu g.yung drung sku ru sangs rgyas par/ dbyings 
589.1(1): shes rdzogs su gnas par dmar thag bcad/ rang bzhin med pas ma 'gags 
589.2(1): stong pa'i gsung / gsang sgo ma 'gags mkhyen par sangs rgyas par/ mkha' gsal 
589.3(1): gnas su bzhag par dmar thag bcad/ thugs su gdal pas ye shes chen po'i 
589.4(1): thugs/ sems nyid dbyings su thams cad sangs rgyas par/ klong khyab gnas su 
589.5(1): bzhag par dmar thag bcad/ bcad tsam nyid na gcad gcod mtshan ma med/
589.6(1): ces gsungs so/ 7 /de nas yang ston pas gsungs pa/ nga yis bstan pa yongs 
589.7(1): rdzogs 'di/ ka dag lhun rdzogs gnyis med kyang / mkha' klong dbyings dang gsum 
589.8(1): du 'dus/ ye khyebs ye khyab ye gnas gsum/ mkha' klong dbyings dang gsum du 
589.9(1): 'dus/ ma g.yos ma bcos bdag nyid gsum/ mkha' klong dbyings dang gsum 
589.10(1): du 'dus/ mi g.yo mnyam pa gsal ba gsum/ mkha' klong dbyings dang gsum du 
589.11(1): 'dus/ stong dang gsal dang snang ba gsum/ mkha' klong dbyings dang gsum du 
589.12(1): 'dus/ sku dang gsung dang thugs dang gsum/ mkha' klong dbyings dang gsum la 
589.13(1): 'dus/ brjod med ma bcos rtsol bral gsum/ mkha' klong dbyings dang gsum du 
589.14(1): 'dus/ de rnams byang chub sems la rdzogs/ rdzogs pa nyid la mtshan brjod med/
589.15(1): lta ba sdong po dgu 'dus 'di/ gnas rigs las snang ma dag par/ chu srin pir gyi 
589.16(1): gre ba ru/ nor bu rin chen chud pa ltar/ bskal par du ni shor mi bya/ gnas rigs 
589.17(1): las snang dag pa la/ nan tan gsang bas bstan par bya'o/ /zhes gsungs nas 
589.18(1): mnyam pa'i ngang la bzhugs so/ /de nas 'khor rnams kyis dga' gdung mos pa'i 
589.19(1): sems kyis bstod pa/ 7 sku kun snang khyab pa e ma ho/ gsung gshen lha dkar po 
589.20(1): a la la ho/ thugs kun tu bzang po smar zhi hrun/ zhes bstod do/ /byang chub sems 
589.21(1): dpa' thams cad rdzogs pa'i klong / sdong po dgu 'dus lta ba'i rgyud chen las/ lta 
590.1(1): ba gdar bcad pa yi le'u ste dgu pa rdzogs so// //
590.2(1): 7 lta ba sdong po dgu 'dus la/ stod na le'u sum brgya drug cu yod/ bar du le'u 
590.3(1): sum brgya drug cu yod/ smad na sdud pa'i mdo dgu yod/ bzung grangs sum brgya 
590.4(1): drug cu yod/ cha lag zur brdeg le'u bzhi yod/
590.5(1): 7 rgyung yaRa bla chen khod spungs bdag /kun bzang bdag zhal bka' thob nas/
590.6(1): rtogs spyod sgom pa'i dngos grub tu/ mngon shes tshe yi rig 'dzin thob/ yi dam lha 
590.7(1): dang khod spungs gnyis/ nya dang bco brgyad zla ba ltar/ chu mnyam zheng mnyam khyab 
590.8(1): mnyam yang / bco brgyad nya chen ma yin ltar/ da dung mngon par sangs ma rgyas/
590.9(1): bon gyi bstan pa mthar rgyas phyir/ da ste gdung brgyud bcu drug na/ khod spungs 
590.10(1): dran pa nam mkhar 'gyur ro/ /zhes rgyung mu khod kyis gsungs so/ /smar gyer rgyung 
590.11(1): bsrubs kyi bka' gter/ rma la seg gis gtug go /bdag dang rgyu sbyor yon bdag 
590.12(1): 'gro ba kun/ skye ba'i phreng bar gang du bon nyid la/ rtse gcig mos gus 'du 'bral 
590.13(1): med pa yi/ sdong po dgu 'dus theg chen rgyud spyod shog /ces yang ston gyi phyag dpe 
590.14(1): ltar bshus lags/ bstan pa'i yang rtse gsang sems lta ba'i rgyu/ bstan pa nyams 
590.15(1): gso phyogs bcur rgyas phyir du/ bstan 'dzin rnam dag mchog gis par spel bas/
590.16(1): bstan 'gro'i rgud pa slar gso'i bkra shis shog /
591.1(1): gsas mkhar g.yung drung ye khyebs lta ba'i 
591.2(1): rgyud ces bya ba bzhugs so/ /
591.3(1): /ston pa kun tu bzang po rang byung nges par ston pa'i lha la phyag 'tshal 
591.4(1): lo/ /g.yung drung ye khyebs ma lus rdzogs pa che/ lhun grub mi 'gyur dbyings kyi 
591.5(1): 'og min na/ ston pa kun bzang thugs rje che mnga' bas/ dbyer med ngo bo nyid kyi 
591.6(1): 'khor rnams la/ de tshe don dam nges par yang dag bka'/ rang bzhin rig pa'i 
591.7(1): tshig dang yi ges bshad/ lung gi rgyal po don dam nges pa'i gsung / mi 'gyur khyab 
591.8(1): brdal nam mkha'i ngang tshul can/ yon tan kun 'byung nges don ston pa'i lam/
591.9(1): kun gyi gzhi gyur ye phyir bla ma'i bon/ man ngag bcud 'dus lhun rdzogs rol pa che/
591.10(1): thugs kyi nying khu bla med yang rtse'i gter/ gsal ba'i snying po nor bu rin po che/ ye 
591.11(1): nas rmad byung bdud las rgyal ba'i 'da'/ cir snang gang med gting dpag brtag 
591.12(1): par dka'/ gang gis mi phebs gang la ldog mi tshol/ skal ldan dad che yang rab 
591.13(1): blo can gyis/ 'di la mos thos ngang la gnas gyur na/ byang chub sems su dag cing 
591.14(1): kun grol nas/ ye sangs mngon du gyur pa'i 'bras bu 'thob/ khungs don bstan pa 
591.15(1): ste dang po'o// //
591.16(1): 7 gdod nas ka dag lhun grub 'dus ma byas/ skye med 'gag med gsas 
592.1(1): mkhar snying po ni/ bde bar gshegs pa 'gro ba'i rgyud dag la/ bzang ngan med 
592.2(1): par til 'bru'i mar ltar gnas/ rig pa rang la gnas pas bstan pa ni/ mi 
592.3(1): 'gyur g.yung drung ri rab snying po rdzogs/ brtan la mi 'gyur 'byung ba'i snying po 
592.4(1): nyid/ pha rol dpung 'joms ri bo chen po skyed/ dpe'i g.yung drung bstan pa'i le'u 
592.5(1): ste dang po'o// //
592.6(1): 7 bstan pa'i g.yung drung ye khebs rdzogs pa che/ gsal stong 'gyur med nam 
592.7(1): mkha'i ngang tshul can/ bskal par 'khrugs kyang nam yang 'gyur ba med/ srid par 
592.8(1): 'khyams kyang sems la skye shi med/ 'byung ba 'gyur yang rig pa'i dbyings mi nyams/
592.9(1): phyi nang theg pa'i don la zhen pa'i mtha'/ gol sgrib shan phye ka dag lhun grub tu/ mi 
592.10(1): dmigs mnyam pa nyid du mngon sangs rgyas/ don gyi g.yung drung bstan pa'i le'u 
592.11(1): ste gnyis pa'o// //
592.12(1): 7 g.yung drung ye khebs ma lus lus pa med/ rang byung ye shes rig pa'i snying 
592.13(1): po nyid/ sgom du med cing yengs med bstan pa ru/ bon nyid dbyings su 'gyur ba 
592.14(1): med par gzhag /'khrul rtog 'go gnon ye shes drod rtags skyed/ thig le chen 
592.15(1): po'i dbyings su mngon sangs rgyas/ rtags kyi g.yung drung bstan pa'i le'u ste gsum 
592.16(1): pa'o// //
592.17(1): 7 so so skye bo mu stegs 'khrul pa'i lam/ dug lnga kha tshang 'khrul pa phra rags skyed/
592.18(1): rig pa'i ye shes ma rig 'khrul pa yis/ gzung 'dzin 'khrul pa'i las la bag 
592.19(1): chags brtas/ phyin ci log bzhi'i rgya mdud dam pos bsdam/ gdung bas bdag 
592.20(1): gir 'dzin pa dngos su byed/ rtag par 'dzin pa 'khor ba'i sems can yin/ gang 
592.21(1):  bdag nyid rtag par 'dzin pa dang / ngo bo nyid la rgyu ru 'dod pa dang / las 
593.1(1): dang byed pa rgyu ru 'dod pa dang / phya 'am dbang phyug rgyu ru 'dod pa rnams/ mu 
593.2(1): stegs rtag par 'dzin pa'i lta ba yin/ gang zag bdag nyid chad lta ba/ tshe la snga 
593.3(1): phyi med pa dang / las la rgyu 'bras med pa dang / yon tan skyon la dregs pa rnams/
593.4(1): chad par 'dzin pa'i lta ba yin/ so so skye bo mu stegs 'khrul par bstan pa'i skabs 
593.5(1): te bzhi pa'o// //
593.6(1): 7 bon nyid dbyings la skye 'gag gnyis su med/ gzhi nyid so sor ma phye tha mi 
593.7(1): dad/ rig pas sa 'dzin nyon mongs gnas su dag /zhar skye zhar 'gog 'khrul pa 
593.8(1): rig par grol/ rang byung rig gsal 'khor ba mya ngan sangs/ phyi snod 'brel pas 
593.9(1): bya ba'i bon 'di yang / 'jig chags stong gnas bskal srid mtha' las grol/ nang 
593.10(1): bcud sgos kyis bsdus pa'i bon 'di yang / skye rga na 'chi skye 'gag mtha' las grol/
593.11(1): rig pa dus gsum 'gyur med klong la grol/ kun grol 'di nyid bon nyid mnyam 
593.12(1): pa'i lung / rig pa'i ye shes skye zhing dbye ba med/ rtag na rtag tu bas te g.yung 
593.13(1): drung sku/ gsal stong 'gyur ba med pa nyid du gnas/ med pa ma yin rig pa'i 
593.14(1): snying po can/ chad na chad du bas te bon nyid dbyings/ stong zad mthar med nam 
593.15(1): mkha'i ngogs ltar gnas/ rig pa rang sor gnas pa ye khebs lung / mnyam pa'i 
593.16(1): lung ste lnga pa'o// //
593.17(1): 7 mnyam nyid mi g.yo ye sangs rgyas/ snod bcud 'khor bas bsdus pa'i bon/
593.18(1): ye nas lhun grub byang chub sems/ rtag chad mtha' bral ka nas dag /rang bzhin 
593.19(1): ye dag g.yung drung sems/ mi skye mi 'gag cir mi dmigs/ nga bdag 'dzin pa

593.21(1): bar gnas/ ngo bo nyid du mngon sangs rgyas/ skye 'gag med pa'i g.yung drung ste 
594.1(1): drug pa'o// //
594.2(1): 7 rtog sel thabs kyi theg pa dag la ni/ nyon mongs 'khrul pa'i snang ba sna 
594.3(1): tshogs la/ phan gdag phyi nang bar gsum de la phyi'i/ rtog sel gto chen sum brgya 
594.4(1): drug cu dang / dpyad kyi bye brag bzhi brgya rtsa bzhi yis/ nad dang gdon las gyur 
594.5(1): pa thams cad sel/ thog mar bya byed bar du phan gdags dang / tha mar bzlog 
594.6(1): cing bcos su yod pa yis/ la kha'i so pha bzhin de gros kyi phul/ bar gyi rtog sel 
594.7(1): gyer bzhi skad gcong dgu/ gtang rag bzhi bcu rtsa gnyis brda thabs bstun/ snang 
594.8(1): zhing srid pa'i lha 'dre yas dang thag /lha srin mtshams su g.yung drung skos shing 
594.9(1): btsugs/ snga phyi bar gyi bu lon lan chags sel/ 'chos kyin 'don pa skye 'gag 
594.10(1): mtha' ru rtogs/ tshong 'dus lo tsa bzhin du rag las so/ /nang gi rtog sel shi 
594.11(1): thabs brgyad cu gcig /'dur sgo bzhi dang 'dur thabs sum brgya dang / drug cur 
594.12(1): ldan cing thugs rje thabs mkhas pas/ gson gshin mtshams na nges pa'i brda don 
594.13(1): sbyor/ bag chags sgrib sel 'khor ba'i mya ngan sel/ bskal srid bla yid sems dang 
594.14(1): gsum du rtogs/ rmi lam mdangs bzhin snang la rang bzhin med/ rtog pa sel 
594.15(1): ba'i skabs te bdun pa'o// //
594.16(1): 7 dus gsum 'gyur med g.yung drung bon gyi dbyings/ ma rtogs rmongs pa sgyu 
594.17(1): ma'i sha mig can/ 'khrul pa'i blo yis thog ma tha mar 'dzin/ mya ngan 'das pa bde 
594.18(1): chen don ma mthong / las kyi dbang gis phan dang gnod par blta/ bla med phyin 
594.19(1): pa'i 'bras bu mi 'thob ste/ dus gsum 'gyur med g.yung drung ngang las 'khrul/
594.20(1): yang dag byang chub sems kyi don la sgrib/ g.yo zog gros kyis 'khor bar ltung bar 
594.21(1): nges/ 7 'pho 'gyur med pa g.yung drung bon gyi dbyings/ 'khrul pa'i dbang gis lha 
595.1(1): dang 'dre ru bzung / thams cad mnyam pa nyid du ma rtogs pas/ lan pas srog 
595.2(1): bcad 'khor ba'i lha 'dre mchod/ snang zhing srid pa kun rdzob sgyu ma la/ sgyu mas sgyu 
595.3(1): ma bslu ba snying re rje/ 7 skye 'gag med pa g.yung drung bon gyi dbyings/ ma rtogs 
595.4(1): 'khrul pas skye 'chi brda sprod mkhan/ sems nyid skye 'chi med par ma rtogs par/
595.5(1): 'khor ba'i gnas na 'khor ba'i gdung ba yi/ mya ngan gzhen 'debs bag chags 
595.6(1): sgrib pa gsog /'dur gshen thugs rje'i stobs dang mi ldan par/ don la mi rtogs 
595.7(1): (brton ) tshig lus rgyas bstar bas/ gshin la mi phan log sems dregs pa skye/ long 
595.8(1): bas long ba khrid pa snying re rje/ skye 'gag med pa byang chub ngang las 'khrul/ bde ba 
595.9(1): byang chub sems kyi don la sgrib/ de la mtho ris re ba rmongs pa yin/ gnyis su med 
595.10(1): pa'i lung ste brgyad pa'o/ //
595.11(1): yang dag bon nyid don chen 'di/ rang rig ye shes spyod yul las/ gzung 
595.12(1): 'dzin gnyis su snang ba min/ ye nas lhun gyis rdzogs pa'i ngang / mnyam pa'i rgyal 
595.13(1): po bon nyid sku/ ye sangs rgyas pa'i spyod yul la/ so sor ma yin thig ler zhog /
595.14(1): ngang la gnas shing g.yung drung la/ rig pa shes bzhin bya ra btang / thogs med 
595.15(1): gsal ba'i mar me la/ ngang gis mi g.yo mi rmugs shing / sems nyid klong nas rig 
595.16(1): pa shar/ ka dag chen po gdeng dang ldan/ rnam grol lce yi dbang pos kyang / 'di la 
595.17(1): brjod du rdul tsam med/ yongs la khyab gdal cir mi dmigs/ mtha' dang bral 
595.18(1): ba'i ngo bor gnas/ dmigs su med pa'i g.yung drung ste dgu pa'o// //
595.19(1): 7 sgrib sel tshad med theg pa nyid/ yul ni mi rtag sgyu ma la/ shes pa thog ma tha 
595.20(1): ma can/ sngon du 'khrul ba'i rgyu yod pas/ bar du dka' ba sna tshogs kyis/ dge 
595.21(1): bcu gzhung spyad sbyin pa sna tshogs btang / tshad med bzhi bsgom sdig pa bcu po 
596.1(1): spangs/ gshen rab dka' ba'i spyod pa rlabs chen gyis/ drod gsher ldan pa'i 
596.2(1): dben gnas nyams dga' bar/ rtsi shing gnas khang nags tshal 'bub pa ltar/ me 
596.3(1): tog 'bras bu'i dgos 'dod 'byung bar byed/ de bzhin sngon sbyangs da ltar sgrib 
596.4(1): spangs pas/ 'khor bar mi ltung thar pa'i 'bras bu 'thob/ nam mkha'i char bzhin 
596.5(1): kun snyoms 'bras bu smin/ sgrib pa sel ba'i skabs te bcu pa'o// /
596.6(1): 7 spang blang gnyis su med pa'i byang chub sems/ dge sdig gnyis su spyod pa 
596.7(1): 'khrul pa'i lam/ bon nyid dbyings nas rang byung rig pa shar/ skye med 'bras bu 
596.8(1): rtsal med lhun la rdzogs/ thog mtha' gnyis su 'dzin pa nyon re mongs/ rang bzhin 
596.9(1): ka dag 'bad rtsol med pa la/ rtsol sgrub tshi chad bya ba snying re rje/ 'du 'bral 
596.10(1): gnyis med byang sems don ma rtogs/ dka' ba'i spyod pa rang 'khor nyam thag rgyu/
596.11(1): gshen chung de yis bon nyid gdeng ma rtogs/ dug lnga ma spangs rang sar grol ba'i 
596.12(1): bon/ thog mthar mi 'dzin thig le'i ngang tshul can/ kun grol g.yung drung ye khebs 
596.13(1): ngang du zhog /thog mtha' med pa'i lung ste bcu gcig pa'o// //
596.14(1): 7 lhun rdzogs chen po spangs blang med pa'i mchog /rin chen gling nas sa rdo 
596.15(1): btsal mi rnyed/ yod cing rtag pa ther zug min/ rang bzhin med par kun la khyab/
596.16(1): med cing stong pa rgya chad min/ nam mkha'i mtha' ltar rgya ma chad/ rang byung nor bu 
596.17(1): rin po che/ bslad cing bcos pas ra ru 'gro/ ma bcos ma bslad sa le sbram/ snang 
596.18(1): ba med pa'i spyod yul 'di/ bdag gis bdag nyid mi dmigs na/ gzhan gyis 
596.19(1): dmigs par ga la 'gyur/ ma dmigs pa nyid mtha' dang bral/ ngang la gnas 
596.20(1): pa bsam gtan yin/ bying rmugs dbang du yongs mi btang / mtshan ma'i rtog 
596.21(1): pa zad gyur nas/ lhun grub ye shes rang las 'char/ phyi nang yon tan ma lus pa/
597.1(1): rang bzhin rang la rdzogs pas na/ gzhan du smon pa'i yul med de/ 'bras bu phyis 
597.2(1): 'thob re dogs med/ gza' gtad med pa'i bon nyid yin/ re dogs med pa'i 
597.3(1): g.yung drung ste bcu gnyis pa'o/ //
597.4(1): 7 nyon mongs bag chags sel ba'i drang srong nyid/ sdug bsngal 'khor ba'i khyim 
597.5(1): nas rab tu byung / so so'i gnas bzung nye drung 'brel thag bcad/ 'jig rten mi 
597.6(1): rtag sgyu ma'i rang bzhin las/ gcig pur gnas dang sde par gnas pa ste/ shes 
597.7(1): rab dad che dag pa drang srong pa/ snod kyi 'jig rten gnas su grub pa 'di/ shin 
597.8(1): tu cha phra'i rdul las grub par 'dod/ de la gnyis te gcig tu 'dod pa dang / so 
597.9(1): sor bye brag dag tu 'dod pa'o/ /gzung ba'i yul la don dam skad cig ma/ shes 
597.10(1): rab stobs chung gtsang ma gtsug phud kyis/ snang srid snod bcud 'khor ba'i bon 
597.11(1): 'di dag /phyi nang rten cing 'brel ba'i stobs las byung / de nyid bzlog pas mya 
597.12(1): ngan 'da' bar shes/ lus ngag yid kyi nyon mongs sbyang ba'i phyir/ pho khrims rtsa ba 
597.13(1): bzhi yis gzhi bzung nas/ yan lag nyis brgya lnga bcu tshang bar bsrung / mo khrims 
597.14(1): rtsa ba brgyad kyis gzhi bzung nas/ yan lag sum brgya drug cu gtsang mar bsrung /
597.15(1): dge bsnyen dag gis gtan khrims sna lnga bsrung / bsnyen gnas pho mos dus khrims 
597.16(1): yan lag brgyad/ gshen rab las spyod zab cing cha phra bas/ lus ngag yid gsum 
597.17(1): 'khrul pa'i bag chags sbyong / tshad med bzhi sgom pha rol phyin bcu spyod/ chab rom 
597.18(1): dbang la thebs pa lta bu yis/ bla med 'bras bu bzhi la gnas par 'gyur/ nyon 
597.19(1): mongs sel ba'i skabs te bcu gsum pa'o// //
597.20(1): 7 de nas lhun grub ma spangs rnam par dag /gnyis med 'gyur ba med pa'i 
597.21(1): bon sku la/ phyi nang gnyis su bye ba 'khrul pa'i lam/ ye nas ka dag byang chub 
598.1(1): sems nyid la/ rtsa ba yan lag sdom bsrung drang srong pa/ rnam rtog skye ba'i rgyu ste 
598.2(1): phyir la dam/ nges par bsrung du med pa ma shes 'khrul/ rang dag rang grol don 
598.3(1): la mi 'jog par/ khrus dang gtsang sbra byed pa nyon re mongs/ rang 'byung lhun 
598.4(1): grub 'bras bu rang la gnas/ rgyu 'bras gnyis su 'dzin pa snying re rje/ kun gzhi 
598.5(1): ma g.yos rgya mtsho lta bu la/ rang rig snying po khyab gdal nyi ma shar/ sa le sang 
598.6(1): nge phyogs cha kun dang bral/ rang la rdzogs pas ma bcos lhun la gnas/ 'dod 
598.7(1): dgur 'gyur ba'i yon tan rin po che/ re dogs med pa nam mkha'i mtha' dang 
598.8(1): mnyam/ phyi nang med par bon gyi dbyings su gcig /dngos med gdos bral byang 
598.9(1): chub sems nyid yin/ phyi nang med pa'i lung ste bcu bzhi pa'o// //
598.10(1): 7 gzung 'dzin med pa'i ye dag byang chub sems/ rang byung ye shes dbyings 
598.11(1): las g.yo ba med/ mkha' ltar mnyam pa kun gyi re ba skong / lhan ne lhang nge lhun 
598.12(1): gyis grub pa'i ngang / ma bcos so na gnas pa ye re bzhag /rtogs ldan don la 
598.13(1): gnas pa bon gyi sku/ phyogs ris med pa'i khyab gdal thugs rje can/ nyi ma'i 
598.14(1): dkyil 'khor lta bu gzi brjid che/ spyod pa dgag sgrub med pa'i ngang tshul can/
598.15(1): pad ma lta bur 'dam gyi skyon ma gos/ rtsal med 'bras bu lhun grub chen po nyid/
598.16(1): kun tu bzang po rang byung ye sangs rgyas/ rnam dag lam chen byang chub sems kyi 
598.17(1): dbyings/ gnyis med don rtogs 'bras bu re dogs med/ 'di la tshig dang yi ges 
598.18(1): mtshon du med/ phyi nang gzugs 'dzin dngos por gang rtogs pa/ byis pa'i blo can 
598.19(1): 'khrul pa'i lam pa yin/ ma rtogs tshig gis don mtshon thabs su zad/ gzung 
598.20(1): 'dzin med pa'i g.yung drung ste bco lnga pa'o// //
598.21(1): 7 g.yung drung sems dpa'i theg pa nyid/ g.yung drung sems dpa' sems 
599.1(1): dpa' che/ 7 g.yung drung sems dpa' rnam rig blta/ rang rig rang gsal rtog 
599.2(1): med ngang / de yang rnam bcas rig med do/ /sems dpa' chen po dbu ma nyid/
599.3(1): kun rdzob sgyu ma rnam rig ltar/ don dam ma skyes stong par blta/ bden pa gnyis 
599.4(1): med mtha' dang bral/ sgros btags skur 'debs ga la yod/ ma bcos thig le 
599.5(1): nyag gcig yin/ klong gsal thugs rje chen po yis/ tshad med bla med phyin bcu 
599.6(1): rdzogs/ ma 'dres bon rnams lam du rdzogs/ stong pa bco brgyad 'bras bu smin/ sgyu 
599.7(1): ma lta bur rang bzhin med/ rab tu mi gnas chen po'o/ /g.yung drung sems dpa'i 
599.8(1): skabs te bcu drug pa'o// //
599.9(1): 7 ye nas gnyis med ka dag byang chub sems/ so sor lta ba bden ma yin/ mi 
599.10(1): gnas ye shes gnyis med la/ phyi nang snang ba rgyus ma grub/ shes pa gnyis su snang 
599.11(1): 'gyur bas/ sangs rgyas 'bras bu 'grub mi 'gyur/ yul snang 'khrul pa rdzun du 
599.12(1): bzung / shes pa rang gsal don dam blta/ ngo bo gcig tu 'dod pa yang / phan 
599.13(1): tshun spangs pa'i 'gal bar 'gyur/ dbu ma bden gnyis 'dod pa yang / dgag 
599.14(1): sgrub gnyis dang ma bral phyir/ don dam don ma yin pa'o/ /rang blos bsam pa'i 
599.15(1): 'khrul pa yin/ gnyis med mnyam pa'i ngang tshul can/ don dam kun rdzob ngang la 
599.16(1): med/ ngang gi rang bzhin rnam par dag /ye sangs rgyas pa'i gshen rab lam pa 
599.17(1): yin/ ye sangs rgyas pa'i lung ste bcu bdun pa'o// //
599.18(1): 7 rgyu rkyen med pa'i byang chub sems/ sgra dang tshad mas spyod yul min/ ye shes 
599.19(1): rtsal med rang gnas pa/ skal ldan nyams kyi don rtags na/ bgrod med lam 
599.20(1): gnas lam mchog ste/ mngon sum bde ba rang las byung / thams cad mkhyen pa 
599.21(1): rtsal med rdzogs/ mi 'gyur gnas pa gser bzhin no/ 7 /ye nas lhun rdzogs 
600.1(1): sangs rgyas bdag nyid pas/ phyi rol yul la sangs rgyas gsol 'debs pa/ smrig 
600.2(1): rgyur snyogs pa bzhin te 'khrul pa'i lam/ 7 theg pa'i nang na yang rab bla na med/
600.3(1): khyad par rmad byung g.yung drung ye khyebs 'di/ ma g.yos ma bcos bdal pa chen 
600.4(1): por zhog /drod rtags rtsol med yon tan shugs las 'byung / ngang nas nar son 
600.5(1): 'bras bu ye sangs rgyas/ don med tshig gi spyod yul ngom la brtson/ gsog 'jog 
600.6(1): can des ne tsos bon bshad kyang / tshig don ya bral ri dwags tshul 'chos 'dra/ de 
600.7(1): bas ma bcos mnyam pa'i ngang la zhog /rang sa zin pa bon sku bde chen yin/ mi 
600.8(1): 'gyur ba'i g.yung drung ste bco brgyad pa'o// //
600.9(1): 7 mthu stobs dbang sgyur sgyu 'phrul theg pa nyid/ g.yung drung bon gyi bstan pa 
600.10(1): bsrung ba'i phyir/ 'jigs pa'i gnas bzung mthun rdzas yo byad gsog /dmigs 
600.11(1): pa'i 'ben la thabs dang rdzu 'phrul gyis/ grub pa'i rtags phyung man ngag drod tshad 
600.12(1): bzung / dbal mo srid pa'i lha rgyud dregs pa rnams/ gnyen po stobs su rdzu 'phrul 
600.13(1): thabs kyis bsgyur/ gang la dmigs pa thal bar brlag par byas/ rtogs pas 
600.14(1): bdag bsgral grub pas gzhan bsgral nas/ yul ni rje khol bdag gzhan dgra dang 
600.15(1): gnyen/ shes pas rdzu 'phrul bdag nyid cir yang bsgyur/ 'gal ba cham phabs 
600.16(1): gshen rab bstan pa bsrung / rtsal chen gyad kyi bu ltar gnas pa yis/ gang gis mi 
600.17(1): 'jigs dbang chen rgyal por gnas/ mthu stobs dbang sgyur gyi skabs te bcu dgu 
600.18(1): pa'o// //
600.19(1): 7 'gyur med g.yung drung srog med sku dang ldan/ ye mnyam chen po'i rang 
600.20(1): bzhin ma rtogs par/ dgra gnyen gnyis su 'dzin pa 'khrul pa'i lam/ thabs 
600.21(1): dang rdzu 'phrul bsgyur ba nyon Re mongs/ rang lus nyon mongs pa yi sar bzhag nas/
601.1(1): rtogs pas bdag nyid sgrol ba snying re rje/ rig pa'i rgyal po ye sangs rgyas pa la/ rje 
601.2(1): dang khol du lta ba thang re chad/ de bas gnyis med ka dag byang chub sems/ g.yung 
601.3(1): drung ye khebs rang byung gdal pa che/ ye nas gnyis su med pa'i g.yung drung sku/ rgya 
601.4(1): chad med pa nam mkha'i ngang tshul can/ ngo bor ma grub spros pa'i mtha' dang bral/
601.5(1): de don mi gnas dmigs dang bcas pa yin/ rang 'byung che bar mnga' bsnyems 
601.6(1): rtogs pa yis/ 'khrul pa de yis snying po mi thob ste/ rag sha'i gnas sam sho gam 
601.7(1): gnas su gol/ mnyam chen stobs kyi lung ste nyi shu pa'o// //
601.8(1): 7 dgra gnyen gnyis su med pa'i byang chub sems/ sems nyid klong nas rig 
601.9(1): pa'i ye shes 'char/ ma yengs klong du gyur pa sgom pa'i mchog /yang dag bde chen 
601.10(1): bon nyid don dam rtogs/ bstan cing bsgrag dka' brjod pa'i tshig las 'das/
601.11(1): 'khrul pas gzhan du rnyed med rang la tshol/ 'gyur ba med pa'i bon dbyings su/
601.12(1): 'dren zla med pa'i sems nyid zhog /ngang la gnas shing gsal ba la/ rig pa'i ye 
601.13(1): shes bya ra btang / je gsal je 'gag drod tshad 'byung / 'di la ma yengs stobs 
601.14(1): su gyur pa ni/ sgom dang mi sgom dmigs pa yul dang bral/ gza' gtad med pa'i 
601.15(1): lta ba chen po yin/ nyi ma'i 'od ltar ma rig mun pa sangs/ 'bras bu rang rdzogs 
601.16(1): gzhan la smon du med/ ma bcos pa'i g.yung drung ste nyer gcig pa'o// //
601.17(1): 7 cho 'phrul rigs bsgyur theg pa nyid/ don dam rnam dag byang chub sems/
601.18(1): kun rdzob byin rlabs dkyil 'khor lha/ phra mo'i yan lag rnam bdun gyis/ sku bskyed 
601.19(1): yan lag brgyad rdzogs nas/ bdag don gzhan don grub par byed/ bdag dang ye 
601.20(1): shes sems dpa' gnyis/ grogs po'i tshul du gnyis su med/ spyod pa gtsang dag 
601.21(1): dkar ba'i sa/ bdag gzhan don rdzogs dbyings su bskyod/ mkha' la gzha' tshon 
602.1(1): 'thibs pa ltar/ 'og min rigs lnga'i dkyil 'khor du/ 'bras bu bla med mngon 
602.2(1): sangs rgyas/ byin rlabs rigs bsgyur skabs te nyer gnyis pa'o// //
602.3(1): 7 rang bzhin ma bcos lhun la gnas pa la/ rnam dag dkyil 'khor 'dod pa 
602.4(1): 'khrul pa'i lam/ ye nas rdzogs chen lhun gyis grub pa la/ lha dang bdag tu 'dzin 
602.5(1): pa snying re rje/ bdag gzhan don gnyis rtsom pa nyon re mongs/ mkha' sprul dbyings 
602.6(1): su bskyod pa thang re chad/ der gshegs dkyil 'khor rtogs pa'i ngang la 'dus/
602.7(1): bsod nams ye shes tshogs chen rang la rdzogs/ rig pa'i me tog mtshan dang dpe 
602.8(1): byad ldan/ ye sangs rgyas pa'i dkyil 'khor yin bzhin du/ bder gshegs gzhan 
602.9(1): nas spyan 'dren byis pa'i las/ 'bras bu mngon yod smon lam phyi na 'debs/ shes 
602.10(1): bya 'khrul pas 'bras bu rgyang thag ring / de bas blang dor med pa'i don la 'chongs/
602.11(1): rmongs pa byis pa'i lam la mi blta bar/ mngon sum rang byung 'bras bu ye dag 
602.12(1): 'thob/ lhun gyis rdzogs pa'i lung ste nyer gsum pa'o// //
602.13(1): 7 re dwogs gnyis su med pa'i byang chub sems/ g.yung drung ye khyebs kun la 
602.14(1): bdal par gnas/ ye nas rang byung rig pa'i rgyal po 'di/ gzhan la ltos par 
602.15(1): gyur pa'i bon ma yin/ ma zhen ma sgyur gnyis su mi snang bar/ ye nas dag pa'i 
602.16(1): klong chen yin bzhin du/ byis pa dal ba'i rtsed mo 'dra ba des/ byang chub mi 'thob 
602.17(1): 'bras bu rgyang thag ring / rang gnas gzhi yi don rtogs nyams su longs/ sa le 
602.18(1): sang nge bying rgod mthar ma lhung / rang bzhin ye rdzogs spros dang bral ba'i thugs/
602.19(1): ma 'dres yongs rdzogs gsal ba chen po'i ngang / 'di bzhin gnas pa dgongs pa'i 
602.20(1): zhe phugs te/ rang byung ye shes dbyings las mi g.yo yang / 'jig rten yongs la 
602.21(1): snyoms pa'i thugs rje 'byung / lhang gis rtogs pa 'bras bu dam pa'i mchog /ngang 
603.1(1): la gnas pas grol lam mthar phyin gshen/ rtogs pa mngon gyur ye sangs rgyas 
603.2(1): pa'o/ /snga phyi med pa'i g.yung drung ste nyer bzhi pa'o// //
603.3(1): 7 bdag nyid rol pa'i theg pa nyid/ snang ba ma spangs lha yi mkha'/ don dam 
603.4(1): rang bzhin med pa'i klong / byer med mtshan ma med pa'i dbyings/ snod bcud 
603.5(1): gnyis kyis bsdus pa'i bon/ rang rig dkyil 'khor chen po nyid/ ye nas ye shes 
603.6(1): lha yi sku/ dkyil 'khor gsum drug la sogs shar/ chu zla'i dkyil 'khor me long 
603.7(1): gzugs brnyan dang / gzha' tshon ri mo lta bur rang bzhin med/ bon nyid dbyings 
603.8(1): nas gsal ba'i ye shes kyis/ bsnyen pa sgo dgu sgrub pa bco brgyad dang / gsang ba 
603.9(1): rnam pa gsum gyis khog phubs nas/ sngags dang phyag rgya ting 'dzin phrin las kyis/
603.10(1): shin tu gsang ba'i sgyu 'phrul dbyer med pas/ gar mkhan sgyu ma rgya mtsho rus sbal 
603.11(1): bzhin/ gsang sngags gsang ba'i 'bras bu chen po 'thob/ bdag nyid rol pa'i 
603.12(1): skabs te nyer lnga pa'o// //
603.13(1): 7 mi skye mi 'gag rang bzhin lhun grub la/ mkha' klong dbyings su 'dzin pa 
603.14(1): 'khrul pa'i lam/ rtog pas rtog pa gnas bsgyur snying re rje/ ma bcos bde ba chen 
603.15(1): po yin bzhin du/ rtsol sgrub dkyil 'khor rim bsgyur nyon re nyongs/ rang bzhin 
603.16(1): ye shes dbyings nas rdzogs pa la/ ting 'dzin 'phro 'du yang dag don las nyams/
603.17(1): bdag nyid ye nas bde bar gshegs pa la/ spyan drangs mchod 'bul logs su 
603.18(1): byed pa nyams/ bon nyid dbyings nas rig pa'i ye shes shar/ ma rtsal lhun grub ye 
603.19(1): nas 'jig 'dral med/ gdod nas rang byung snying po byang chub sems/ dmigs 
603.20(1): rtag med pa g.yung drung ye khyebs yin/ che ba'i ye shes snying po 'di/ rang byung 
603.21(1): gzhan las rnyed mi 'gyur/ rkyen snang ma yin rang so ba/ mtha' dang bral ba'i 
604.1(1): 'bras bu'o/ /rtsol ba dang bral ba'i lung ste nyer drug pa'o// //
604.2(1): 7 gsas mkhar ye khyebs byin brlabs cir yang 'char/ nga med nga las rgyal 
604.3(1): ba'i bdag nyid che/ skye 'gro phyi nang gzugs su snang ba kun/ sku mchog mi bzad 
604.4(1): rgyan gyi 'khor lo che/ sgra skad bye brag bsam yas brjod mi lang / gsung mchog mi 
604.5(1): bzad rgyan gyi 'khor lor grub// yid kyi dran rtog phyi nang thams cad kun/ dbyer 
604.6(1): med don dam dbyings su ro gcig ste/ thugs mchog mi zad rgyan gyi 'khor lor 
604.7(1): rdzogs/ rdzogs pa'i rdzogs chen khyad par chen po'i bon/ du ma ro snyoms gshen 
604.8(1): rab dgongs pa'i phul/ dbyings chen zang ka ma bcos lhug par gzhag /'khor ba 
604.9(1): ming med srid gsum sbyang mi dgos/ mi zad rgyan gyi 'khor lo'i g.yung drung ste nyer 
604.10(1): bdun pa'o/ //
604.11(1): 7 byin rlabs rol pa'i theg pa nyid/ snang srid ma 'gags mkha' klong na/ ma 
604.12(1): skyes rig pa'i ye shes shar/ dbyings shes gnyis med bon gyi sku/ lhun rdzogs ma 
604.13(1): bcos ngang nyid las/ snying po dran brjod skur 'char ba/ 'og ma rim bzhin rtsol 
604.14(1): ba med/ ting 'dzin thabs kyi bye brag kun/ rgya mtsho'i gza' skar ci bzhin du/ ma 
604.15(1): 'dres yongs rdzogs byin rlabs dang / snang la rang bzhin med par dag /ma 
604.16(1): bcos mnyam pa chen por gnas/ mkha' ltar dag pa chen po'o/ /byin rlabs rol 
604.17(1): pa'i skabs te nyer brgyad pa'o// //
604.18(1): 7 gang la dmigs gtad med pa'i byang chub sems/ mi len mi spong g.yung 
604.19(1): drung ye khyebs la/ dbyings dang ye shes 'dzin pa 'khrul pa'i lam/ lha sku gsal 
604.20(1): rdzogs 'dod pa snying re rje/ ting 'dzin ro la chags pa nyon re mongs/ gzung 
604.21(1): 'dzin mtshan mar snang ba'i bon/ mi rtog ngang du ye sangs rgyas/ thams cad lhun

605.2(1): mkha'i ngang / spong len med par rnam par dag /res 'jog med pa'i dbyings su

605.4(1): brtags pas de ltar snang / gza' gtad med pa'i lung ste nyer dgu'o/ //

605.14(1): bcos lhun la gnas pa'i g.yung drung ste sum cu pa'o// //
605.15(1): 7 sems la thog ma tha ma med/ skye 'gag gnyis su mi snang phyir/ 'du 'bral

606.1(1): gcig pa'o/ //

606.11(1): sgom pa bstan pa ste so gnyis pa'o// //

607.12(1): ye khebs 'bras bu bstan pa ste so bzhi pa'o/ //

607.21(1): pa'i don bstan pa'i srubs te so lu pa'o// //

653.9(1): sgo mdzod Rin po che'i glegs bam[>>]zhes pa dpe tshogs spyi chings kyi mtshan du gsol nas 
653.10(1): dpar 'grems zhus pa yin/
653.11(1): zhus dag thad las rim dngos la thog ma'i ma dpe gang la byas pa/ bar du dpe cha 
653.12(1): gang du bsdur ba/ bsdur ba'i legs cha gang zhig thon pa sogs glegs bam so so'i nang 
653.13(1): dang mjug gi zhus bsgrigs gsal bshad du bris yod/ mdor na nged las mi yongs 
653.14(1): kyis spyi lo 2011lo nas bzung mi lo lnga yi ring dad pa dag snang dang rang gi dge sbyor 
653.15(1): dang bstan la zhabs phyi gtso bzung thog deb rer tshar grangs bco lnga nas nyi shu bar 
653.16(1): zhus dag byas yod pas sngar las lhag pa'i legs cha zhig thon yod pa'i re ba yod/ 'on 
653.17(1): kyang re 'ga' ma dpe gcig ma gtogs bsdur ya ma rnyed pa dang / re 'ga' bsdur ya 
653.18(1): du ma rnyed kyang bris pa'i chad lhag sogs kyis gcig mtshungs med pa dang / nged zhus 
653.19(1): sgrig pa tsho'i mkhyen dpyod tshad brgal can min pa bcas dang rjes 'gro byas pas nor 
653.20(1): 'khrul gyis bslad pa'ang yod nges pas/ rjes gzigs mkhan rnam pas su dang gang la 
653.21(1): khag dkri med pa rang bstan rang skyong gi 'gan 'khri gtsang ma phrag tu khur ste bstan pa 
653.22(1): rin po che'i ched du nor 'khrul yo bsrang dag ther gnang ba'i skul ma zhu rgyu dang /
654.1(1): mthar don du nged [<<]g.yung drung bon gyi bka' brten dpe rnying phyogs bsgrigs khang [>>]
654.2(1): gis las don rlabs chen 'di 'dra zhig legs grub byung ba ni/ rig gzhung 'di dang 
654.3(1): bstan pa 'di la lhag bsam can gyis phyar gru mnyam 'degs byas pa las byung ba 
654.4(1): yin/ kan su'u mi rigs dpe skrun khang gi dbu khrid 'brug rgyal mkhar dang gcod pa 
654.5(1): rnam gnyis nas thugs khur rgyab skyor tshad med gnang ba dang / lhag par du dus rab 
654.6(1): kyi gnyan 'phrang mang po'i nang tshe srog 'ben dang bsdos te srung skyong byas pa'i dpe cha 
654.7(1): g.yar ba'i dpe bdag rnam pa dang / de bzhin nga tsho'i bstan don gyi bya ba kun la 
654.8(1): mthun sbyor gnang ba ma tshad dpe tshogs 'di dpar skrun skabs su yang ma bskul dang 
654.9(1): blang gis zhal 'debs gnang mkhan bcas dngos shugs brgyud gsum nas rgyu tshegs 
654.10(1): thabs gsum gyis sdong grogs rogs ram gnang mkhan yongs la snying dbus nas 
654.11(1): thugs rje che zhu rgyu dang / gsung rab dag bzhengs byas pa'i dge ba'i tshogs 'dis/
654.12(1): 7 skyabs rje rgyal ba sman ri ba'i mkhan slob rnam gnyis gtsos ris su ma chad pa'i 
654.13(1): bstan 'dzin skyes chen dam pa rnams kyi sku tshe bskal brgyar brtan zhing bzhed dgongs 
654.14(1): lhun gyis 'grub pa dang / 'brel thogs kyi sbyin pa'i bdag po dang las gzhi 'di'i byed 
654.15(1): po kun tshe bsod dbang khams gong nas gong du mtho ste myur du sku gsum rdzogs pa'i 
654.16(1): sangs rgyas kyi go 'phang thob pa dang / zhang bod rig gzhung rnams mi nyams gong nas 
654.17(1): gong du 'phel te 'dzam gling tha gru yongs kyi snod bcud rgud pa gso zhing phan bde'i 
654.18(1): gsos su khyab pa dang / yangs pa'i rgyal khams kun du nad mug 'khrug rtsod dang rang 
654.19(1): byung 'byung ba'i 'jigs pa rnams rmeng med du zhi nas bde legs phun tshogs skyid kyi nyi 
654.20(1): ma 'gro kun yongs la shar ba'i smon 'dun dang bcas 'byung ldan 301 spyi lo 205 5[ / ]1
